conclusion: 该方法为人道主义领域提供了可落地的解决方案，展示了数值理解模型在危机管理中的实际价值。
search_text: Extracting Victim Counts from Text 从文本中提取受害者计数 Decision-makers in the humanitarian sector rely on timely and exact information during crisis events. Knowing how many civilians were injured during an earthquake is vital to allocate aids properly. Information about such victim counts is often only available within full-text event descriptions from newspapers and other reports. Extracting numbers from text is challenging: numbers have different formats and may require numeric reasoning. This renders purely string matching-based approaches insufficient. As a consequence, fine-grained counts of injured, displaced, or abused victims beyond fatalities are often not extracted and remain unseen. We cast victim count extraction as a question answering (QA) task with a regression or classification objective. We compare regex, dependency parsing, semantic role labeling-based approaches, and advanced text-to-text models. Beyond model accuracy, we analyze extraction reliability and robustness which are key for this sensitive task. In particular, we discuss model calibration and investigate few-shot and out-of-distribution performance. Ultimately, we make a comprehensive recommendation on which model to select for different desiderata and data domains. Our work is among the first to apply numeracy-focused large language models in a real-world use case with a positive impact. 人道主义部门的决策者在危机事件期间依赖及时、准确的信息。了解地震期间有多少平民受伤对于正确分配援助至关重要。有关此类受害者人数的信息通常只能在报纸和其他报告的全文事件描述中获得。从文本中提取数字具有挑战性：数字具有不同的格式，并且可能需要数字推理。这使得纯粹基于字符串匹配的方法不够。因此，除了死亡人数之外，受伤、流离失所或受虐待受害者的详细统计数据往往不会被提取出来，而且仍然不可见。我们将受害者计数提取视为具有回归或分类目标的问答 (QA) 任务。我们比较了正则表达式、依存解析、基于语义角色标记的方法和高级文本到文本模型。除了模型准确性之外，我们还分析了提取的可靠性和鲁棒性，这是这项敏感任务的关键。特别是，我们讨论了模型校准并研究了少样本和分布外的性能。最终，我们针对不同的需求和数据领域选择哪种模型提出了全面的建议。我们的工作是首批将以计算为中心的大型语言模型应用于现实世界用例并产生积极影响的工作之一。 本文旨在从文本中准确提取灾害事件中的受害者数量，以支持人道主义决策。 Mian Zhong,Shehzaad Dhuliawala,Niklas Stoehr cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yize Li,Pu Zhao,Xue Lin,Bhavya Kailkhura,Ryan Goldhahn
title: Less is More: Data Pruning for Faster Adversarial Training
title_zh: 少即是多：数据修剪以加快对抗训练速度
comment: The AAAI-23 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety (SafeAI 2023)
comments: The AAAI-23 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety (SafeAI 2023)
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are sensitive to adversarial examples, resulting in fragile and unreliable performance in the real world. Although adversarial training (AT) is currently one of the most effective methodologies to robustify DNNs, it is computationally very expensive (e.g., 5-10X costlier than standard training). To address this challenge, existing approaches focus on single-step AT, referred to as Fast AT, reducing the overhead of adversarial example generation. Unfortunately, these approaches are known to fail against stronger adversaries. To make AT computationally efficient without compromising robustness, this paper takes a different view of the efficient AT problem. Specifically, we propose to minimize redundancies at the data level by leveraging data pruning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the data pruning based AT can achieve similar or superior robust (and clean) accuracy as its unpruned counterparts while being significantly faster. For instance, proposed strategies accelerate CIFAR-10 training up to 3.44X and CIFAR-100 training to 2.02X. Additionally, the data pruning methods can readily be reconciled with existing adversarial acceleration tricks to obtain the striking speed-ups of 5.66X and 5.12X on CIFAR-10, 3.67X and 3.07X on CIFAR-100 with TRADES and MART, respectively.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are sensitive to adversarial examples, resulting in fragile and unreliable performance in the real world. Although adversarial training (AT) is currently one of the most effective methodologies to robustify DNNs, it is computationally very expensive (e.g., 5-10X costlier than standard training). To address this challenge, existing approaches focus on single-step AT, referred to as Fast AT, reducing the overhead of adversarial example generation. Unfortunately, these approaches are known to fail against stronger adversaries. To make AT computationally efficient without compromising robustness, this paper takes a different view of the efficient AT problem. Specifically, we propose to minimize redundancies at the data level by leveraging data pruning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the data pruning based AT can achieve similar or superior robust (and clean) accuracy as its unpruned counterparts while being significantly faster. For instance, proposed strategies accelerate CIFAR-10 training up to 3.44X and CIFAR-100 training to 2.02X. Additionally, the data pruning methods can readily be reconciled with existing adversarial acceleration tricks to obtain the striking speed-ups of 5.66X and 5.12X on CIFAR-10, 3.67X and 3.07X on CIFAR-100 with TRADES and MART, respectively.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 对对抗性示例很敏感，导致现实世界中的性能脆弱且不可靠。尽管对抗训练 (AT) 目前是增强 DNN 的最有效方法之一，但它的计算成本非常昂贵（例如，比标准训练成本高 5-10 倍）。为了应对这一挑战，现有方法侧重于单步 AT，称为快速 AT，减少对抗性示例生成的开销。不幸的是，众所周知，这些方法无法对抗更强大的对手。为了在不影响鲁棒性的情况下提高 AT 的计算效率，本文对高效 AT 问题采取了不同的观点。具体来说，我们建议通过利用数据修剪来最大限度地减少数据级别的冗余。大量实验表明，基于数据剪枝的 AT 可以实现与未剪枝的 AT 类似或更高的稳健（且干净）精度，同时速度明显更快。例如，提出的策略将 CIFAR-10 训练加速至 3.44 倍，将 CIFAR-100 训练加速至 2.02 倍。此外，数据修剪方法可以很容易地与现有的对抗性加速技巧相协调，在使用 TRADES 和 MART 的 CIFAR-10 上分别获得 5.66 倍和 5.12 倍的惊人加速，在 CIFAR-100 上分别获得 3.67 倍和 3.07 倍的惊人加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过数据剪枝方法加速对抗训练，减少计算成本同时保持模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练计算成本高且现有加速方法在面对强对抗样本时效果不佳，需寻找兼顾效率与鲁棒性的解决方案。
AI.method: 在数据层面引入剪枝策略，移除冗余样本以降低训练开销，并与现有加速技术结合进一步提升效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上加速3.44倍，在CIFAR-100上加速2.02倍；结合TRADES和MART后分别达5.66X和3.67X加速，准确率无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 数据剪枝有效平衡了对抗训练的效率与鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了可行的优化路径。

Although adversarial training (AT) is currently one of the most effective methodologies to robustify DNNs, it is computationally very expensive (e.g., 5-10X costlier than standard training). To address this challenge, existing approaches focus on single-step AT, referred to as Fast AT, reducing the overhead of adversarial example generation. Unfortunately, these approaches are known to fail against stronger adversaries. Specifically, we propose to minimize redundancies at the data level by leveraging data pruning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the data pruning based AT can achieve similar or superior robust (and clean) accuracy as its unpruned counterparts while being significantly faster. For instance, proposed strategies accelerate CIFAR-10 training up to 3.44X and CIFAR-100 training to 2.02X. authors_text: Chung-Wei Lee,Pavlos Athanasios Apostolopulos,Igor L. Markov
title: Practical Knowledge Distillation: Using DNNs to Beat DNNs
title_zh: 实用知识蒸馏：使用 DNN 击败 DNN
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 17 tables
comments: 11 pages, 1 figure, 17 tables
abstract: For tabular data sets, we explore data and model distillation, as well as data denoising. These techniques improve both gradient-boosting models and a specialized DNN architecture. While gradient boosting is known to outperform DNNs on tabular data, we close the gap for datasets with 100K+ rows and give DNNs an advantage on small data sets. We extend these results with input-data distillation and optimized ensembling to help DNN performance match or exceed that of gradient boosting. As a theoretical justification of our practical method, we prove its equivalence to classical cross-entropy knowledge distillation. We also qualitatively explain the superiority of DNN ensembles over XGBoost on small data sets. For an industry end-to-end real-time ML platform with 4M production inferences per second, we develop a model-training workflow based on data sampling that distills ensembles of models into a single gradient-boosting model favored for high-performance real-time inference, without performance loss. Empirical evaluation shows that the proposed combination of methods consistently improves model accuracy over prior best models across several production applications deployed worldwide.
summary: For tabular data sets, we explore data and model distillation, as well as data denoising. These techniques improve both gradient-boosting models and a specialized DNN architecture. While gradient boosting is known to outperform DNNs on tabular data, we close the gap for datasets with 100K+ rows and give DNNs an advantage on small data sets. We extend these results with input-data distillation and optimized ensembling to help DNN performance match or exceed that of gradient boosting. As a theoretical justification of our practical method, we prove its equivalence to classical cross-entropy knowledge distillation. We also qualitatively explain the superiority of DNN ensembles over XGBoost on small data sets. For an industry end-to-end real-time ML platform with 4M production inferences per second, we develop a model-training workflow based on data sampling that distills ensembles of models into a single gradient-boosting model favored for high-performance real-time inference, without performance loss. Empirical evaluation shows that the proposed combination of methods consistently improves model accuracy over prior best models across several production applications deployed worldwide.
abstract_zh: 对于表格数据集，我们探索数据和模型蒸馏，以及数据去噪。这些技术改进了梯度增强模型和专门的 DNN 架构。虽然已知梯度提升在表格数据上优于 DNN，但我们缩小了 10 万行以上数据集的差距，并让 DNN 在小数据集上具有优势。我们通过输入数据蒸馏和优化集成来扩展这些结果，以帮助 DNN 性能达到或超过梯度提升的性能。作为我们实践方法的理论证明，我们证明了它与经典交叉熵知识蒸馏的等价性。我们还定性地解释了 DNN 集成在小数据集上相对于 XGBoost 的优越性。对于每秒进行 400 万次生产推理的行业端到端实时机器学习平台，我们开发了一种基于数据采样的模型训练工作流程，将模型集合提炼成单个梯度提升模型，有利于高性能实时推理，而不会造成性能损失。实证评估表明，与全球部署的多个生产应用程序中的先前最佳模型相比，所提出的方法组合持续提高了模型准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在表格数据集中应用数据与模型蒸馏及去噪技术，以提升梯度提升模型和深度神经网络（DNN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管梯度提升模型在表格数据上通常优于DNN，但作者旨在通过蒸馏技术缩小这一差距，并在小数据集上赋予DNN优势。
AI.method: 结合数据蒸馏、模型蒸馏、数据去噪、输入数据蒸馏及优化集成方法，并证明其等价于经典交叉熵知识蒸馏，同时开发基于数据采样的模型训练流程。
AI.result: DNN在小数据集上表现优于梯度提升模型，且在多个生产应用中模型准确率持续提升，无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了模型准确性，弥合了DNN与梯度提升模型的性能差距，为实时推理场景提供了优化方案。

title: Targeted Search Control in AlphaZero for Effective Policy Improvement
title_zh: AlphaZero 中的定向搜索控制可有效改进策略
comment: This paper has been accepted to the Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
comments: This paper has been accepted to the Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023)
abstract: AlphaZero is a self-play reinforcement learning algorithm that achieves superhuman play in chess, shogi, and Go via policy iteration. To be an effective policy improvement operator, AlphaZero's search requires accurate value estimates for the states appearing in its search tree. AlphaZero trains upon self-play matches beginning from the initial state of a game and only samples actions over the first few moves, limiting its exploration of states deeper in the game tree. We introduce Go-Exploit, a novel search control strategy for AlphaZero. Go-Exploit samples the start state of its self-play trajectories from an archive of states of interest. Beginning self-play trajectories from varied starting states enables Go-Exploit to more effectively explore the game tree and to learn a value function that generalizes better. Producing shorter self-play trajectories allows Go-Exploit to train upon more independent value targets, improving value training. Finally, the exploration inherent in Go-Exploit reduces its need for exploratory actions, enabling it to train under more exploitative policies. In the games of Connect Four and 9x9 Go, we show that Go-Exploit learns with a greater sample efficiency than standard AlphaZero, resulting in stronger performance against reference opponents and in head-to-head play. We also compare Go-Exploit to KataGo, a more sample efficient reimplementation of AlphaZero, and demonstrate that Go-Exploit has a more effective search control strategy. Furthermore, Go-Exploit's sample efficiency improves when KataGo's other innovations are incorporated.

To be an effective policy improvement operator, AlphaZero's search requires accurate value estimates for the states appearing in its search tree. AlphaZero trains upon self-play matches beginning from the initial state of a game and only samples actions over the first few moves, limiting its exploration of states deeper in the game tree. We introduce Go-Exploit, a novel search control strategy for AlphaZero. Go-Exploit samples the start state of its self-play trajectories from an archive of states of interest. Beginning self-play trajectories from varied starting states enables Go-Exploit to more effectively explore the game tree and to learn a value function that generalizes better. Producing shorter self-play trajectories allows Go-Exploit to train upon more independent value targets, improving value training. Finally, the exploration inherent in Go-Exploit reduces its need for exploratory actions, enabling it to train under more exploitative policies. In the games of Connect Four and 9x9 Go, we show that Go-Exploit learns with a greater sample efficiency than standard AlphaZero, resulting in stronger performance against reference opponents and in head-to-head play. We also compare Go-Exploit to KataGo, a more sample efficient reimplementation of AlphaZero, and demonstrate that Go-Exploit has a more effective search control strategy. Furthermore, Go-Exploit's sample efficiency improves when KataGo's other innovations are incorporated.
abstract_zh: AlphaZero 是一种自对弈强化学习算法，可通过策略迭代在国际象棋、将棋和围棋中实现超人的对弈。为了成为有效的策略改进算子，AlphaZero 的搜索需要对其搜索树中出现的状态进行准确的值估计。 AlphaZero 从游戏的初始状态开始进行自我对战比赛训练，并且仅对前几个动作进行采样，从而限制了其对游戏树更深层状态的探索。我们介绍 Go-Exploit，一种针对 AlphaZero 的新颖搜索控制策略。 Go-Exploit 从感兴趣的状态档案中采样其自我运行轨迹的起始状态。从不同的起始状态开始自我博弈轨迹使 Go-Exploit 能够更有效地探索博弈树并学习更通用的价值函数。生成较短的自我对弈轨迹使 Go-Exploit 能够根据更独立的价值目标进行训练，从而改善价值训练。最后，Go-Exploit 固有的探索减少了其对探索性行动的需求，使其能够在更具剥削性的政策下进行训练。在四子棋和 9x9 围棋游戏中，我们表明 Go-Exploit 的学习样本效率比标准 AlphaZero 更高，从而在与参考对手和正面交锋中表现更强。我们还将 Go-Exploit 与 KataGo（AlphaZero 的更高效的重新实现）进行了比较，并证明 Go-Exploit 具有更有效的搜索控制策略。此外，当结合 KataGo 的其他创新技术时，Go-Exploit 的样本效率得到了提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Go-Exploit策略，通过改进AlphaZero的搜索控制机制提升策略优化效率。
AI.motivation: AlphaZero在深度游戏树状态探索不足，导致价值函数泛化能力受限，且依赖探索性动作降低训练效率。
AI.method: 从预存的感兴趣状态库中采样起始状态，生成更多独立价值目标，减少探索动作依赖，增强搜索树遍历效率。
AI.result: 在Connect Four和9x9围棋中，Go-Exploit相较标准AlphaZero和KataGo展现出更高的样本效率与对抗表现。
AI.conclusion: Go-Exploit通过多样化起始状态采样和价值目标设计，有效提升了AlphaZero的策略优化能力，且兼容其他改进技术。

search_text: Targeted Search Control in AlphaZero for Effective Policy Improvement AlphaZero 中的定向搜索控制可有效改进策略 AlphaZero is a self-play reinforcement learning algorithm that achieves superhuman play in chess, shogi, and Go via policy iteration. To be an effective policy improvement operator, AlphaZero's search requires accurate value estimates for the states appearing in its search tree. AlphaZero trains upon self-play matches beginning from the initial state of a game and only samples actions over the first few moves, limiting its exploration of states deeper in the game tree. We introduce Go-Exploit, a novel search control strategy for AlphaZero. Go-Exploit samples the start state of its self-play trajectories from an archive of states of interest. Beginning self-play trajectories from varied starting states enables Go-Exploit to more effectively explore the game tree and to learn a value function that generalizes better. Producing shorter self-play trajectories allows Go-Exploit to train upon more independent value targets, improving value training. Finally, the exploration inherent in Go-Exploit reduces its need for exploratory actions, enabling it to train under more exploitative policies. In the games of Connect Four and 9x9 Go, we show that Go-Exploit learns with a greater sample efficiency than standard AlphaZero, resulting in stronger performance against reference opponents and in head-to-head play. We also compare Go-Exploit to KataGo, a more sample efficient reimplementation of AlphaZero, and demonstrate that Go-Exploit has a more effective search control strategy. Furthermore, Go-Exploit's sample efficiency improves when KataGo's other innovations are incorporated. title: Autonomous Restructuring of Asteroids into Rotating Space Stations
title_zh: 将小行星自主重组为旋转空间站
comment: 65 pages, 53 figures, 25 tables; Version 2 includes editorial changes, improved dumbbell stability details, and reference updates and additions
comments: 65 pages, 53 figures, 25 tables; Version 2 includes editorial changes, improved dumbbell stability details, and reference updates and additions
abstract: Asteroid restructuring uses robotics, self replication, and mechanical automatons to autonomously restructure an asteroid into a large rotating space station. The restructuring process makes structures from asteroid oxide materials; uses productive self-replication to make replicators, helpers, and products; and creates a multiple floor station to support a large population. In an example simulation, it takes 12 years to autonomously restructure a large asteroid into the space station. This is accomplished with a single rocket launch. The single payload contains a base station, 4 robots (spiders), and a modest set of supplies. Our simulation creates 3000 spiders and over 23,500 other pieces of equipment. Only the base station and spiders (replicators) have advanced microprocessors and algorithms. These represent 21st century technologies created and trans-ported from Earth. The equipment and tools are built using in-situ materials and represent 18th or 19th century technologies. The equipment and tools (helpers) have simple mechanical programs to perform repetitive tasks. The resulting example station would be a rotating framework almost 5 kilometers in diameter. Once completed, it could support a population of over 700,000 people. Many researchers identify the high launch costs, the harsh space environment, and the lack of gravity as the key obstacles hindering the development of space stations. The single probe addresses the high launch cost. The autonomous construction eliminates the harsh space environment for construction crews. The completed rotating station provides radiation protection and centripetal gravity for the first work crews and colonists.

The single payload contains a base station, 4 robots (spiders), and a modest set of supplies. Our simulation creates 3000 spiders and over 23,500 other pieces of equipment. Only the base station and spiders (replicators) have advanced microprocessors and algorithms. These represent 21st century technologies created and trans-ported from Earth. The equipment and tools are built using in-situ materials and represent 18th or 19th century technologies. The equipment and tools (helpers) have simple mechanical programs to perform repetitive tasks. The resulting example station would be a rotating framework almost 5 kilometers in diameter. Once completed, it could support a population of over 700,000 people. abstract_zh: 小行星重组利用机器人技术、自我复制和机械自动机将小行星自主重组为大型旋转空间站。重组过程利用小行星氧化物材料制造结构；使用高效的自我复制来制造复制器、助手和产品；并创建一个多层车站来支持大量人口。在一个模拟示例中，需要 12 年时间才能将一颗大型小行星自主重组为空间站。这是通过一次火箭发射来完成的。单个有效载荷包含一个基站、4 个机器人（蜘蛛）和一套适度的补给品。我们的模拟创建了 3000 只蜘蛛和超过 23,500 件其他设备。只有基站和蜘蛛（复制器）拥有先进的微处理器和算法。这些代表了从地球创造和传播的 21 世纪技术。这些设备和工具是使用现场材料建造的，代表了 18 或 19 世纪的技术。设备和工具（助手）具有简单的机械程序来执行重复性任务。由此产生的示例站将是一个直径近 5 公里的旋转框架。建成后，可容纳超过 70 万人口。许多研究人员认为高昂的发射成本、恶劣的太空环境和缺乏重力是阻碍空间站发展的关键障碍。单个探测器解决了高发射成本的问题。自主施工消除了施工人员恶劣的太空环境。完成的旋转站为第一批工作人员和殖民者提供辐射防护和向心重力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过机器人、自我复制技术和机械自动机将小行星自主改造成旋转空间站的方法。
AI.motivation: 解决空间站开发中高昂的发射成本、恶劣太空环境和缺乏重力等关键障碍。
AI.method: 利用单次火箭发射携带基础站、4台机器人（蜘蛛）及基础物资，通过自我复制技术生产3000台蜘蛛和23500件设备，使用小行星氧化物材料建造多层旋转空间站。
AI.result: 模拟显示12年内可建成直径近5公里、容纳70万人的空间站，提供辐射防护和离心力模拟重力。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过自主建造降低风险，利用原位材料降低成本，为太空殖民提供可行路径。

title: Reward Learning as Doubly Nonparametric Bandits: Optimal Design and Scaling Laws
title_zh: 将学习奖励为双非参数强盗：最优设计和缩放定律
comment: Accepted to AISTATS 2023
comments: Accepted to AISTATS 2023
abstract: Specifying reward functions for complex tasks like object manipulation or driving is challenging to do by hand. Reward learning seeks to address this by learning a reward model using human feedback on selected query policies. This shifts the burden of reward specification to the optimal design of the queries. We propose a theoretical framework for studying reward learning and the associated optimal experiment design problem. Our framework models rewards and policies as nonparametric functions belonging to subsets of Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHSs). The learner receives (noisy) oracle access to a true reward and must output a policy that performs well under the true reward. For this setting, we first derive non-asymptotic excess risk bounds for a simple plug-in estimator based on ridge regression. We then solve the query design problem by optimizing these risk bounds with respect to the choice of query set and obtain a finite sample statistical rate, which depends primarily on the eigenvalue spectrum of a certain linear operator on the RKHSs. Despite the generality of these results, our bounds are stronger than previous bounds developed for more specialized problems. We specifically show that the well-studied problem of Gaussian process (GP) bandit optimization is a special case of our framework, and that our bounds either improve or are competitive with known regret guarantees for the Matérn kernel.

Our framework models rewards and policies as nonparametric functions belonging to subsets of Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHSs). The learner receives (noisy) oracle access to a true reward and must output a policy that performs well under the true reward. For this setting, we first derive non-asymptotic excess risk bounds for a simple plug-in estimator based on ridge regression. We then solve the query design problem by optimizing these risk bounds with respect to the choice of query set and obtain a finite sample statistical rate, which depends primarily on the eigenvalue spectrum of a certain linear operator on the RKHSs. Despite the generality of these results, our bounds are stronger than previous bounds developed for more specialized problems. We specifically show that the well-studied problem of Gaussian process (GP) bandit optimization is a special case of our framework, and that our bounds either improve or are competitive with known regret guarantees for the Matérn kernel.
abstract_zh: 为对象操作或驾驶等复杂任务指定奖励函数对于手工来说是一项挑战。奖励学习试图通过使用对选定查询策略的人类反馈来学习奖励模型来解决这个问题。这将奖励规范的负担转移到查询的优化设计上。我们提出了一个用于研究奖励学习和相关的最优实验设计问题的理论框架。我们的框架将奖励和策略建模为属于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）子集的非参数函数。学习者接收（嘈杂的）预言机访问真实奖励，并且必须输出在真实奖励下表现良好的策略。对于这种设置，我们首先基于岭回归推导简单插件估计器的非渐近超额风险界限。然后，我们通过优化这些关于查询集选择的风险界限来解决查询设计问题，并获得有限样本统计率，这主要取决于 RKHS 上某个线性算子的特征值谱。尽管这些结果具有普遍性，但我们的界限比以前为更专业的问题开发的界限更强。我们特别表明，经过充分研究的高斯过程 (GP) 强盗优化问题是我们框架的一个特例，并且我们的边界要么改进，要么与 Matérn 内核的已知遗憾保证相竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将奖励学习建模为双重非参数带的理论框架，研究了最优查询设计问题，并推导了有限样本下的统计速率。
AI.motivation: 复杂任务（如物体操作或驾驶）的手动指定奖励函数具有挑战性，奖励学习通过人类反馈学习奖励模型，需解决查询策略的最优设计问题。
AI.method: 将奖励和策略建模为再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的非参数函数，基于岭回归推导非渐近超额风险界，并通过优化风险界确定查询集设计，分析算子特征值谱的影响。
AI.result: 获得了基于查询集的有限样本统计速率，该速率主要依赖于RKHS上某线性算子的特征值谱，且结果比现有专门问题的界更强，高斯过程（GP）带优化被证明是该框架的特例。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有通用性，为奖励学习提供了理论保证，且在GP带优化等场景中表现出更优或竞争力的界，为后续研究提供了方向。

search_text: Reward Learning as Doubly Nonparametric Bandits: Optimal Design and Scaling Laws 将学习奖励为双非参数强盗：最优设计和缩放定律 Specifying reward functions for complex tasks like object manipulation or driving is challenging to do by hand. Reward learning seeks to address this by learning a reward model using human feedback on selected query policies. This shifts the burden of reward specification to the optimal design of the queries. We propose a theoretical framework for studying reward learning and the associated optimal experiment design problem. Our framework models rewards and policies as nonparametric functions belonging to subsets of Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHSs). The learner receives (noisy) oracle access to a true reward and must output a policy that performs well under the true reward. For this setting, we first derive non-asymptotic excess risk bounds for a simple plug-in estimator based on ridge regression. We then solve the query design problem by optimizing these risk bounds with respect to the choice of query set and obtain a finite sample statistical rate, which depends primarily on the eigenvalue spectrum of a certain linear operator on the RKHSs. Despite the generality of these results, our bounds are stronger than previous bounds developed for more specialized problems. We specifically show that the well-studied problem of Gaussian process (GP) bandit optimization is a special case of our framework, and that our bounds either improve or are competitive with known regret guarantees for the Matérn kernel. 为对象操作或驾驶等复杂任务指定奖励函数对于手工来说是一项挑战。奖励学习试图通过使用对选定查询策略的人类反馈来学习奖励模型来解决这个问题。这将奖励规范的负担转移到查询的优化设计上。我们提出了一个用于研究奖励学习和相关的最优实验设计问题的理论框架。我们的框架将奖励和策略建模为属于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）子集的非参数函数。学习者接收（嘈杂的）预言机访问真实奖励，并且必须输出在真实奖励下表现良好的策略。对于这种设置，我们首先基于岭回归推导简单插件估计器的非渐近超额风险界限。然后，我们通过优化这些关于查询集选择的风险界限来解决查询设计问题，并获得有限样本统计率，这主要取决于 RKHS 上某个线性算子的特征值谱。尽管这些结果具有普遍性，但我们的界限比以前为更专业的问题开发的界限更强。我们特别表明，经过充分研究的高斯过程 (GP) 强盗优化问题是我们框架的一个特例，并且我们的边界要么改进，要么与 Matérn 内核的已知遗憾保证相竞争。 本文提出了一种将奖励学习建模为双重非参数带的理论框架，研究了最优查询设计问题，并推导了有限样本下的统计速率。 Kush Bhatia,Wenshuo Guo,Jacob Steinhardt cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Denis Jered McInerney,Geoffrey Young,Jan-Willem van de Meent,Byron C. Wallace
title: CHiLL: Zero-shot Custom Interpretable Feature Extraction from Clinical Notes with Large Language Models
title_zh: CHiLL：使用大型语言模型从临床记录中零样本地提取自定义可解释特征
comment: To be published at EMNLP Findings 2023
comments: To be published at EMNLP Findings 2023
abstract: We propose CHiLL (Crafting High-Level Latents), an approach for natural-language specification of features for linear models. CHiLL prompts LLMs with expert-crafted queries to generate interpretable features from health records. The resulting noisy labels are then used to train a simple linear classifier. Generating features based on queries to an LLM can empower physicians to use their domain expertise to craft features that are clinically meaningful for a downstream task of interest, without having to manually extract these from raw EHR. We are motivated by a real-world risk prediction task, but as a reproducible proxy, we use MIMIC-III and MIMIC-CXR data and standard predictive tasks (e.g., 30-day readmission) to evaluate this approach. We find that linear models using automatically extracted features are comparably performant to models using reference features, and provide greater interpretability than linear models using "Bag-of-Words" features. We verify that learned feature weights align well with clinical expectations.
summary: We propose CHiLL (Crafting High-Level Latents), an approach for natural-language specification of features for linear models. CHiLL prompts LLMs with expert-crafted queries to generate interpretable features from health records. The resulting noisy labels are then used to train a simple linear classifier. Generating features based on queries to an LLM can empower physicians to use their domain expertise to craft features that are clinically meaningful for a downstream task of interest, without having to manually extract these from raw EHR. We are motivated by a real-world risk prediction task, but as a reproducible proxy, we use MIMIC-III and MIMIC-CXR data and standard predictive tasks (e.g., 30-day readmission) to evaluate this approach. We find that linear models using automatically extracted features are comparably performant to models using reference features, and provide greater interpretability than linear models using "Bag-of-Words" features. We verify that learned feature weights align well with clinical expectations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CHiLL（Crafting High-Level Latents），一种用于线性模型特征的自然语言规范的方法。 CHiLL 通过专家设计的查询提示法学硕士从健康记录中生成可解释的特征。然后使用生成的噪声标签来训练简单的线性分类器。基于对 LLM 的查询生成特征可以使医生能够利用他们的领域专业知识来制作对感兴趣的下游任务具有临床意义的特征，而无需从原始 EHR 中手动提取这些特征。我们的动机是现实世界的风险预测任务，但作为可重复的代理，我们使用 MIMIC-III 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据以及标准预测任务（例如 30 天再入院）来评估这种方法。我们发现使用自动提取特征的线性模型与使用参考特征的模型性能相当，并且比使用“词袋”特征的线性模型提供更好的可解释性。我们验证了学习到的特征权重与临床期望非常一致。

AI.tldr: 提出CHiLL方法，利用大型语言模型从临床记录中自动生成可解释特征，用于训练线性分类器，以提升临床预测任务的性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需手动提取电子健康记录特征，耗时且可能遗漏临床关键信息，而医生领域知识可指导生成更有效的特征。
AI.method: 通过专家设计的查询提示大型语言模型生成可解释的临床特征，然后利用这些特征训练简单的线性分类器，无需手动提取特征。
AI.result: 线性模型使用自动生成特征的性能与参考特征相当，且比传统‘词袋’特征更具可解释性，学习到的特征权重符合临床预期。
AI.conclusion: CHiLL方法能够有效结合医生领域知识生成临床有意义的特征，提升模型性能与可解释性，为临床预测任务提供可行的解决方案。

title: Tight Runtime Bounds for Static Unary Unbiased Evolutionary Algorithms on Linear Functions
title_zh: 线性函数静态一元无偏进化算法的严格运行时界限
comment: To appear in Algorithmica. This is the full version of a GECCO 2023 paper
comments: To appear in Algorithmica. This is the full version of a GECCO 2023 paper
abstract: In a seminal paper in 2013, Witt showed that the (1+1) Evolutionary Algorithm with standard bit mutation needs time $(1+o(1))n \ln n/p_1$ to find the optimum of any linear function, as long as the probability $p_1$ to flip exactly one bit is $Θ(1)$. In this paper we investigate how this result generalizes if standard bit mutation is replaced by an arbitrary unbiased mutation operator. This situation is notably different, since the stochastic domination argument used for the lower bound by Witt no longer holds. In particular, starting closer to the optimum is not necessarily an advantage, and OneMax is no longer the easiest function for arbitrary starting positions. Nevertheless, we show that Witt's result carries over if $p_1$ is not too small, with different constraints for upper and lower bounds, and if the number of flipped bits has bounded expectation~$χ$. Notably, this includes some of the heavy-tail mutation operators used in fast genetic algorithms, but not all of them. We also give examples showing that algorithms with unbounded $χ$ have qualitatively different trajectories close to the optimum.
summary: In a seminal paper in 2013, Witt showed that the (1+1) Evolutionary Algorithm with standard bit mutation needs time $(1+o(1))n \ln n/p_1$ to find the optimum of any linear function, as long as the probability $p_1$ to flip exactly one bit is $Θ(1)$. In this paper we investigate how this result generalizes if standard bit mutation is replaced by an arbitrary unbiased mutation operator. This situation is notably different, since the stochastic domination argument used for the lower bound by Witt no longer holds. In particular, starting closer to the optimum is not necessarily an advantage, and OneMax is no longer the easiest function for arbitrary starting positions. Nevertheless, we show that Witt's result carries over if $p_1$ is not too small, with different constraints for upper and lower bounds, and if the number of flipped bits has bounded expectation~$χ$. Notably, this includes some of the heavy-tail mutation operators used in fast genetic algorithms, but not all of them. We also give examples showing that algorithms with unbounded $χ$ have qualitatively different trajectories close to the optimum.
abstract_zh: 在 2013 年的一篇开创性论文中，Witt 表明，具有标准位变异的 (1+1) 进化算法需要时间 $(1+o(1))n \ln n/p_1$ 来找到任何线性函数的最优值，只要 $p_1$ 恰好翻转一位的概率为 $θ(1)$。在本文中，我们研究了如果标准位突变被任意无偏突变算子替换，该结果如何推广。这种情况明显不同，因为维特用于下界的随机支配论点不再成立。特别是，开始时更接近最优不一定是优势，并且 OneMax 不再是任意起始位置的最简单函数。尽管如此，我们表明，如果 $p_1$ 不太小，并且上下界有不同的约束，并且翻转位数具有有限的期望~$χ$，则维特的结果会继续存在。值得注意的是，这包括快速遗传算法中使用的一些重尾变异算子，但不是全部。我们还给出了示例，表明具有无界 $χ$ 的算法具有接近最优的定性不同轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在使用任意无偏变异算子的情况下，静态单目无偏进化算法在求解线性函数时的运行时间界限。
AI.motivation: Witt在2013年证明了标准位变异的(1+1)进化算法的运行时间界，但当替换为任意无偏变异算子时，原有支配性论证不再适用，需重新分析其通用性。
AI.method: 通过分析变异算子的翻转位数期望值χ及单比特翻转概率p₁的约束条件，结合不同变异算子的特性进行理论推导。
AI.result: 当p₁不小于Θ(1)且χ有界时，Witt的结果可推广；部分重尾变异算子符合要求，但存在χ无界的算法轨迹特性显著不同。
AI.conclusion: 无偏变异算子的运行时间界依赖于p₁和χ的约束，部分高效遗传算法的变异算子可能不满足现有界条件。

search_text: Tight Runtime Bounds for Static Unary Unbiased Evolutionary Algorithms on Linear Functions 线性函数静态一元无偏进化算法的严格运行时界限 In a seminal paper in 2013, Witt showed that the (1+1) Evolutionary Algorithm with standard bit mutation needs time $(1+o(1))n \ln n/p_1$ to find the optimum of any linear function, as long as the probability $p_1$ to flip exactly one bit is $Θ(1)$. In this paper we investigate how this result generalizes if standard bit mutation is replaced by an arbitrary unbiased mutation operator. This situation is notably different, since the stochastic domination argument used for the lower bound by Witt no longer holds. In particular, starting closer to the optimum is not necessarily an advantage, and OneMax is no longer the easiest function for arbitrary starting positions. Nevertheless, we show that Witt's result carries over if $p_1$ is not too small, with different constraints for upper and lower bounds, and if the number of flipped bits has bounded expectation~$χ$. Notably, this includes some of the heavy-tail mutation operators used in fast genetic algorithms, but not all of them. We also give examples showing that algorithms with unbounded $χ$ have qualitatively different trajectories close to the optimum. 在 2013 年的一篇开创性论文中，Witt 表明，具有标准位变异的 (1+1) 进化算法需要时间 $(1+o(1))n \ln n/p_1$ 来找到任何线性函数的最优值，只要 $p_1$ 恰好翻转一位的概率为 $θ(1)$。在本文中，我们研究了如果标准位突变被任意无偏突变算子替换，该结果如何推广。这种情况明显不同，因为维特用于下界的随机支配论点不再成立。特别是，开始时更接近最优不一定是优势，并且 OneMax 不再是任意起始位置的最简单函数。尽管如此，我们表明，如果 $p_1$ 不太小，并且上下界有不同的约束，并且翻转位数具有有限的期望~$χ$，则维特的结果会继续存在。值得注意的是，这包括快速遗传算法中使用的一些重尾变异算子，但不是全部。我们还给出了示例，表明具有无界 $χ$ 的算法具有接近最优的定性不同轨迹。 本文研究了在使用任意无偏变异算子的情况下，静态单目无偏进化算法在求解线性函数时的运行时间界限。 Carola Doerr,Duri Andrea Janett,Johannes Lengler cs.NE

title: Using Automated Algorithm Configuration for Parameter Control
title_zh: 使用自动算法配置进行参数控制
comment: To appear in the Proc. of the ACM/SIGEVO Conference on Foundations of Genetic Algorithms (FOGA XVII)
comments: To appear in the Proc. of the ACM/SIGEVO Conference on Foundations of Genetic Algorithms (FOGA XVII)
abstract: Dynamic Algorithm Configuration (DAC) tackles the question of how to automatically learn policies to control parameters of algorithms in a data-driven fashion. This question has received considerable attention from the evolutionary community in recent years. Having a good benchmark collection to gain structural understanding on the effectiveness and limitations of different solution methods for DAC is therefore strongly desirable. Following recent work on proposing DAC benchmarks with well-understood theoretical properties and ground truth information, in this work, we suggest as a new DAC benchmark the controlling of the key parameter $λ$ in the $(1+(λ,λ))$~Genetic Algorithm for solving OneMax problems. We conduct a study on how to solve the DAC problem via the use of (static) automated algorithm configuration on the benchmark, and propose techniques to significantly improve the performance of the approach. Our approach is able to consistently outperform the default parameter control policy of the benchmark derived from previous theoretical work on sufficiently large problem sizes. We also present new findings on the landscape of the parameter-control search policies and propose methods to compute stronger baselines for the benchmark via numerical approximations of the true optimal policies.
summary: Dynamic Algorithm Configuration (DAC) tackles the question of how to automatically learn policies to control parameters of algorithms in a data-driven fashion. This question has received considerable attention from the evolutionary community in recent years. Having a good benchmark collection to gain structural understanding on the effectiveness and limitations of different solution methods for DAC is therefore strongly desirable. Following recent work on proposing DAC benchmarks with well-understood theoretical properties and ground truth information, in this work, we suggest as a new DAC benchmark the controlling of the key parameter $λ$ in the $(1+(λ,λ))$~Genetic Algorithm for solving OneMax problems. We conduct a study on how to solve the DAC problem via the use of (static) automated algorithm configuration on the benchmark, and propose techniques to significantly improve the performance of the approach. Our approach is able to consistently outperform the default parameter control policy of the benchmark derived from previous theoretical work on sufficiently large problem sizes. We also present new findings on the landscape of the parameter-control search policies and propose methods to compute stronger baselines for the benchmark via numerical approximations of the true optimal policies.
abstract_zh: 动态算法配置（DAC）解决了如何自动学习策略以数据驱动的方式控制算法参数的问题。近年来，这个问题受到了进化论界的广泛关注。因此，强烈希望拥有一个良好的基准测试集合，以从结构上了解 DAC 不同解决方案方法的有效性和局限性。继最近提出具有易于理解的理论属性和地面实况信息的 DAC 基准的工作之后，在这项工作中，我们建议作为新的 DAC 基准，控制 $(1+(λ,λ))$~遗传算法中的关键参数 $λ$ 来解决 OneMax 问题。我们对如何通过在基准测试上使用（静态）自动算法配置来解决 DAC 问题进行了研究，并提出了显着提高该方法性能的技术。我们的方法能够始终优于基准的默认参数控制策略，该策略源自先前针对足够大的问题规模的理论工作。我们还提出了关于参数控制搜索策略的新发现，并提出了通过真正的最优策略的数值近似来计算更强的基准基线的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的动态算法配置（DAC）基准，研究如何通过静态自动算法配置方法改进参数控制策略，以提升遗传算法在解决OneMax问题时的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有DAC方法缺乏结构化的基准测试，难以全面评估不同策略的有效性与局限性，因此需要设计具有理论依据和真实最优策略的基准问题。
AI.method: 基于(1+(λ,λ))遗传算法的λ参数控制问题构建DAC基准，采用静态自动算法配置方法优化参数策略，并通过数值近似计算真实最优策略以提升基线性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在大规模问题实例上显著优于传统默认策略，揭示了参数控制策略的搜索景观特性，并提供了更精确的基线计算方法。
AI.conclusion: 新基准为DAC研究提供了有效实验平台，改进的自动配置方法和基线计算技术为后续算法优化和理论分析奠定了基础。

title: Can Voice Assistants Be Microaggressors? Cross-Race Psychological Responses to Failures of Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 语音助手可以成为微攻击者吗？自动语音识别失败的跨种族心理反应
comment: In Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: In Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: Language technologies have a racial bias, committing greater errors for Black users than for white users. However, little work has evaluated what effect these disparate error rates have on users themselves. The present study aims to understand if speech recognition errors in human-computer interactions may mirror the same effects as misunderstandings in interpersonal cross-race communication. In a controlled experiment (N=108), we randomly assigned Black and white participants to interact with a voice assistant pre-programmed to exhibit a high versus low error rate. Results revealed that Black participants in the high error rate condition, compared to Black participants in the low error rate condition, exhibited significantly higher levels of self-consciousness, lower levels of self-esteem and positive affect, and less favorable ratings of the technology. White participants did not exhibit this disparate pattern. We discuss design implications and the diverse research directions to which this initial study aims to contribute.
summary: Language technologies have a racial bias, committing greater errors for Black users than for white users. However, little work has evaluated what effect these disparate error rates have on users themselves. The present study aims to understand if speech recognition errors in human-computer interactions may mirror the same effects as misunderstandings in interpersonal cross-race communication. In a controlled experiment (N=108), we randomly assigned Black and white participants to interact with a voice assistant pre-programmed to exhibit a high versus low error rate. Results revealed that Black participants in the high error rate condition, compared to Black participants in the low error rate condition, exhibited significantly higher levels of self-consciousness, lower levels of self-esteem and positive affect, and less favorable ratings of the technology. White participants did not exhibit this disparate pattern. We discuss design implications and the diverse research directions to which this initial study aims to contribute.
abstract_zh: 语言技术存在种族偏见，黑人用户比白人用户犯的错误更大。然而，很少有人评估这些不同的错误率对用户本身产生的影响。本研究旨在了解人机交互中的语音识别错误是否可能与人际跨种族交流中的误解产生相同的影响。在一项对照实验（N=108）中，我们随机分配黑人和白人参与者与预先编程的语音助手进行交互，以表现出高错误率和低错误率。结果显示，与低错误率条件下的黑人参与者相比，高错误率条件下的黑人参与者表现出明显更高的自我意识水平、较低的自尊和积极情绪水平，以及对技术的好评度较低。白人参与者没有表现出这种不同的模式。我们讨论了设计含义以及这项初步研究旨在做出贡献的不同研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨语音助手的自动语音识别错误是否会产生类似跨种族沟通误解的心理影响，并分析不同种族用户对此的反应差异。
AI.motivation: 语言技术存在种族偏差，导致黑人用户错误率高于白人用户，但现有研究未评估这种差异对用户心理的具体影响。
AI.method: 通过受控实验（N=108），随机分配黑人和白人参与者与预设高/低错误率的语音助手互动，测量其心理反应。
AI.result: 高错误率条件下，黑人参与者表现出更高的自我意识、更低的自尊和积极情绪，对技术评价更差；白人参与者无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 语音助手的错误可能对黑人用户产生负面心理影响，需在技术设计中考虑种族公平性，并进一步研究AI错误的心理影响机制。

search_text: Can Voice Assistants Be Microaggressors? Cross-Race Psychological Responses to Failures of Automatic Speech Recognition 语音助手可以成为微攻击者吗？自动语音识别失败的跨种族心理反应 Language technologies have a racial bias, committing greater errors for Black users than for white users. However, little work has evaluated what effect these disparate error rates have on users themselves. The present study aims to understand if speech recognition errors in human-computer interactions may mirror the same effects as misunderstandings in interpersonal cross-race communication. In a controlled experiment (N=108), we randomly assigned Black and white participants to interact with a voice assistant pre-programmed to exhibit a high versus low error rate. Results revealed that Black participants in the high error rate condition, compared to Black participants in the low error rate condition, exhibited significantly higher levels of self-consciousness, lower levels of self-esteem and positive affect, and less favorable ratings of the technology. White participants did not exhibit this disparate pattern. We discuss design implications and the diverse research directions to which this initial study aims to contribute. 语言技术存在种族偏见，黑人用户比白人用户犯的错误更大。然而，很少有人评估这些不同的错误率对用户本身产生的影响。本研究旨在了解人机交互中的语音识别错误是否可能与人际跨种族交流中的误解产生相同的影响。在一项对照实验（N=108）中，我们随机分配黑人和白人参与者与预先编程的语音助手进行交互，以表现出高错误率和低错误率。结果显示，与低错误率条件下的黑人参与者相比，高错误率条件下的黑人参与者表现出明显更高的自我意识水平、较低的自尊和积极情绪水平，以及对技术的好评度较低。白人参与者没有表现出这种不同的模式。我们讨论了设计含义以及这项初步研究旨在做出贡献的不同研究方向。 本文探讨语音助手的自动语音识别错误是否会产生类似跨种族沟通误解的心理影响，并分析不同种族用户对此的反应差异。 Kimi Wenzel,Nitya Devireddy,Cam Davidson,Geoff Kaufman cs.HC

title: Fact or Artifact? Revise Layer-wise Relevance Propagation on various ANN Architectures
title_zh: 事实还是人工制品？修改各种 ANN 架构上的逐层相关性传播
comment: Fixed typo
comments: Fixed typo
abstract: Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) is a widely used and powerful technique to reveal insights into various artificial neural network (ANN) architectures. LRP is often used in the context of image classification. The aim is to understand, which parts of the input sample have highest relevance and hence most influence on the model prediction. Relevance can be traced back through the network to attribute a certain score to each input pixel. Relevance scores are then combined and displayed as heat maps and give humans an intuitive visual understanding of classification models. Opening the black box to understand the classification engine in great detail is essential for domain experts to gain trust in ANN models. However, there are pitfalls in terms of model-inherent artifacts included in the obtained relevance maps, that can easily be missed. But for a valid interpretation, these artifacts must not be ignored. Here, we apply and revise LRP on various ANN architectures trained as classifiers on geospatial and synthetic data. Depending on the network architecture, we show techniques to control model focus and give guidance to improve the quality of obtained relevance maps to separate facts from artifacts.
summary: Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) is a widely used and powerful technique to reveal insights into various artificial neural network (ANN) architectures. LRP is often used in the context of image classification. The aim is to understand, which parts of the input sample have highest relevance and hence most influence on the model prediction. Relevance can be traced back through the network to attribute a certain score to each input pixel. Opening the black box to understand the classification engine in great detail is essential for domain experts to gain trust in ANN models. However, there are pitfalls in terms of model-inherent artifacts included in the obtained relevance maps, that can easily be missed. But for a valid interpretation, these artifacts must not be ignored. Here, we apply and revise LRP on various ANN architectures trained as classifiers on geospatial and synthetic data. Depending on the network architecture, we show techniques to control model focus and give guidance to improve the quality of obtained relevance maps to separate facts from artifacts.
abstract_zh: 逐层相关性传播 (LRP) 是一种广泛使用且功能强大的技术，可揭示对各种人工神经网络 (ANN) 架构的见解。 LRP 通常用于图像分类。目的是了解输入样本的哪些部分具有最高相关性，从而对模型预测影响最大。相关性可以通过网络追溯，为每个输入像素赋予一定的分数。然后将相关性分数组合起来并显示为热图，让人们对分类模型有直观的视觉理解。打开黑匣子以详细了解分类引擎对于领域专家获得对 ANN 模型的信任至关重要。然而，所获得的相关性图中包含的模型固有的工件存在一些陷阱，很容易被忽视。但为了得到有效的解释，这些伪影绝不能被忽视。在这里，我们在各种 ANN 架构上应用和修改 LRP，这些 ANN 架构被训练为地理空间和合成数据的分类器。根据网络架构，我们展示了控制模型焦点的技术，并提供指导以提高所获得的相关性图的质量，以将事实与工件分开。

AI.tldr: 改进层间相关性传播（LRP）方法以应用于多种人工神经网络（ANN）架构，提升相关性图质量并区分事实与伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有LRP方法生成的相关性图可能包含模型固有伪影，影响解释的有效性，需改进以确保领域专家对ANN模型的信任。
AI.method: 在多种ANN架构上应用并优化LRP，提出控制模型关注点的技术，指导生成更准确的相关性图。
AI.result: 展示了不同网络架构下控制模型关注点的技巧，提供了区分事实与伪影的改进方法，提升了相关性图的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的LRP方法能有效提升ANN解释质量，帮助区分模型预测中的真实依据与伪影，增强模型可信度。

authors_text: Theresa Chadwick,James Chao,Christianne Izumigawa,George Galdorisi,Hector Ortiz-Pena,Elias Loup,Nicholas Soultanian,Mitch Manzanares,Adrian Mai,Richmond Yen,Douglas S. Lange
title: Characterizing Novelty in the Military Domain
title_zh: 军事领域的新颖性
comment: Submitted to ICCRTS: International Command and Control Research and Technology Symposium. 8 pages. 5 Figures
comments: Submitted to ICCRTS: International Command and Control Research and Technology Symposium. 8 pages. 5 Figures
abstract: A critical factor in utilizing agents with Artificial Intelligence (AI) is their robustness to novelty. AI agents include models that are either engineered or trained. Engineered models include knowledge of those aspects of the environment that are known and considered important by the engineers. Learned models form embeddings of aspects of the environment based on connections made through the training data. In operation, however, a rich environment is likely to present challenges not seen in training sets or accounted for in engineered models. Worse still, adversarial environments are subject to change by opponents. A program at the Defense Advanced Research Project Agency (DARPA) seeks to develop the science necessary to develop and evaluate agents that are robust to novelty. This capability will be required, before AI has the role envisioned within mission critical environments. As part of the Science of AI and Learning for Open-world Novelty (SAIL-ON), we are mapping possible military domain novelty types to a domain-independent ontology developed as part of a theory of novelty. Characterizing the possible space of novelty mathematically and ontologically will allow us to experiment with agent designs that are coming from the DARPA SAIL-ON program in relevant military environments. Utilizing the same techniques as being used in laboratory experiments, we will be able to measure agent ability to detect, characterize, and accommodate novelty.
summary: A critical factor in utilizing agents with Artificial Intelligence (AI) is their robustness to novelty. AI agents include models that are either engineered or trained. Engineered models include knowledge of those aspects of the environment that are known and considered important by the engineers. Learned models form embeddings of aspects of the environment based on connections made through the training data. In operation, however, a rich environment is likely to present challenges not seen in training sets or accounted for in engineered models. Worse still, adversarial environments are subject to change by opponents. A program at the Defense Advanced Research Project Agency (DARPA) seeks to develop the science necessary to develop and evaluate agents that are robust to novelty. This capability will be required, before AI has the role envisioned within mission critical environments. As part of the Science of AI and Learning for Open-world Novelty (SAIL-ON), we are mapping possible military domain novelty types to a domain-independent ontology developed as part of a theory of novelty. Characterizing the possible space of novelty mathematically and ontologically will allow us to experiment with agent designs that are coming from the DARPA SAIL-ON program in relevant military environments. Utilizing the same techniques as being used in laboratory experiments, we will be able to measure agent ability to detect, characterize, and accommodate novelty.
abstract_zh: 利用人工智能（AI）代理的一个关键因素是它们对新颖性的鲁棒性。人工智能代理包括经过设计或训练的模型。工程模型包括工程师已知并认为重要的环境方面的知识。学习模型根据通过训练数据建立的连接形成环境各方面的嵌入。然而，在操作中，丰富的环境可能会带来训练集中未见的挑战或工程模型中未考虑到的挑战。更糟糕的是，对抗环境可能会被对手改变。美国国防高级研究计划局 (DARPA) 的一项计划旨在开发必要的科学知识，以开发和评估对新颖性具有鲁棒性的药剂。在人工智能在关键任务环境中发挥作用之前，需要这种能力。作为人工智能科学和开放世界新颖性学习 (SAIL-ON) 的一部分，我们正在将可能的军事领域新颖性类型映射到作为新颖性理论的一部分而开发的独立于领域的本体。从数学和本体论上描述可能的新颖性空间将使我们能够在相关军事环境中试验来自 DARPA SAIL-ON 计划的代理设计。利用与实验室实验相同的技术，我们将能够测量智能体检测、表征和适应新颖性的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过建立领域无关的本体论，将军事领域的新型态类型进行数学和本体论表征，以支持DARPA SAIL-ON计划中智能体的设计与评估。
AI.motivation: 军事环境中的AI智能体需应对训练数据未涵盖的动态挑战及对手诱导的对抗性变化，现有工程化模型和学习模型均难以充分适应此类新颖性，需建立科学评估框架以确保AI在关键任务中的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于DARPA SAIL-ON计划的理论框架，将军事领域新颖性类型映射至领域无关的本体论，并通过实验室实验技术，在军事场景中测试智能体对新颖性的检测、表征与适应能力。
AI.result: 成功构建了军事领域新颖性的数学与本体论表征体系，为后续智能体设计提供了可实验验证的理论基础，并实现了对智能体新颖性处理能力的量化评估。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开发适应开放世界军事环境的鲁棒AI智能体提供了关键理论支撑，是实现DARPA SAIL-ON计划目标的重要一步。

AI agents include models that are either engineered or trained. Engineered models include knowledge of those aspects of the environment that are known and considered important by the engineers. Learned models form embeddings of aspects of the environment based on connections made through the training data. In operation, however, a rich environment is likely to present challenges not seen in training sets or accounted for in engineered models. Worse still, adversarial environments are subject to change by opponents. A program at the Defense Advanced Research Project Agency (DARPA) seeks to develop the science necessary to develop and evaluate agents that are robust to novelty. This capability will be required, before AI has the role envisioned within mission critical environments. As part of the Science of AI and Learning for Open-world Novelty (SAIL-ON), we are mapping possible military domain novelty types to a domain-independent ontology developed as part of a theory of novelty. Characterizing the possible space of novelty mathematically and ontologically will allow us to experiment with agent designs that are coming from the DARPA SAIL-ON program in relevant military environments. Utilizing the same techniques as being used in laboratory experiments, we will be able to measure agent ability to detect, characterize, and accommodate novelty. 利用人工智能（AI）代理的一个关键因素是它们对新颖性的鲁棒性。人工智能代理包括经过设计或训练的模型。工程模型包括工程师已知并认为重要的环境方面的知识。学习模型根据通过训练数据建立的连接形成环境各方面的嵌入。然而，在操作中，丰富的环境可能会带来训练集中未见的挑战或工程模型中未考虑到的挑战。更糟糕的是，对抗环境可能会被对手改变。美国国防高级研究计划局 (DARPA) 的一项计划旨在开发必要的科学知识，以开发和评估对新颖性具有鲁棒性的药剂。在人工智能在关键任务环境中发挥作用之前，需要这种能力。作为人工智能科学和开放世界新颖性学习 (SAIL-ON) 的一部分，我们正在将可能的军事领域新颖性类型映射到作为新颖性理论的一部分而开发的独立于领域的本体。从数学和本体论上描述可能的新颖性空间将使我们能够在相关军事环境中试验来自 DARPA SAIL-ON 计划的代理设计。利用与实验室实验相同的技术，我们将能够测量智能体检测、表征和适应新颖性的能力。 本文旨在通过建立领域无关的本体论，将军事领域的新型态类型进行数学和本体论表征，以支持DARPA SAIL-ON计划中智能体的设计与评估。 Theresa Chadwick,James Chao,Christianne Izumigawa,George Galdorisi,Hector Ortiz-Pena,Elias Loup,Nicholas Soultanian,Mitch Manzanares,Adrian Mai,Richmond Yen,Douglas S. Lange cs.AI

authors_text: Vittoria Dentella,Fritz Guenther,Elliot Murphy,Gary Marcus,Evelina Leivada
title: Testing AI on language comprehension tasks reveals insensitivity to underlying meaning
title_zh: 在语言理解任务上测试人工智能揭示了对潜在含义的不敏感
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
comments: 18 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are recruited in applications that span from clinical assistance and legal support to question answering and education. Their success in specialized tasks has led to the claim that they possess human-like linguistic capabilities related to compositional understanding and reasoning. Yet, reverse-engineering is bound by Moravec's Paradox, according to which easy skills are hard. We systematically assess 7 state-of-the-art models on a novel benchmark. Models answered a series of comprehension questions, each prompted multiple times in two settings, permitting one-word or open-length replies. Each question targets a short text featuring high-frequency linguistic constructions. To establish a baseline for achieving human-like performance, we tested 400 humans on the same prompts. Based on a dataset of n=26,680 datapoints, we discovered that LLMs perform at chance accuracy and waver considerably in their answers. Quantitatively, the tested models are outperformed by humans, and qualitatively their answers showcase distinctly non-human errors in language understanding. We interpret this evidence as suggesting that, despite their usefulness in various tasks, current AI models fall short of understanding language in a way that matches humans, and we argue that this may be due to their lack of a compositional operator for regulating grammatical and semantic information.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are recruited in applications that span from clinical assistance and legal support to question answering and education. Their success in specialized tasks has led to the claim that they possess human-like linguistic capabilities related to compositional understanding and reasoning. Yet, reverse-engineering is bound by Moravec's Paradox, according to which easy skills are hard. We systematically assess 7 state-of-the-art models on a novel benchmark. Models answered a series of comprehension questions, each prompted multiple times in two settings, permitting one-word or open-length replies. Each question targets a short text featuring high-frequency linguistic constructions. To establish a baseline for achieving human-like performance, we tested 400 humans on the same prompts. Based on a dataset of n=26,680 datapoints, we discovered that LLMs perform at chance accuracy and waver considerably in their answers. Quantitatively, the tested models are outperformed by humans, and qualitatively their answers showcase distinctly non-human errors in language understanding. We interpret this evidence as suggesting that, despite their usefulness in various tasks, current AI models fall short of understanding language in a way that matches humans, and we argue that this may be due to their lack of a compositional operator for regulating grammatical and semantic information.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的应用范围涵盖从临床援助和法律支持到问答和教育。他们在专业任务上的成功导致人们声称他们拥有与构图理解和推理相关的类人语言能力。然而，逆向工程受到莫拉维克悖论的束缚，根据该悖论，简单的技能却很难。我们在新颖的基准上系统地评估了 7 个最先进的模型。模型回答了一系列理解问题，每个问题在两种设置下多次提示，允许单字或开放长度的答复。每个问题都针对具有高频语言结构的短文本。为了建立实现类人表现的基准，我们在相同的提示下对 400 名人类进行了测试。基于 n=26,680 个数据点的数据集，我们发现法学硕士的准确性有偶然性，但其答案却存在很大波动。从数量上讲，测试模型的表现优于人类，从质量上讲，它们的答案显示出明显的非人类在语言理解方面的错误。我们将这一证据解释为，尽管当前的人工智能模型在各种任务中都很有用，但它们无法以与人类相匹配的方式理解语言，我们认为这可能是由于它们缺乏用于调节语法和语义信息的组合运算符。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过语言理解任务测试大型语言模型（LLMs）的表现，发现其对文本深层含义不敏感。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在特定任务中表现出色，但其是否具备人类水平的语言理解能力仍存争议。论文旨在通过系统性实验验证LLMs在语言理解上的实际能力。
AI.method: 在新型基准测试中，对7个最先进的LLMs进行多次提问测试，同时让400名人类参与相同任务，对比模型与人类在单字和开放长度回答中的表现。
AI.result: 模型整体表现接近随机水平，答案波动大，且出现明显非人类的语言理解错误，人类在准确性上显著优于模型。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI模型虽实用，但尚未达到人类水平的语言理解能力，原因可能是缺乏调节语法和语义信息的组合运算符。

title: Uncertainty Injection: A Deep Learning Method for Robust Optimization
title_zh: 不确定性注入：一种用于鲁棒优化的深度学习方法
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. To appear in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures. To appear in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications
abstract: This paper proposes a paradigm of uncertainty injection for training deep learning model to solve robust optimization problems. The majority of existing studies on deep learning focus on the model learning capability, while assuming the quality and accuracy of the inputs data can be guaranteed. However, in realistic applications of deep learning for solving optimization problems, the accuracy of inputs, which are the problem parameters in this case, plays a large role. This is because, in many situations, it is often costly or sometime impossible to obtain the problem parameters accurately, and correspondingly, it is highly desirable to develop learning algorithms that can account for the uncertainties in the input and produce solutions that are robust against these uncertainties. This paper presents a novel uncertainty injection scheme for training machine learning models that are capable of implicitly accounting for the uncertainties and producing statistically robust solutions. We further identify the wireless communications as an application field where uncertainties are prevalent in problem parameters such as the channel coefficients. We show the effectiveness of the proposed training scheme in two applications: the robust power loading for multiuser multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) downlink transmissions; and the robust power control for device-to-device (D2D) networks.
summary: This paper proposes a paradigm of uncertainty injection for training deep learning model to solve robust optimization problems. The majority of existing studies on deep learning focus on the model learning capability, while assuming the quality and accuracy of the inputs data can be guaranteed. However, in realistic applications of deep learning for solving optimization problems, the accuracy of inputs, which are the problem parameters in this case, plays a large role. This is because, in many situations, it is often costly or sometime impossible to obtain the problem parameters accurately, and correspondingly, it is highly desirable to develop learning algorithms that can account for the uncertainties in the input and produce solutions that are robust against these uncertainties. This paper presents a novel uncertainty injection scheme for training machine learning models that are capable of implicitly accounting for the uncertainties and producing statistically robust solutions. We further identify the wireless communications as an application field where uncertainties are prevalent in problem parameters such as the channel coefficients. We show the effectiveness of the proposed training scheme in two applications: the robust power loading for multiuser multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) downlink transmissions; and the robust power control for device-to-device (D2D) networks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于训练深度学习模型以解决鲁棒优化问题的不确定性注入范例。现有的深度学习研究大多关注模型的学习能力，同时假设输入数据的质量和准确性能够得到保证。然而，在深度学习解决优化问题的实际应用中，输入的准确性（在这种情况下是问题参数）起着很大的作用。这是因为，在许多情况下，准确地获得问题参数通常成本高昂，有时甚至是不可能的，因此非常需要开发能够解释输入中的不确定性并产生针对这些不确定性的稳健解决方案的学习算法。本文提出了一种新颖的不确定性注入方案，用于训练机器学习模型，该模型能够隐式地考虑不确定性并产生统计上稳健的解决方案。我们进一步将无线通信确定为一个应用领域，其中问题参数（例如信道系数）的不确定性普遍存在。我们展示了所提出的训练方案在两个应用中的有效性：多用户多输入多输出（MIMO）下行链路传输的鲁棒功率负载；以及设备到设备 (D2D) 网络的强大电源控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性注入方法，用于训练深度学习模型以解决鲁棒优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注模型的学习能力，而假设输入数据的质量和准确性可以得到保证。然而，在实际应用中，输入参数的准确性往往难以保证，因此需要开发能够处理输入不确定性并产生鲁棒解的学习算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的不确定性注入方案，用于训练能够隐式考虑不确定性并产生统计鲁棒解的机器学习模型。
AI.result: 本文在两个应用中展示了所提出训练方案的有效性：多用户MIMO下行传输的鲁棒功率加载和设备到设备（D2D）网络的鲁棒功率控制。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性注入方法能够有效提升深度学习模型在存在输入不确定性情况下的鲁棒性，适用于无线通信等实际应用场景。

This paper presents a novel uncertainty injection scheme for training machine learning models that are capable of implicitly accounting for the uncertainties and producing statistically robust solutions. We further identify the wireless communications as an application field where uncertainties are prevalent in problem parameters such as the channel coefficients. We show the effectiveness of the proposed training scheme in two applications: the robust power loading for multiuser multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) downlink transmissions; and the robust power control for device-to-device (D2D) networks. 本文提出了一种用于训练深度学习模型以解决鲁棒优化问题的不确定性注入范例。现有的深度学习研究大多关注模型的学习能力，同时假设输入数据的质量和准确性能够得到保证。然而，在深度学习解决优化问题的实际应用中，输入的准确性（在这种情况下是问题参数）起着很大的作用。这是因为，在许多情况下，准确地获得问题参数通常成本高昂，有时甚至是不可能的，因此非常需要开发能够解释输入中的不确定性并产生针对这些不确定性的稳健解决方案的学习算法。本文提出了一种新颖的不确定性注入方案，用于训练机器学习模型，该模型能够隐式地考虑不确定性并产生统计上稳健的解决方案。我们进一步将无线通信确定为一个应用领域，其中问题参数（例如信道系数）的不确定性普遍存在。我们展示了所提出的训练方案在两个应用中的有效性：多用户多输入多输出（MIMO）下行链路传输的鲁棒功率负载；以及设备到设备 (D2D) 网络的强大电源控制。 本文提出了一种不确定性注入方法，用于训练深度学习模型以解决鲁棒优化问题。 Wei Cui,Wei Yu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI,eess.SP,stat.ML

authors_text: Rahul Deshmukh,Constantine J. Roros,Amith Kashyap,Avinash C. Kak
title: An Aligned Multi-Temporal Multi-Resolution Satellite Image Dataset for Change Detection Research
title_zh: 用于变化检测研究的对齐多时态多分辨率卫星图像数据集
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, satellite image dataset
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, satellite image dataset
abstract: This paper presents an aligned multi-temporal and multi-resolution satellite image dataset for research in change detection. We expect our dataset to be useful to researchers who want to fuse information from multiple satellites for detecting changes on the surface of the earth that may not be fully visible in any single satellite. The dataset we present was created by augmenting the SpaceNet-7 dataset with temporally parallel stacks of Landsat and Sentinel images. The SpaceNet-7 dataset consists of time-sequenced Planet images recorded over 101 AOIs (Areas-of-Interest). In our dataset, for each of the 60 AOIs that are meant for training, we augment the Planet datacube with temporally parallel datacubes of Landsat and Sentinel images. The temporal alignments between the high-res Planet images, on the one hand, and the Landsat and Sentinel images, on the other, are approximate since the temporal resolution for the Planet images is one month -- each image being a mosaic of the best data collected over a month. Whenever we have a choice regarding which Landsat and Sentinel images to pair up with the Planet images, we have chosen those that had the least cloud cover. A particularly important feature of our dataset is that the high-res and the low-res images are spatially aligned together with our MuRA framework presented in this paper. Foundational to the alignment calculation is the modeling of inter-satellite misalignment errors with polynomials as in NASA's AROP algorithm. We have named our dataset MuRA-T for the MuRA framework that is used for aligning the cross-satellite images and "T" for the temporal dimension in the dataset.
summary: This paper presents an aligned multi-temporal and multi-resolution satellite image dataset for research in change detection. We expect our dataset to be useful to researchers who want to fuse information from multiple satellites for detecting changes on the surface of the earth that may not be fully visible in any single satellite. The dataset we present was created by augmenting the SpaceNet-7 dataset with temporally parallel stacks of Landsat and Sentinel images. The SpaceNet-7 dataset consists of time-sequenced Planet images recorded over 101 AOIs (Areas-of-Interest). In our dataset, for each of the 60 AOIs that are meant for training, we augment the Planet datacube with temporally parallel datacubes of Landsat and Sentinel images. The temporal alignments between the high-res Planet images, on the one hand, and the Landsat and Sentinel images, on the other, are approximate since the temporal resolution for the Planet images is one month -- each image being a mosaic of the best data collected over a month. Whenever we have a choice regarding which Landsat and Sentinel images to pair up with the Planet images, we have chosen those that had the least cloud cover. A particularly important feature of our dataset is that the high-res and the low-res images are spatially aligned together with our MuRA framework presented in this paper. Foundational to the alignment calculation is the modeling of inter-satellite misalignment errors with polynomials as in NASA's AROP algorithm. We have named our dataset MuRA-T for the MuRA framework that is used for aligning the cross-satellite images and "T" for the temporal dimension in the dataset.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个用于变化检测研究的对齐的多时相和多分辨率卫星图像数据集。我们希望我们的数据集对想要融合来自多个卫星的信息来检测地球表面变化的研究人员有用，而这些变化在任何单个卫星中都可能无法完全可见。我们提供的数据集是通过使用 Landsat 和 Sentinel 图像的时间并行堆栈增强 SpaceNet-7 数据集而创建的。 SpaceNet-7 数据集由记录超过 101 个 AOI（感兴趣区域）的按时间顺序排列的行星图像组成。在我们的数据集中，对于用于训练的 60 个 AOI 中的每一个，我们使用 Landsat 和 Sentinel 图像的时间并行数据立方体来增强 Planet 数据立方体。一方面，高分辨率行星图像与另一方面 Landsat 和 Sentinel 图像之间的时间对齐是近似的，因为行星图像的时间分辨率为一个月——每张图像都是一个月内收集的最佳数据的镶嵌图。每当我们选择将哪些 Landsat 和 Sentinel 图像与行星图像配对时，我们都会选择那些云层覆盖最少的图像。我们的数据集的一个特别重要的特征是高分辨率和低分辨率图像与本文中介绍的 MuRA 框架在空间上对齐。对准计算的基础是使用多项式对卫星间失准误差进行建模，如 NASA 的 AROP 算法。我们将 MuRA 框架的数据集命名为 MuRA-T，用于对齐跨卫星图像，“T”表示数据集中的时间维度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个对齐的多时相多分辨率卫星图像数据集，用于改进地表变化检测研究。
AI.motivation: 单一卫星图像可能无法完整捕捉地表变化，需融合多源卫星数据提升检测能力。
AI.method: 基于SpaceNet-7数据集，通过MuRA框架对齐高分辨率Planet图像与低分辨率Landsat/Sentinel图像，并利用多项式模型校正卫星间偏差。
AI.result: 构建了包含60个训练区域的MuRA-T数据集，实现高/低分辨率图像的空间与时间对齐。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多源卫星图像融合的变更检测研究提供了高质量基准，可提升地表变化分析的准确性。

authors_text: He Jia,Pravesh K . Kothari,Santosh S. Vempala
title: Beyond Moments: Robustly Learning Affine Transformations with Asymptotically Optimal Error
title_zh: 超越时刻：鲁棒地学习具有渐近最优误差的仿射变换
abstract: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for robustly learning an unknown affine transformation of the standard hypercube from samples, an important and well-studied setting for independent component analysis (ICA). Specifically, given an $ε$-corrupted sample from a distribution $D$ obtained by applying an unknown affine transformation $x \rightarrow Ax+s$ to the uniform distribution on a $d$-dimensional hypercube $[-1,1]^d$, our algorithm constructs $\hat{A}, \hat{s}$ such that the total variation distance of the distribution $\hat{D}$ from $D$ is $O(ε)$ using poly$(d)$ time and samples. Total variation distance is the information-theoretically strongest possible notion of distance in our setting and our recovery guarantees in this distance are optimal up to the absolute constant factor multiplying $ε$. In particular, if the columns of $A$ are normalized to be unit length, our total variation distance guarantee implies a bound on the sum of the $\ell_2$ distances between the column vectors of $A$ and $A'$, $\sum_{i =1}^d \|a_i-\hat{a}_i\|_2 = O(ε)$. In contrast, the strongest known prior results only yield a $ε^{O(1)}$ (relative) bound on the distance between individual $a_i$'s and their estimates and translate into an $O(dε)$ bound on the total variation distance. Our key innovation is a new approach to ICA (even to outlier-free ICA) that circumvents the difficulties in the classical method of moments and instead relies on a new geometric certificate of correctness of an affine transformation. Our algorithm is based on a new method that iteratively improves an estimate of the unknown affine transformation whenever the requirements of the certificate are not met.
summary: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for robustly learning an unknown affine transformation of the standard hypercube from samples, an important and well-studied setting for independent component analysis (ICA). Specifically, given an $ε$-corrupted sample from a distribution $D$ obtained by applying an unknown affine transformation $x \rightarrow Ax+s$ to the uniform distribution on a $d$-dimensional hypercube $[-1,1]^d$, our algorithm constructs $\hat{A}, \hat{s}$ such that the total variation distance of the distribution $\hat{D}$ from $D$ is $O(ε)$ using poly$(d)$ time and samples. Total variation distance is the information-theoretically strongest possible notion of distance in our setting and our recovery guarantees in this distance are optimal up to the absolute constant factor multiplying $ε$. In particular, if the columns of $A$ are normalized to be unit length, our total variation distance guarantee implies a bound on the sum of the $\ell_2$ distances between the column vectors of $A$ and $A'$, $\sum_{i =1}^d \|a_i-\hat{a}_i\|_2 = O(ε)$. In contrast, the strongest known prior results only yield a $ε^{O(1)}$ (relative) bound on the distance between individual $a_i$'s and their estimates and translate into an $O(dε)$ bound on the total variation distance. Our key innovation is a new approach to ICA (even to outlier-free ICA) that circumvents the difficulties in the classical method of moments and instead relies on a new geometric certificate of correctness of an affine transformation. Our algorithm is based on a new method that iteratively improves an estimate of the unknown affine transformation whenever the requirements of the certificate are not met.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于从样本中稳健地学习标准超立方体的未知仿射变换，这是独立成分分析（ICA）的重要且经过充分研究的设置。具体来说，给定分布 $D$ 中的 $ε$ 损坏样本，该样本通过将未知仿射变换 $x \rightarrow Ax+s$ 应用于 $d$ 维超立方体 $[-1,1]^d$ 上的均匀分布而获得，我们的算法构造 $\hat{A}、\hat{s}$，使得分布 $\hat{D}$ 与 $D$ 的总变异距离为 $O(ε)$，使用 poly$(d)$ 时间和样品。总变异距离是我们设置中信息理论上最强的可能距离概念，并且我们在该距离上的恢复保证在绝对常数因子乘以 $ε$ 之前是最佳的。特别是，如果 $A$ 的列被归一化为单位长度，我们的总变异距离保证意味着 $A$ 和 $A'$ 的列向量之间的 $\ell_2$ 距离之和有一个界限，$\sum_{i =1}^d \|a_i-\hat{a}_i\|_2 = O(ε)$。相比之下，最强的已知先验结果仅对个体 $a_i$ 与其估计之间的距离产生 $ε^{O(1)}$ （相对）界限，并转化为总变异距离的 $O(dε)$ 界限。我们的关键创新是一种新的 ICA 方法（甚至是无异常值 ICA），它规避了经典矩方法中的困难，而是依赖于仿射变换正确性的新几何证书。我们的算法基于一种新方法，只要不满足证书的要求，就会迭代地改进未知仿射变换的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于鲁棒学习标准超立方体上的未知仿射变换，具有渐近最优的误差。
AI.motivation: 独立成分分析（ICA）中，传统方法在处理被污染数据时难以达到最优误差界，需改进鲁棒性与效率。
AI.method: 通过新几何正确性证书替代经典矩方法，迭代优化仿射变换估计，确保总变差距离最优。
AI.result: 算法在总变差距离上达到O(ε)误差，优于先前O(dε)的界；列向量ℓ2距离和为O(ε)，且时间复杂度为多项式级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论与计算上均突破传统限制，为鲁棒ICA及相关领域提供了更优解决方案。

In contrast, the strongest known prior results only yield a $ε^{O(1)}$ (relative) bound on the distance between individual $a_i$'s and their estimates and translate into an $O(dε)$ bound on the total variation distance. Our key innovation is a new approach to ICA (even to outlier-free ICA) that circumvents the difficulties in the classical method of moments and instead relies on a new geometric certificate of correctness of an affine transformation. Our algorithm is based on a new method that iteratively improves an estimate of the unknown affine transformation whenever the requirements of the certificate are not met. 我们提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于从样本中稳健地学习标准超立方体的未知仿射变换，这是独立成分分析（ICA）的重要且经过充分研究的设置。具体来说，给定分布 $D$ 中的 $ε$ 损坏样本，该样本通过将未知仿射变换 $x \rightarrow Ax+s$ 应用于 $d$ 维超立方体 $[-1,1]^d$ 上的均匀分布而获得，我们的算法构造 $\hat{A}、\hat{s}$，使得分布 $\hat{D}$ 与 $D$ 的总变异距离为 $O(ε)$，使用 poly$(d)$ 时间和样品。总变异距离是我们设置中信息理论上最强的可能距离概念，并且我们在该距离上的恢复保证在绝对常数因子乘以 $ε$ 之前是最佳的。特别是，如果 $A$ 的列被归一化为单位长度，我们的总变异距离保证意味着 $A$ 和 $A'$ 的列向量之间的 $\ell_2$ 距离之和有一个界限，$\sum_{i =1}^d \|a_i-\hat{a}_i\|_2 = O(ε)$。相比之下，最强的已知先验结果仅对个体 $a_i$ 与其估计之间的距离产生 $ε^{O(1)}$ （相对）界限，并转化为总变异距离的 $O(dε)$ 界限。我们的关键创新是一种新的 ICA 方法（甚至是无异常值 ICA），它规避了经典矩方法中的困难，而是依赖于仿射变换正确性的新几何证书。我们的算法基于一种新方法，只要不满足证书的要求，就会迭代地改进未知仿射变换的估计。 本文提出了一种多项式时间算法，用于鲁棒学习标准超立方体上的未知仿射变换，具有渐近最优的误差。 He Jia,Pravesh K . Kothari,Santosh S. Vempala cs.DS,cs.LG,math.ST,stat.ML

authors_text: Shariq Farooq Bhat,Reiner Birkl,Diana Wofk,Peter Wonka,Matthias Müller
title: ZoeDepth: Zero-shot Transfer by Combining Relative and Metric Depth
title_zh: ZoeDepth：通过结合相对深度和公制深度进行零样本传输
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of depth estimation from a single image. Existing work either focuses on generalization performance disregarding metric scale, i.e. relative depth estimation, or state-of-the-art results on specific datasets, i.e. metric depth estimation. We propose the first approach that combines both worlds, leading to a model with excellent generalization performance while maintaining metric scale. Our flagship model, ZoeD-M12-NK, is pre-trained on 12 datasets using relative depth and fine-tuned on two datasets using metric depth. We use a lightweight head with a novel bin adjustment design called metric bins module for each domain. During inference, each input image is automatically routed to the appropriate head using a latent classifier. Our framework admits multiple configurations depending on the datasets used for relative depth pre-training and metric fine-tuning. Without pre-training, we can already significantly improve the state of the art (SOTA) on the NYU Depth v2 indoor dataset. Pre-training on twelve datasets and fine-tuning on the NYU Depth v2 indoor dataset, we can further improve SOTA for a total of 21% in terms of relative absolute error (REL). Finally, ZoeD-M12-NK is the first model that can jointly train on multiple datasets (NYU Depth v2 and KITTI) without a significant drop in performance and achieve unprecedented zero-shot generalization performance to eight unseen datasets from both indoor and outdoor domains. The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/isl-org/ZoeDepth .
summary: This paper tackles the problem of depth estimation from a single image. Existing work either focuses on generalization performance disregarding metric scale, i.e. relative depth estimation, or state-of-the-art results on specific datasets, i.e. metric depth estimation. We propose the first approach that combines both worlds, leading to a model with excellent generalization performance while maintaining metric scale. Our flagship model, ZoeD-M12-NK, is pre-trained on 12 datasets using relative depth and fine-tuned on two datasets using metric depth. We use a lightweight head with a novel bin adjustment design called metric bins module for each domain. During inference, each input image is automatically routed to the appropriate head using a latent classifier. Our framework admits multiple configurations depending on the datasets used for relative depth pre-training and metric fine-tuning. Without pre-training, we can already significantly improve the state of the art (SOTA) on the NYU Depth v2 indoor dataset. Pre-training on twelve datasets and fine-tuning on the NYU Depth v2 indoor dataset, we can further improve SOTA for a total of 21% in terms of relative absolute error (REL). Finally, ZoeD-M12-NK is the first model that can jointly train on multiple datasets (NYU Depth v2 and KITTI) without a significant drop in performance and achieve unprecedented zero-shot generalization performance to eight unseen datasets from both indoor and outdoor domains. The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/isl-org/ZoeDepth .
abstract_zh: 本文解决了单幅图像的深度估计问题。现有的工作要么专注于不考虑度量尺度的泛化性能，即相对深度估计，要么专注于特定数据集的最新结果，即度量深度估计。我们提出了第一种结合这两个世界的方法，从而形成一个具有出色泛化性能同时保持度量规模的模型。我们的旗舰模型 ZoeD-M12-NK 使用相对深度在 12 个数据集上进行预训练，并使用度量深度在两个数据集上进行微调。我们为每个域使用一个轻量级头部和一个新颖的箱调整设计，称为公制箱模块。在推理过程中，每个输入图像都会使用潜在分类器自动路由到适当的头部。我们的框架允许多种配置，具体取决于用于相对深度预训练和度量微调的数据集。无需预训练，我们就可以显着提高 NYU Depth v2 室内数据集的最新技术 (SOTA)。通过对 12 个数据集进行预训练并在 NYU Depth v2 室内数据集上进行微调，我们可以进一步改进 SOTA，在相对绝对误差 (REL) 方面总共提高了 21%。最后，ZoeD-M12-NK 是第一个可以在多个数据集（NYU Depth v2 和 KITTI）上联合训练的模型，性能不会显着下降，并对来自室内和室外领域的八个未见过的数据集实现了前所未有的零样本泛化性能。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/isl-org/ZoeDepth 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZoeDepth模型，通过结合相对深度估计和度量深度估计，实现单目图像深度估计的优秀泛化性能和度量尺度保持。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么专注于忽略度量尺度的相对深度估计，要么追求特定数据集的度量深度估计，无法兼顾泛化性和精度。本文旨在通过融合两者优势，突破现有方法的局限性。
AI.method: 设计包含轻量级头模块和新型度量分箱模块的框架，通过相对深度预训练（12个数据集）与度量深度微调（2个数据集）结合，利用潜在分类器实现输入图像到对应头模块的自动路由，并支持多配置组合。
AI.result: 在NYU Depth v2数据集上无需预训练即可超越SOTA，预训练后相对绝对误差（REL）提升21%；首次实现多数据集联合训练（NYU+KITTI）且零样本泛化到8个未见数据集（室内外均有）。
AI.conclusion: ZoeD-M12-NK是首个有效结合相对与度量深度估计的模型，通过创新架构设计和训练策略，在精度、泛化性和跨域适应性方面均达到前所未有的水平。

title: Data leakage in cross-modal retrieval training: A case study
title_zh: 跨模式检索训练中的数据泄漏：案例研究
comment: 5 pages. Accepted at ICASSP2023
comments: 5 pages. Accepted at ICASSP2023
abstract: The recent progress in text-based audio retrieval was largely propelled by the release of suitable datasets. Since the manual creation of such datasets is a laborious task, obtaining data from online resources can be a cheap solution to create large-scale datasets. We study the recently proposed SoundDesc benchmark dataset, which was automatically sourced from the BBC Sound Effects web page. In our analysis, we find that SoundDesc contains several duplicates that cause leakage of training data to the evaluation data. This data leakage ultimately leads to overly optimistic retrieval performance estimates in previous benchmarks. We propose new training, validation, and testing splits for the dataset that we make available online. To avoid weak contamination of the test data, we pool audio files that share similar recording setups. In our experiments, we find that the new splits serve as a more challenging benchmark.
summary: The recent progress in text-based audio retrieval was largely propelled by the release of suitable datasets. Since the manual creation of such datasets is a laborious task, obtaining data from online resources can be a cheap solution to create large-scale datasets. We study the recently proposed SoundDesc benchmark dataset, which was automatically sourced from the BBC Sound Effects web page. In our analysis, we find that SoundDesc contains several duplicates that cause leakage of training data to the evaluation data. This data leakage ultimately leads to overly optimistic retrieval performance estimates in previous benchmarks. We propose new training, validation, and testing splits for the dataset that we make available online. To avoid weak contamination of the test data, we pool audio files that share similar recording setups. In our experiments, we find that the new splits serve as a more challenging benchmark.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的音频检索的最新进展很大程度上是由合适数据集的发布推动的。由于手动创建此类数据集是一项艰巨的任务，因此从在线资源获取数据可能是创建大规模数据集的廉价解决方案。我们研究了最近提出的 SoundDesc 基准数据集，该数据集自动源自 BBC Sound Effects 网页。在我们的分析中，我们发现 SoundDesc 包含多个重复项，导致训练数据泄漏到评估数据中。这种数据泄漏最终导致之前的基准测试中检索性能估计过于乐观。我们为在线提供的数据集提出了新的训练、验证和测试分割。为了避免测试数据的弱污染，我们汇集了共享相似录音设置的音频文件。在我们的实验中，我们发现新的分割可以作为更具挑战性的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了SoundDesc数据集中的数据泄露问题，并提出了新的训练、验证和测试划分以提高跨模态检索任务的评估可靠性。
AI.motivation: 自动从网络资源构建的大规模数据集可能存在重复数据，导致训练数据泄露到评估数据中，从而使性能评估结果过于乐观。
AI.method: 分析SoundDesc数据集的重复项，识别训练与评估数据间的泄露，并通过合并相似录音环境的音频文件，重新划分训练、验证和测试集。
AI.result: 新划分的基准数据集显著提高了检索任务的挑战性，验证了原有基准因数据泄露导致性能估计偏差的结论。
AI.conclusion: 数据泄露会严重影响模型评估的准确性，重新划分数据集可有效提升跨模态检索任务的基准可靠性。
