search_text: A Neural Span-Based Continual Named Entity Recognition Model 基于神经跨度的连续命名实体识别模型 Named Entity Recognition (NER) models capable of Continual Learning (CL) are realistically valuable in areas where entity types continuously increase (e.g., personal assistants). Meanwhile the learning paradigm of NER advances to new patterns such as the span-based methods. However, its potential to CL has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose SpanKL, a simple yet effective Span-based model with Knowledge distillation (KD) to preserve memories and multi-Label prediction to prevent conflicts in CL-NER. Unlike prior sequence labeling approaches, the inherently independent modeling in span and entity level with the designed coherent optimization on SpanKL promotes its learning at each incremental step and mitigates the forgetting. Experiments on synthetic CL datasets derived from OntoNotes and Few-NERD show that SpanKL significantly outperforms previous SoTA in many aspects, and obtains the smallest gap from CL to the upper bound revealing its high practiced value. The code is available at https://github.com/Qznan/SpanKL. 能够持续学习（CL）的命名实体识别（NER）模型在实体类型不断增加的领域（例如个人助理）具有现实价值。与此同时，NER 的学习范式也发展到了新的模式，例如基于跨度的方法。然而，其在 CL 方面的潜力尚未得到充分开发。在本文中，我们提出了 SpanKL，这是一种简单而有效的基于 Span 的模型，具有知识蒸馏（KD）来保留记忆和多标签预测以防止 CL-NER 中的冲突。与之前的序列标记方法不同，跨度和实体级别的固有独立建模以及 SpanKL 上设计的连贯优化促进了其在每个增量步骤的学习并减少了遗忘。在 OntoNotes 和 Few-NERD 的合成 CL 数据集上进行的实验表明，SpanKL 在许多方面都显着优于之前的 SoTA，并且获得了从 CL 到上限的最小差距，揭示了其较高的实践价值。该代码可在 https://github.com/Qznan/SpanKL 获取。 本文提出SpanKL模型，结合知识蒸馏和多标签预测，解决持续学习中的命名实体识别问题。 Yunan Zhang,Qingcai Chen cs.CL,cs.AI

title: CP+: Camera Poses Augmentation with Large-scale LiDAR Maps
title_zh: CP+：通过大型 LiDAR 地图进行相机姿态增强
abstract: Large-scale colored point clouds have many advantages in navigation or scene display. Relying on cameras and LiDARs, which are now widely used in reconstruction tasks, it is possible to obtain such colored point clouds. However, the information from these two kinds of sensors is not well fused in many existing frameworks, resulting in poor colorization results, thus resulting in inaccurate camera poses and damaged point colorization results. We propose a novel framework called Camera Pose Augmentation (CP+) to improve the camera poses and align them directly with the LiDAR-based point cloud. Initial coarse camera poses are given by LiDAR-Inertial or LiDAR-Inertial-Visual Odometry with approximate extrinsic parameters and time synchronization. The key steps to improve the alignment of the images consist of selecting a point cloud corresponding to a region of interest in each camera view, extracting reliable edge features from this point cloud, and deriving 2D-3D line correspondences which are used towards iterative minimization of the re-projection error.
summary: Large-scale colored point clouds have many advantages in navigation or scene display. Relying on cameras and LiDARs, which are now widely used in reconstruction tasks, it is possible to obtain such colored point clouds. However, the information from these two kinds of sensors is not well fused in many existing frameworks, resulting in poor colorization results, thus resulting in inaccurate camera poses and damaged point colorization results. We propose a novel framework called Camera Pose Augmentation (CP+) to improve the camera poses and align them directly with the LiDAR-based point cloud. Initial coarse camera poses are given by LiDAR-Inertial or LiDAR-Inertial-Visual Odometry with approximate extrinsic parameters and time synchronization. The key steps to improve the alignment of the images consist of selecting a point cloud corresponding to a region of interest in each camera view, extracting reliable edge features from this point cloud, and deriving 2D-3D line correspondences which are used towards iterative minimization of the re-projection error.
abstract_zh: 大规模彩色点云在导航或场景显示方面具有许多优势。依靠现在广泛应用于重建任务的相机和激光雷达，可以获得这样的彩色点云。然而，来自这两种传感器的信息在许多现有框架中没有很好地融合，导致着色结果较差，从而导致相机位姿不准确和点着色结果损坏。我们提出了一种称为相机姿态增强（CP+）的新颖框架来改善相机姿态并将其直接与基于激光雷达的点云对齐。初始粗相机位姿由 LiDAR 惯性或 LiDAR 惯性视觉里程计给出，具有近似的外在参数和时间同步。改善图像对齐的关键步骤包括选择与每个摄像机视图中的感兴趣区域相对应的点云，从该点云中提取可靠的边缘特征，以及导出用于迭代最小化重投影误差的 2D-3D 线对应关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CP+的新型框架，通过利用大规模LiDAR地图增强相机位姿，以改善点云颜色化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有框架未能有效融合相机与LiDAR传感器信息，导致颜色化结果不准确且相机位姿存在偏差。
AI.method: 通过LiDAR惯性或视觉里程计获取初始粗略位姿，选取相机视角的兴趣区域点云，提取可靠边缘特征并建立2D-3D线对应关系，迭代优化重投影误差。
AI.result: 显著提升了相机位姿精度，实现了与LiDAR点云的直接对齐，改善了点云颜色化质量。
AI.conclusion: CP+通过优化多传感器数据融合流程，有效解决了相机与LiDAR地图对齐问题，为高精度场景重建提供了新方法。

title: Efficiently handling constraints with Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm
title_zh: 使用 Metropolis 调整的 Langevin 算法有效处理约束
comment: We find some error in the proof of Theorem 2 and the associated result may not be correct
comments: We find some error in the proof of Theorem 2 and the associated result may not be correct
abstract: In this study, we investigate the performance of the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm in a setting with constraints on the support of the target distribution. We provide a rigorous analysis of the resulting Markov chain, establishing its convergence and deriving an upper bound for its mixing time. Our results demonstrate that the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm is highly effective in handling this challenging situation: the mixing time bound we obtain is superior to the best known bounds for competing algorithms without an accept-reject step. Our numerical experiments support these theoretical findings, indicating that the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm shows promising performance when dealing with constraints on the support of the target distribution.
summary: In this study, we investigate the performance of the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm in a setting with constraints on the support of the target distribution. We provide a rigorous analysis of the resulting Markov chain, establishing its convergence and deriving an upper bound for its mixing time. Our results demonstrate that the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm is highly effective in handling this challenging situation: the mixing time bound we obtain is superior to the best known bounds for competing algorithms without an accept-reject step. Our numerical experiments support these theoretical findings, indicating that the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm shows promising performance when dealing with constraints on the support of the target distribution.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们研究了 Metropolis 调整的 Langevin 算法在目标分布支持受限的设置中的性能。我们对所得马尔可夫链进行严格分析，建立其收敛性并推导其混合时间的上限。我们的结果表明，Metropolis 调整后的 Langevin 算法在处理这种具有挑战性的情况方面非常有效：我们获得的混合时间界限优于没有接受-拒绝步骤的竞争算法的最著名界限。我们的数值实验支持这些理论发现，表明 Metropolis 调整的 Langevin 算法在处理目标分布支持的约束时表现出良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文分析Metropolis调整的朗之万算法在目标分布支持存在约束时的性能，建立其收敛性并推导混合时间上界。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理目标分布支持约束时可能存在效率不足，需验证Metropolis调整的朗之万算法是否能更高效应对此类挑战。
AI.method: 通过严格分析马尔可夫链收敛性，推导混合时间上界，并结合数值实验验证理论结果。
AI.result: 该算法混合时间界优于无接受-拒绝步骤的竞争算法，数值实验验证了其处理约束条件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Metropolis调整的朗之万算法在约束条件下表现优异，理论与实验均支持其高效性。

authors_text: Md Awsafur Rahman,Bishmoy Paul,Najibul Haque Sarker,Zaber Ibn Abdul Hakim,Shaikh Anowarul Fattah
title: ArtiFact: A Large-Scale Dataset with Artificial and Factual Images for Generalizable and Robust Synthetic Image Detection
title_zh: ArtiFact：具有人工和事实图像的大规模数据集，用于通用且鲁棒的合成图像检测
comment: Figures High-Res
comments: Figures High-Res
abstract: Synthetic image generation has opened up new opportunities but has also created threats in regard to privacy, authenticity, and security. Detecting fake images is of paramount importance to prevent illegal activities, and previous research has shown that generative models leave unique patterns in their synthetic images that can be exploited to detect them. However, the fundamental problem of generalization remains, as even state-of-the-art detectors encounter difficulty when facing generators never seen during training. To assess the generalizability and robustness of synthetic image detectors in the face of real-world impairments, this paper presents a large-scale dataset named ArtiFact, comprising diverse generators, object categories, and real-world challenges. Moreover, the proposed multi-class classification scheme, combined with a filter stride reduction strategy addresses social platform impairments and effectively detects synthetic images from both seen and unseen generators. The proposed solution significantly outperforms other top teams by 8.34% on Test 1, 1.26% on Test 2, and 15.08% on Test 3 in the IEEE VIP Cup challenge at ICIP 2022, as measured by the accuracy metric.
summary: Synthetic image generation has opened up new opportunities but has also created threats in regard to privacy, authenticity, and security. Detecting fake images is of paramount importance to prevent illegal activities, and previous research has shown that generative models leave unique patterns in their synthetic images that can be exploited to detect them. However, the fundamental problem of generalization remains, as even state-of-the-art detectors encounter difficulty when facing generators never seen during training. To assess the generalizability and robustness of synthetic image detectors in the face of real-world impairments, this paper presents a large-scale dataset named ArtiFact, comprising diverse generators, object categories, and real-world challenges. Moreover, the proposed multi-class classification scheme, combined with a filter stride reduction strategy addresses social platform impairments and effectively detects synthetic images from both seen and unseen generators. The proposed solution significantly outperforms other top teams by 8.34% on Test 1, 1.26% on Test 2, and 15.08% on Test 3 in the IEEE VIP Cup challenge at ICIP 2022, as measured by the accuracy metric.
abstract_zh: 合成图像生成开辟了新的机遇，但也对隐私、真实性和安全性造成了威胁。检测假图像对于防止非法活动至关重要，之前的研究表明，生成模型在其合成图像中留下了独特的模式，可以利用这些模式来检测它们。然而，泛化的基本问题仍然存在，因为即使是最先进的检测器在面对训练期间从未见过的生成器时也会遇到困难。为了评估合成图像检测器在面对现实世界损伤时的通用性和鲁棒性，本文提出了一个名为 ArtiFact 的大规模数据集，其中包含不同的生成器、对象类别和现实世界的挑战。此外，所提出的多类分类方案与过滤器步幅减少策略相结合，解决了社交平台的缺陷，并有效地检测来自可见和不可见生成器的合成图像。根据准确度指标衡量，在 ICIP 2022 的 IEEE VIP Cup 挑战赛中，所提出的解决方案在测试 1 中显着优于其他顶级团队 8.34%、在测试 2 中高出 1.26%、在测试 3 中高出 15.08%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为ArtiFact的大规模数据集，用于检测合成图像，并设计了一种多分类方案与滤波步长缩减策略以提升检测器的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 合成图像生成技术带来了隐私、真实性与安全威胁，现有检测方法在面对训练中未见过的生成器时泛化能力不足，亟需更鲁棒的检测方案。
AI.method: 构建包含多种生成器、物体类别及现实挑战的ArtiFact数据集，结合多分类框架与滤波步长缩减策略，解决社交平台图像损伤问题并提升检测性能。
AI.result: 在IEEE VIP Cup挑战赛中，该方法在Test 1、Test 2、Test 3测试集上分别优于其他顶级团队8.34%、1.26%和15.08%（准确率指标）。
AI.conclusion: ArtiFact数据集与提出的检测方法显著提升了合成图像检测的泛化能力，为应对现实场景中的未知生成器和图像损伤提供了有效解决方案。

title: The Generalizability of Explanations
title_zh: 解释的普遍性
abstract: Due to the absence of ground truth, objective evaluation of explainability methods is an essential research direction. So far, the vast majority of evaluations can be summarized into three categories, namely human evaluation, sensitivity testing, and salinity check. This work proposes a novel evaluation methodology from the perspective of generalizability. We employ an Autoencoder to learn the distributions of the generated explanations and observe their learnability as well as the plausibility of the learned distributional features. We first briefly demonstrate the evaluation idea of the proposed approach at LIME, and then quantitatively evaluate multiple popular explainability methods. We also find that smoothing the explanations with SmoothGrad can significantly enhance the generalizability of explanations.
summary: Due to the absence of ground truth, objective evaluation of explainability methods is an essential research direction. So far, the vast majority of evaluations can be summarized into three categories, namely human evaluation, sensitivity testing, and salinity check. This work proposes a novel evaluation methodology from the perspective of generalizability. We employ an Autoencoder to learn the distributions of the generated explanations and observe their learnability as well as the plausibility of the learned distributional features. We first briefly demonstrate the evaluation idea of the proposed approach at LIME, and then quantitatively evaluate multiple popular explainability methods. We also find that smoothing the explanations with SmoothGrad can significantly enhance the generalizability of explanations.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏基本事实，可解释性方法的客观评估是一个重要的研究方向。到目前为止，绝大多数的评估可以概括为三类，即人体评估、敏感性测试和盐度检查。这项工作从普遍性的角度提出了一种新颖的评估方法。我们使用自动编码器来学习生成的解释的分布，并观察它们的可学习性以及所学习的分布特征的合理性。我们首先在 LIME 上简要展示了所提出方法的评估思想，然后定量评估了多种流行的可解释性方法。我们还发现，使用 SmoothGrad 平滑解释可以显着增强解释的概括性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于泛化性的可解释性方法评估框架，通过自编码器学习解释分布并验证SmoothGrad对泛化性的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法评估缺乏客观标准，且难以衡量解释结果的泛化能力，需建立更可靠的评估体系。
AI.method: 采用自编码器建模解释分布，通过分布可学习性与合理性评估泛化性，并在LIME框架下验证SmoothGrad的增强效果。
AI.result: 量化验证了多种解释方法的泛化性差异，发现SmoothGrad可显著提升解释分布的稳定性与合理性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新评估方法有效反映解释泛化能力，揭示平滑处理对提升模型解释性的重要性，为可解释性研究提供新方向。

title: Investigating Catastrophic Overfitting in Fast Adversarial Training: A Self-fitting Perspective
title_zh: 研究快速对抗训练中的灾难性过度拟合：自拟合视角
comment: Comment: The camera-ready version (accepted at CVPR Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness, 2023)
comments: Comment: The camera-ready version (accepted at CVPR Workshop of Adversarial Machine Learning on Computer Vision: Art of Robustness, 2023)
abstract: Although fast adversarial training provides an efficient approach for building robust networks, it may suffer from a serious problem known as catastrophic overfitting (CO), where multi-step robust accuracy suddenly collapses to zero. In this paper, we for the first time decouple single-step adversarial examples into data-information and self-information, which reveals an interesting phenomenon called "self-fitting". Self-fitting, i.e., the network learns the self-information embedded in single-step perturbations, naturally leads to the occurrence of CO. When self-fitting occurs, the network experiences an obvious "channel differentiation" phenomenon that some convolution channels accounting for recognizing self-information become dominant, while others for data-information are suppressed. In this way, the network can only recognize images with sufficient self-information and loses generalization ability to other types of data. Based on self-fitting, we provide new insights into the existing methods to mitigate CO and extend CO to multi-step adversarial training. Our findings reveal a self-learning mechanism in adversarial training and open up new perspectives for suppressing different kinds of information to mitigate CO.
summary: Although fast adversarial training provides an efficient approach for building robust networks, it may suffer from a serious problem known as catastrophic overfitting (CO), where multi-step robust accuracy suddenly collapses to zero. In this paper, we for the first time decouple single-step adversarial examples into data-information and self-information, which reveals an interesting phenomenon called "self-fitting". Self-fitting, i.e., the network learns the self-information embedded in single-step perturbations, naturally leads to the occurrence of CO. When self-fitting occurs, the network experiences an obvious "channel differentiation" phenomenon that some convolution channels accounting for recognizing self-information become dominant, while others for data-information are suppressed. In this way, the network can only recognize images with sufficient self-information and loses generalization ability to other types of data. Based on self-fitting, we provide new insights into the existing methods to mitigate CO and extend CO to multi-step adversarial training. Our findings reveal a self-learning mechanism in adversarial training and open up new perspectives for suppressing different kinds of information to mitigate CO.
abstract_zh: 尽管快速对抗训练提供了一种构建稳健网络的有效方法，但它可能会遇到称为灾难性过拟合（CO）的严重问题，即多步稳健精度突然降至零。在本文中，我们首次将单步对抗样本解耦为数据信息和自信息，揭示了一个有趣的现象，称为“自拟合”。自拟合，即网络学习嵌入单步扰动的自信息，自然会导致CO的发生。当自拟合发生时，网络会出现明显的“通道分化”现象，一些负责识别自信息的卷积通道占主导地位，而其他负责数据信息的卷积通道则受到抑制。这样，网络只能识别具有足够自信息的图像，而失去了对其他类型数据的泛化能力。基于自拟合，我们为减轻 CO 的现有方法提供了新的见解，并将 CO 扩展到多步对抗训练。我们的研究结果揭示了对抗训练中的自学习机制，并为抑制不同类型的信息以减轻 CO 开辟了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文从自拟合视角研究快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO）问题，揭示其成因并提出缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 现有快速对抗训练方法存在严重灾难性过拟合问题，导致模型在对抗样本上准确率骤降，需深入理解其机制。
AI.method: 将单步对抗样本分解为数据信息与自信息，发现自拟合现象及通道分化机制，据此提出缓解CO的新思路。
AI.result: 揭示自拟合导致通道分化使模型失去泛化能力，提出针对CO的改进方法并扩展至多步对抗训练场景。
AI.conclusion: 发现对抗训练中的自学习机制，为通过抑制不同信息类型缓解CO提供了新研究方向。

tldr: 本文从自拟合视角研究快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO）问题，揭示其成因并提出缓解方法。
motivation: 现有快速对抗训练方法存在严重灾难性过拟合问题，导致模型在对抗样本上准确率骤降，需深入理解其机制。
method: 将单步对抗样本分解为数据信息与自信息，发现自拟合现象及通道分化机制，据此提出缓解CO的新思路。
result: 揭示自拟合导致通道分化使模型失去泛化能力，提出针对CO的改进方法并扩展至多步对抗训练场景。

search_text: Investigating Catastrophic Overfitting in Fast Adversarial Training: A Self-fitting Perspective 研究快速对抗训练中的灾难性过度拟合：自拟合视角 Although fast adversarial training provides an efficient approach for building robust networks, it may suffer from a serious problem known as catastrophic overfitting (CO), where multi-step robust accuracy suddenly collapses to zero. In this paper, we for the first time decouple single-step adversarial examples into data-information and self-information, which reveals an interesting phenomenon called "self-fitting". Self-fitting, i.e., the network learns the self-information embedded in single-step perturbations, naturally leads to the occurrence of CO. When self-fitting occurs, the network experiences an obvious "channel differentiation" phenomenon that some convolution channels accounting for recognizing self-information become dominant, while others for data-information are suppressed. In this way, the network can only recognize images with sufficient self-information and loses generalization ability to other types of data. Based on self-fitting, we provide new insights into the existing methods to mitigate CO and extend CO to multi-step adversarial training. Our findings reveal a self-learning mechanism in adversarial training and open up new perspectives for suppressing different kinds of information to mitigate CO. 尽管快速对抗训练提供了一种构建稳健网络的有效方法，但它可能会遇到称为灾难性过拟合（CO）的严重问题，即多步稳健精度突然降至零。在本文中，我们首次将单步对抗样本解耦为数据信息和自信息，揭示了一个有趣的现象，称为“自拟合”。自拟合，即网络学习嵌入单步扰动的自信息，自然会导致CO的发生。当自拟合发生时，网络会出现明显的“通道分化”现象，一些负责识别自信息的卷积通道占主导地位，而其他负责数据信息的卷积通道则受到抑制。这样，网络只能识别具有足够自信息的图像，而失去了对其他类型数据的泛化能力。基于自拟合，我们为减轻 CO 的现有方法提供了新的见解，并将 CO 扩展到多步对抗训练。我们的研究结果揭示了对抗训练中的自学习机制，并为抑制不同类型的信息以减轻 CO 开辟了新的视角。 本文从自拟合视角研究快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO）问题，揭示其成因并提出缓解方法。 Zhengbao He,Tao Li,Sizhe Chen,Xiaolin Huang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yutao Feng,Jipeng Qiang,Yun Li,Yunhao Yuan,Yi Zhu
title: Sentence Simplification via Large Language Models
title_zh: 通过大型语言模型简化句子
abstract: Sentence Simplification aims to rephrase complex sentences into simpler sentences while retaining original meaning. Large Language models (LLMs) have demonstrated the ability to perform a variety of natural language processing tasks. However, it is not yet known whether LLMs can be served as a high-quality sentence simplification system. In this work, we empirically analyze the zero-/few-shot learning ability of LLMs by evaluating them on a number of benchmark test sets. Experimental results show LLMs outperform state-of-the-art sentence simplification methods, and are judged to be on a par with human annotators.
summary: Sentence Simplification aims to rephrase complex sentences into simpler sentences while retaining original meaning. Large Language models (LLMs) have demonstrated the ability to perform a variety of natural language processing tasks. However, it is not yet known whether LLMs can be served as a high-quality sentence simplification system. In this work, we empirically analyze the zero-/few-shot learning ability of LLMs by evaluating them on a number of benchmark test sets. Experimental results show LLMs outperform state-of-the-art sentence simplification methods, and are judged to be on a par with human annotators.
abstract_zh: 句子简化旨在将复杂的句子改写为更简单的句子，同时保留原始含义。大型语言模型 (LLM) 已证明能够执行各种自然语言处理任务。然而，目前尚不清楚法学硕士是否可以作为高质量的句子简化系统。在这项工作中，我们通过在许多基准测试集上评估法学硕士的零/少样本学习能力来实证分析它们。实验结果表明，法学硕士的性能优于最先进的句子简化方法，并被认为与人类注释者相当。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究大语言模型在句子简化任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，但其作为句子简化系统的有效性尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过评估大语言模型在多个基准测试集上的零次/少样本学习能力进行实验分析。
AI.result: 实验结果显示大语言模型优于现有最先进方法，且与人类注释者水平相当。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型可作为高质量的句子简化系统。

title: An Adam-enhanced Particle Swarm Optimizer for Latent Factor Analysis
title_zh: 用于潜在因素分析的 Adam 增强粒子群优化器
abstract: Digging out the latent information from large-scale incomplete matrices is a key issue with challenges. The Latent Factor Analysis (LFA) model has been investigated in depth to an alyze the latent information. Recently, Swarm Intelligence-related LFA models have been proposed and adopted widely to improve the optimization process of LFA with high efficiency, i.e., the Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO)-LFA model. However, the hyper-parameters of the PSO-LFA model have to tune manually, which is inconvenient for widely adoption and limits the learning rate as a fixed value. To address this issue, we propose an Adam-enhanced Hierarchical PSO-LFA model, which refines the latent factors with a sequential Adam-adjusting hyper-parameters PSO algorithm. First, we design the Adam incremental vector for a particle and construct the Adam-enhanced evolution process for particles. Second, we refine all the latent factors of the target matrix sequentially with our proposed Adam-enhanced PSO's process. The experimental results on four real datasets demonstrate that our proposed model achieves higher prediction accuracy with its peers.
summary: Digging out the latent information from large-scale incomplete matrices is a key issue with challenges. The Latent Factor Analysis (LFA) model has been investigated in depth to an alyze the latent information. Recently, Swarm Intelligence-related LFA models have been proposed and adopted widely to improve the optimization process of LFA with high efficiency, i.e., the Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO)-LFA model. However, the hyper-parameters of the PSO-LFA model have to tune manually, which is inconvenient for widely adoption and limits the learning rate as a fixed value. To address this issue, we propose an Adam-enhanced Hierarchical PSO-LFA model, which refines the latent factors with a sequential Adam-adjusting hyper-parameters PSO algorithm. First, we design the Adam incremental vector for a particle and construct the Adam-enhanced evolution process for particles. Second, we refine all the latent factors of the target matrix sequentially with our proposed Adam-enhanced PSO's process. The experimental results on four real datasets demonstrate that our proposed model achieves higher prediction accuracy with its peers.
abstract_zh: 从大规模不完备矩阵中挖掘潜在信息是一个具有挑战性的关键问题。潜在因素分析（LFA）模型已被深入研究以分析潜在信息。近年来，与群体智能相关的LFA模型被提出并被广泛采用，以高效地改进LFA的优化过程，即粒子群优化（PSO）-LFA模型。然而，PSO-LFA模型的超参数必须手动调整，这不方便广泛采用，并且将学习率限制为固定值。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Adam 增强的分层 PSO-LFA 模型，该模型通过顺序 Adam 调整超参数 PSO 算法来细化潜在因素。首先，我们设计粒子的 Adam 增量向量，并构建粒子的 Adam 增强进化过程。其次，我们使用我们提出的 Adam 增强 PSO 过程依次细化目标矩阵的所有潜在因子。在四个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在同行中实现了更高的预测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Adam优化器的改进粒子群算法（Adam-enhanced PSO），用于提升潜在因子分析（LFA）模型的优化效率与预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有PSO-LFA模型需手动调整超参数且学习率固定，导致优化效率受限，难以适应大规模不完整矩阵的潜在信息挖掘需求。
AI.method: 设计Adam增量向量实现粒子超参数自适应调整，构建分层PSO进化过程，按序优化目标矩阵的潜在因子。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集实验中，该模型预测准确率优于同类方法。
AI.conclusion: Adam增强的分层PSO-LFA模型通过自适应超参数调整有效提升了潜在因子分析的性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jia Chen,Yixian Chun,Yuanyi Liu,Renyu Zhang,Yang Hu
title: A Dynamic-Neighbor Particle Swarm Optimizer for Accurate Latent Factor Analysis
title_zh: 用于精确潜在因子分析的动态邻近粒子群优化器
abstract: High-Dimensional and Incomplete matrices, which usually contain a large amount of valuable latent information, can be well represented by a Latent Factor Analysis model. The performance of an LFA model heavily rely on its optimization process. Thereby, some prior studies employ the Particle Swarm Optimization to enhance an LFA model's optimization process. However, the particles within the swarm follow the static evolution paths and only share the global best information, which limits the particles' searching area to cause sub-optimum issue. To address this issue, this paper proposes a Dynamic-neighbor-cooperated Hierarchical PSO-enhanced LFA model with two-fold main ideas. First is the neighbor-cooperated strategy, which enhances the randomly chosen neighbor's velocity for particles' evolution. Second is the dynamic hyper-parameter tunning. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets are conducted to evaluate the proposed DHPL model. The results substantiate that DHPL achieves a higher accuracy without hyper-parameters tunning than the existing PSO-incorporated LFA models in representing an HDI matrix.
summary: High-Dimensional and Incomplete matrices, which usually contain a large amount of valuable latent information, can be well represented by a Latent Factor Analysis model. The performance of an LFA model heavily rely on its optimization process. Thereby, some prior studies employ the Particle Swarm Optimization to enhance an LFA model's optimization process. However, the particles within the swarm follow the static evolution paths and only share the global best information, which limits the particles' searching area to cause sub-optimum issue. To address this issue, this paper proposes a Dynamic-neighbor-cooperated Hierarchical PSO-enhanced LFA model with two-fold main ideas. First is the neighbor-cooperated strategy, which enhances the randomly chosen neighbor's velocity for particles' evolution. Second is the dynamic hyper-parameter tunning. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets are conducted to evaluate the proposed DHPL model. The results substantiate that DHPL achieves a higher accuracy without hyper-parameters tunning than the existing PSO-incorporated LFA models in representing an HDI matrix.
abstract_zh: 高维和不完全矩阵通常包含大量有价值的潜在信息，可以通过潜在因子分析模型很好地表示。 LFA 模型的性能很大程度上取决于其优化过程。因此，一些先前的研究采用粒子群优化来增强 LFA 模型的优化过程。然而，群体内的粒子遵循静态演化路径，仅共享全局最佳信息，这限制了粒子的搜索区域，导致次优问题。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种动态邻居协作的分层 PSO 增强 LFA 模型，其主要思想有两个。首先是邻居合作策略，它提高了随机选择的邻居的粒子进化速度。其次是动态超参数调整。对两个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验来评估所提出的 DHPL 模型。结果证实，在表示 HDI 矩阵时，DHPL 在不进行超参数调整的情况下比现有的 PSO 合并 LFA 模型获得了更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态邻域粒子群优化器，用于改进高维不完整矩阵的潜在因子分析模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的潜在因子分析模型在优化过程中存在局部最优问题，因为粒子群优化算法中粒子仅遵循静态进化路径并共享全局最优信息。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种动态邻域合作的分层粒子群优化算法，包括邻域合作策略和动态超参数调整。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的DHPL模型在无需超参数调整的情况下，比现有PSO结合的LFA模型具有更高的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 动态邻域合作策略和动态超参数调整能够有效提升潜在因子分析模型的优化性能，从而更准确地表示高维不完整矩阵。

ai_content.result: 在两个基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的DHPL模型在无需超参数调整的情况下，比现有PSO结合的LFA模型具有更高的准确性。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态邻域合作策略和动态超参数调整能够有效提升潜在因子分析模型的优化性能，从而更准确地表示高维不完整矩阵。

search_text: A Dynamic-Neighbor Particle Swarm Optimizer for Accurate Latent Factor Analysis 用于精确潜在因子分析的动态邻近粒子群优化器 High-Dimensional and Incomplete matrices, which usually contain a large amount of valuable latent information, can be well represented by a Latent Factor Analysis model. The performance of an LFA model heavily rely on its optimization process. Thereby, some prior studies employ the Particle Swarm Optimization to enhance an LFA model's optimization process. However, the particles within the swarm follow the static evolution paths and only share the global best information, which limits the particles' searching area to cause sub-optimum issue. To address this issue, this paper proposes a Dynamic-neighbor-cooperated Hierarchical PSO-enhanced LFA model with two-fold main ideas. First is the neighbor-cooperated strategy, which enhances the randomly chosen neighbor's velocity for particles' evolution. Second is the dynamic hyper-parameter tunning. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets are conducted to evaluate the proposed DHPL model. The results substantiate that DHPL achieves a higher accuracy without hyper-parameters tunning than the existing PSO-incorporated LFA models in representing an HDI matrix. 高维和不完全矩阵通常包含大量有价值的潜在信息，可以通过潜在因子分析模型很好地表示。 LFA 模型的性能很大程度上取决于其优化过程。因此，一些先前的研究采用粒子群优化来增强 LFA 模型的优化过程。然而，群体内的粒子遵循静态演化路径，仅共享全局最佳信息，这限制了粒子的搜索区域，导致次优问题。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种动态邻居协作的分层 PSO 增强 LFA 模型，其主要思想有两个。首先是邻居合作策略，它提高了随机选择的邻居的粒子进化速度。其次是动态超参数调整。对两个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验来评估所提出的 DHPL 模型。结果证实，在表示 HDI 矩阵时，DHPL 在不进行超参数调整的情况下比现有的 PSO 合并 LFA 模型获得了更高的精度。 本文提出了一种动态邻域粒子群优化器，用于改进高维不完整矩阵的潜在因子分析模型。 Jia Chen,Yixian Chun,Yuanyi Liu,Renyu Zhang,Yang Hu cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Julia Katheder,Stephen G. Kobourov,Axel Kuckuk,Maximilian Pfister,Johannes Zink
title: Simultaneous Drawing of Layered Trees
title_zh: 分层树的同步绘制
comment: Appears in Proc. 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation 2024 (WALCOM'24)
comments: Appears in Proc. 18th International Conference and Workshops on Algorithms and Computation 2024 (WALCOM'24)
abstract: We study the crossing-minimization problem in a layered graph drawing of planar-embedded rooted trees whose leaves have a given total order on the first layer, which adheres to the embedding of each individual tree. The task is then to permute the vertices on the other layers (respecting the given tree embeddings) in order to minimize the number of crossings. While this problem is known to be NP-hard for multiple trees even on just two layers, we describe a dynamic program running in polynomial time for the restricted case of two trees. If there are more than two trees, we restrict the number of layers to three, which allows for a reduction to a shortest-path problem. This way, we achieve XP-time in the number of trees.
summary: We study the crossing-minimization problem in a layered graph drawing of planar-embedded rooted trees whose leaves have a given total order on the first layer, which adheres to the embedding of each individual tree. The task is then to permute the vertices on the other layers (respecting the given tree embeddings) in order to minimize the number of crossings. While this problem is known to be NP-hard for multiple trees even on just two layers, we describe a dynamic program running in polynomial time for the restricted case of two trees. If there are more than two trees, we restrict the number of layers to three, which allows for a reduction to a shortest-path problem. This way, we achieve XP-time in the number of trees.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了平面嵌入有根树的分层图形绘制中的交叉最小化问题，其叶子在第一层上具有给定的总顺序，该总顺序遵循每棵树的嵌入。然后，任务是排列其他层上的顶点（尊重给定的树嵌入），以最小化交叉数量。虽然这个问题对于多棵树来说是 NP 难的，即使只有两层，但我们描述了一个在两棵树的受限情况下在多项式时间内运行的动态程序。如果有两棵以上的树，我们将层数限制为三层，这可以减少最短路径问题。这样，我们在树的数量上就达到了 XP 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何对平面嵌入的有根树进行分层图绘制，通过排列各层顶点以最小化交叉数，提出针对两棵树和三层情况的算法。
AI.motivation: 分层图绘制中交叉数的最小化对可视化效果至关重要，而现有方法在处理多棵树或多层时存在计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.method: 对于两棵树采用动态规划实现多项式时间求解，超过两棵树时限制层数为三层并转化为最短路径问题，以树的数量为参数设计XP时间算法。
AI.result: 为两棵树的分层绘制提供多项式时间算法，三层情况下实现XP时间复杂度，扩展了该问题的可解范围。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在特定约束下有效解决了多树分层绘制的交叉最小化问题，为实际应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Jun Yang,Lizhi Bai,Yaoru Sun,Chunqi Tian,Maoyu Mao,Guorun Wang
title: Pixel Difference Convolutional Network for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 RGB-D 语义分割的像素差分卷积网络
abstract: RGB-D semantic segmentation can be advanced with convolutional neural networks due to the availability of Depth data. Although objects cannot be easily discriminated by just the 2D appearance, with the local pixel difference and geometric patterns in Depth, they can be well separated in some cases. Considering the fixed grid kernel structure, CNNs are limited to lack the ability to capture detailed, fine-grained information and thus cannot achieve accurate pixel-level semantic segmentation. To solve this problem, we propose a Pixel Difference Convolutional Network (PDCNet) to capture detailed intrinsic patterns by aggregating both intensity and gradient information in the local range for Depth data and global range for RGB data, respectively. Precisely, PDCNet consists of a Depth branch and an RGB branch. For the Depth branch, we propose a Pixel Difference Convolution (PDC) to consider local and detailed geometric information in Depth data via aggregating both intensity and gradient information. For the RGB branch, we contribute a lightweight Cascade Large Kernel (CLK) to extend PDC, namely CPDC, to enjoy global contexts for RGB data and further boost performance. Consequently, both modal data's local and global pixel differences are seamlessly incorporated into PDCNet during the information propagation process. Experiments on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN RGB-D reveal that our PDCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance for the semantic segmentation task.
summary: RGB-D semantic segmentation can be advanced with convolutional neural networks due to the availability of Depth data. Although objects cannot be easily discriminated by just the 2D appearance, with the local pixel difference and geometric patterns in Depth, they can be well separated in some cases. Considering the fixed grid kernel structure, CNNs are limited to lack the ability to capture detailed, fine-grained information and thus cannot achieve accurate pixel-level semantic segmentation. To solve this problem, we propose a Pixel Difference Convolutional Network (PDCNet) to capture detailed intrinsic patterns by aggregating both intensity and gradient information in the local range for Depth data and global range for RGB data, respectively. Precisely, PDCNet consists of a Depth branch and an RGB branch. For the Depth branch, we propose a Pixel Difference Convolution (PDC) to consider local and detailed geometric information in Depth data via aggregating both intensity and gradient information. For the RGB branch, we contribute a lightweight Cascade Large Kernel (CLK) to extend PDC, namely CPDC, to enjoy global contexts for RGB data and further boost performance. Consequently, both modal data's local and global pixel differences are seamlessly incorporated into PDCNet during the information propagation process. Experiments on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN RGB-D reveal that our PDCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance for the semantic segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 由于深度数据的可用性，RGB-D 语义分割可以通过卷积神经网络进行推进。尽管仅通过 2D 外观无法轻松区分对象，但通过局部像素差异和深度的几何图案，在某些情况下可以很好地将它们分开。考虑到固定的网格内核结构，CNN 缺乏捕获详细、细粒度信息的能力，因此无法实现精确的像素级语义分割。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了像素差异卷积网络（PDCNet），通过分别聚合深度数据的局部范围和 RGB 数据的全局范围内的强度和梯度信息来捕获详细的内在模式。准确地说，PDCNet 由 Depth 分支和 RGB 分支组成。对于深度分支，我们提出了像素差分卷积（PDC），通过聚合强度和梯度信息来考虑深度数据中的局部和详细几何信息。对于RGB分支，我们贡献了一个轻量级级联大内核（CLK）来扩展PDC，即CPDC，以享受RGB数据的全局上下文并进一步提升性能。因此，模态数据的局部和全局像素差异在信息传播过程中都无缝地融入到 PDCNet 中。在两个具有挑战性的基准数据集（即 NYUDv2 和 SUN RGB-D）上进行的实验表明，我们的 PDCNet 在语义分割任务中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PDCNet的像素差卷积网络，用于改进RGB-D语义分割任务，通过结合深度数据的局部细节信息和RGB数据的全局上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络因固定网格结构难以捕捉细粒度信息，导致RGB-D语义分割精度不足。深度数据的局部几何特征与RGB数据的全局上下文信息可互补，需设计新方法整合两者以提升分割效果。
AI.method: PDCNet包含两个分支：深度分支采用像素差卷积（PDC）聚合深度数据的局部强度与梯度信息；RGB分支引入轻量级级联大核（CLK）扩展PDC为CPDC，以获取RGB数据的全局上下文。两分支信息在传播过程中无缝融合。
AI.result: 在NYUDv2和SUN RGB-D数据集上的实验表明，PDCNet在语义分割任务中达到当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合深度数据的局部细节与RGB数据的全局上下文，PDCNet有效提升了RGB-D语义分割的精度，验证了多模态特征融合的优越性。

For the RGB branch, we contribute a lightweight Cascade Large Kernel (CLK) to extend PDC, namely CPDC, to enjoy global contexts for RGB data and further boost performance. Consequently, both modal data's local and global pixel differences are seamlessly incorporated into PDCNet during the information propagation process. Experiments on two challenging benchmark datasets, i.e., NYUDv2 and SUN RGB-D reveal that our PDCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance for the semantic segmentation task. 由于深度数据的可用性，RGB-D 语义分割可以通过卷积神经网络进行推进。尽管仅通过 2D 外观无法轻松区分对象，但通过局部像素差异和深度的几何图案，在某些情况下可以很好地将它们分开。考虑到固定的网格内核结构，CNN 缺乏捕获详细、细粒度信息的能力，因此无法实现精确的像素级语义分割。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了像素差异卷积网络（PDCNet），通过分别聚合深度数据的局部范围和 RGB 数据的全局范围内的强度和梯度信息来捕获详细的内在模式。准确地说，PDCNet 由 Depth 分支和 RGB 分支组成。对于深度分支，我们提出了像素差分卷积（PDC），通过聚合强度和梯度信息来考虑深度数据中的局部和详细几何信息。对于RGB分支，我们贡献了一个轻量级级联大内核（CLK）来扩展PDC，即CPDC，以享受RGB数据的全局上下文并进一步提升性能。因此，模态数据的局部和全局像素差异在信息传播过程中都无缝地融入到 PDCNet 中。在两个具有挑战性的基准数据集（即 NYUDv2 和 SUN RGB-D）上进行的实验表明，我们的 PDCNet 在语义分割任务中实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为PDCNet的像素差卷积网络，用于改进RGB-D语义分割任务，通过结合深度数据的局部细节信息和RGB数据的全局上下文信息。 Jun Yang,Lizhi Bai,Yaoru Sun,Chunqi Tian,Maoyu Mao,Guorun Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Ling Li,Bandara Dissanayake,Tatsuya Omotezako,Yunjie Zhong,Qing Zhang,Rizhao Cai,Qian Zheng,Dennis Sng,Weisi Lin,Yufei Wang,Alex C Kot
title: Evaluating the Efficacy of Skincare Product: A Realistic Short-Term Facial Pore Simulation
title_zh: 评估护肤品功效：真实的短期面部毛孔模拟
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Simulating the effects of skincare products on face is a potential new way to communicate the efficacy of skincare products in skin diagnostics and product recommendations. Furthermore, such simulations enable one to anticipate his/her skin conditions and better manage skin health. However, there is a lack of effective simulations today. In this paper, we propose the first simulation model to reveal facial pore changes after using skincare products. Our simulation pipeline consists of 2 steps: training data establishment and facial pore simulation. To establish training data, we collect face images with various pore quality indexes from short-term (8-weeks) clinical studies. People often experience significant skin fluctuations (due to natural rhythms, external stressors, etc.,), which introduces large perturbations in clinical data. To address this problem, we propose a sliding window mechanism to clean data and select representative index(es) to represent facial pore changes. Facial pore simulation stage consists of 3 modules: UNet-based segmentation module to localize facial pores; regression module to predict time-dependent warping hyperparameters; and deformation module, taking warping hyperparameters and pore segmentation labels as inputs, to precisely deform pores accordingly. The proposed simulation is able to render realistic facial pore changes. And this work will pave the way for future research in facial skin simulation and skincare product developments.
summary: Simulating the effects of skincare products on face is a potential new way to communicate the efficacy of skincare products in skin diagnostics and product recommendations. Furthermore, such simulations enable one to anticipate his/her skin conditions and better manage skin health. However, there is a lack of effective simulations today. In this paper, we propose the first simulation model to reveal facial pore changes after using skincare products. Our simulation pipeline consists of 2 steps: training data establishment and facial pore simulation. To establish training data, we collect face images with various pore quality indexes from short-term (8-weeks) clinical studies. People often experience significant skin fluctuations (due to natural rhythms, external stressors, etc.,), which introduces large perturbations in clinical data. To address this problem, we propose a sliding window mechanism to clean data and select representative index(es) to represent facial pore changes. Facial pore simulation stage consists of 3 modules: UNet-based segmentation module to localize facial pores; regression module to predict time-dependent warping hyperparameters; and deformation module, taking warping hyperparameters and pore segmentation labels as inputs, to precisely deform pores accordingly. The proposed simulation is able to render realistic facial pore changes. And this work will pave the way for future research in facial skin simulation and skincare product developments.
abstract_zh: 模拟护肤品对面部的影响是一种潜在的新方式，可以在皮肤诊断和产品推荐中传达护肤品的功效。此外，这种模拟使人们能够预测他/她的皮肤状况并更好地管理皮肤健康。然而，目前缺乏有效的模拟。在本文中，我们提出了第一个模拟模型来揭示使用护肤品后面部毛孔的变化。我们的模拟流程包括两个步骤：训练数据建立和面部毛孔模拟。为了建立训练数据，我们从短期（8 周）临床研究中收集具有各种毛孔质量指数的面部图像。人们经常会经历显着的皮肤波动（由于自然节律、外部压力源等），这会给临床数据带来很大的扰动。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种滑动窗口机制来清理数据并选择代表性索引来表示面部毛孔变化。面部毛孔模拟阶段由3个模块组成：基于UNet的分割模块，用于定位面部毛孔；回归模块来预测与时间相关的扭曲超参数；变形模块，以扭曲超参数和孔隙分割标签作为输入，相应地精确地使孔隙变形。所提出的模拟能够呈现真实的面部毛孔变化。这项工作将为未来面部皮肤模拟和护肤产品开发的研究铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模拟使用护肤品后面部毛孔变化的仿真模型，以评估护肤品效果。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏有效的护肤品效果仿真方法，难以直观沟通产品功效及预测皮肤状态变化。
AI.method: 通过建立训练数据集（采用滑动窗口机制清洗临床数据）和三阶段仿真流程（UNet分割毛孔、回归预测形变参数、形变模块生成仿真结果）实现毛孔变化模拟。
AI.result: 成功生成逼真的短期面部毛孔变化仿真效果，为皮肤仿真和护肤品研发提供新方法。
AI.conclusion: 本模型是首个针对护肤品效果的面部毛孔仿真方案，有效解决了临床数据波动问题，推动皮肤健康领域研究进展。

authors_text: Tuomas Jalonen,Mohammad Al-Sa'd,Roope Mellanen,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj
title: Real-Time Damage Detection in Fiber Lifting Ropes Using Lightweight Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用轻量级卷积神经网络实时检测纤维提升绳的损伤
comment: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal (2025) vol. 25, no. 4, pp. 7496-7507
comments: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal (2025) vol. 25, no. 4, pp. 7496-7507
abstract: The health and safety hazards posed by worn crane lifting ropes mandate periodic inspection for damage. This task is time-consuming, prone to human error, halts operation, and may result in the premature disposal of ropes. Therefore, we propose using efficient deep learning and computer vision methods to automate the process of detecting damaged ropes. Specifically, we present a vision-based system for detecting damage in synthetic fiber rope images using lightweight convolutional neural networks. We develop a camera-based apparatus to photograph the lifting rope's surface, while in operation, and capture the progressive wear-and-tear as well as the more significant degradation in the rope's health state. Experts from Konecranes annotate the collected images in accordance with the rope's condition; normal or damaged. Then, we pre-process the images, systematically design a deep learning model, evaluate its detection and prediction performance, analyze its computational complexity, and compare it with various other models. Experimental results show the proposed model outperforms other similar techniques with 96.5% accuracy, 94.8% precision, 98.3% recall, 96.5% F1-score, and 99.3% AUC. Besides, they demonstrate the model's real-time operation, low memory footprint, robustness to various environmental and operational conditions, and adequacy for deployment in industrial applications such as lifting, mooring, towing, climbing, and sailing.
summary: The health and safety hazards posed by worn crane lifting ropes mandate periodic inspection for damage. This task is time-consuming, prone to human error, halts operation, and may result in the premature disposal of ropes. Therefore, we propose using efficient deep learning and computer vision methods to automate the process of detecting damaged ropes. Specifically, we present a vision-based system for detecting damage in synthetic fiber rope images using lightweight convolutional neural networks. We develop a camera-based apparatus to photograph the lifting rope's surface, while in operation, and capture the progressive wear-and-tear as well as the more significant degradation in the rope's health state. Experts from Konecranes annotate the collected images in accordance with the rope's condition; normal or damaged. Then, we pre-process the images, systematically design a deep learning model, evaluate its detection and prediction performance, analyze its computational complexity, and compare it with various other models. Experimental results show the proposed model outperforms other similar techniques with 96.5% accuracy, 94.8% precision, 98.3% recall, 96.5% F1-score, and 99.3% AUC. Besides, they demonstrate the model's real-time operation, low memory footprint, robustness to various environmental and operational conditions, and adequacy for deployment in industrial applications such as lifting, mooring, towing, climbing, and sailing.
abstract_zh: 磨损的起重机提升绳带来的健康和安全危害要求定期检查是否有损坏。这项任务非常耗时，容易出现人为错误，导致操作停止，并可能导致绳索过早处置。因此，我们建议使用高效的深度学习和计算机视觉方法来自动化检测损坏绳索的过程。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于视觉的系统，用于使用轻量级卷积神经网络检测合成纤维绳图像中的损坏。我们开发了一种基于摄像头的设备，用于在运行时拍摄提升绳索的表面，并捕获渐进的磨损以及绳索健康状态的更显着的退化。科尼专家根据绳索的状况对收集到的图像进行注释；正常或损坏。然后，我们对图像进行预处理，系统地设计深度学习模型，评估其检测和预测性能，分析其计算复杂度，并将其与各种其他模型进行比较。实验结果表明，所提出的模型以 96.5% 的准确率、94.8% 的精确度、98.3% 的召回率、96.5% 的 F1 分数和 99.3% 的 AUC 优于其他类似技术。此外，它们还展示了模型的实时操作、低内存占用、对各种环境和操作条件的鲁棒性，以及在起重、系泊、拖曳、攀爬和航行等工业应用中部署的充分性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轻量级卷积神经网络的实时光纤吊绳损伤检测系统，通过视觉技术自动识别吊绳表面损伤。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测吊绳磨损存在耗时、易误判、影响作业效率及过早报废等问题，亟需高效自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 开发基于相机的实时图像采集装置，结合Konecranes专家标注的损伤数据集，设计轻量级CNN模型并优化计算复杂度，对比多种模型验证性能。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到96.5%准确率、94.8%精确率、98.3%召回率、96.5% F1值及99.3% AUC，具备环境鲁棒性与实时性，适用于工业场景部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效算法与实时检测能力，为吊装、系泊等工业领域提供可靠损伤诊断方案，具有显著应用价值。

Then, we pre-process the images, systematically design a deep learning model, evaluate its detection and prediction performance, analyze its computational complexity, and compare it with various other models. Experimental results show the proposed model outperforms other similar techniques with 96.5% accuracy, 94.8% precision, 98.3% recall, 96.5% F1-score, and 99.3% AUC. Besides, they demonstrate the model's real-time operation, low memory footprint, robustness to various environmental and operational conditions, and adequacy for deployment in industrial applications such as lifting, mooring, towing, climbing, and sailing. 磨损的起重机提升绳带来的健康和安全危害要求定期检查是否有损坏。这项任务非常耗时，容易出现人为错误，导致操作停止，并可能导致绳索过早处置。因此，我们建议使用高效的深度学习和计算机视觉方法来自动化检测损坏绳索的过程。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于视觉的系统，用于使用轻量级卷积神经网络检测合成纤维绳图像中的损坏。我们开发了一种基于摄像头的设备，用于在运行时拍摄提升绳索的表面，并捕获渐进的磨损以及绳索健康状态的更显着的退化。科尼专家根据绳索的状况对收集到的图像进行注释；正常或损坏。然后，我们对图像进行预处理，系统地设计深度学习模型，评估其检测和预测性能，分析其计算复杂度，并将其与各种其他模型进行比较。实验结果表明，所提出的模型以 96.5% 的准确率、94.8% 的精确度、98.3% 的召回率、96.5% 的 F1 分数和 99.3% 的 AUC 优于其他类似技术。此外，它们还展示了模型的实时操作、低内存占用、对各种环境和操作条件的鲁棒性，以及在起重、系泊、拖曳、攀爬和航行等工业应用中部署的充分性。 本文提出了一种基于轻量级卷积神经网络的实时光纤吊绳损伤检测系统，通过视觉技术自动识别吊绳表面损伤。 Tuomas Jalonen,Mohammad Al-Sa'd,Roope Mellanen,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Uncertainty Guided Ensemble Self-Training for Semi-Supervised Global Field Reconstruction
title_zh: 半监督全局现场重建的不确定性引导集成自训练
abstract: Recovering a globally accurate complex physics field from limited sensor is critical to the measurement and control in the aerospace engineering. General reconstruction methods for recovering the field, especially the deep learning with more parameters and better representational ability, usually require large amounts of labeled data which is unaffordable. To solve the problem, this paper proposes Uncertainty Guided Ensemble Self-Training (UGE-ST), using plentiful unlabeled data to improve reconstruction performance. A novel self-training framework with the ensemble teacher and pretraining student designed to improve the accuracy of the pseudo-label and remedy the impact of noise is first proposed. On the other hand, uncertainty-guided learning is proposed to encourage the model to focus on the highly confident regions of pseudo-labels and mitigate the effects of wrong pseudo-labeling in self-training, improving the performance of the reconstruction model. Experiments include the pressure velocity field reconstruction of airfoil and the temperature field reconstruction of aircraft system indicate that our UGE-ST can save up to 90% of the data with the same accuracy as supervised learning.
summary: Recovering a globally accurate complex physics field from limited sensor is critical to the measurement and control in the aerospace engineering. General reconstruction methods for recovering the field, especially the deep learning with more parameters and better representational ability, usually require large amounts of labeled data which is unaffordable. To solve the problem, this paper proposes Uncertainty Guided Ensemble Self-Training (UGE-ST), using plentiful unlabeled data to improve reconstruction performance. A novel self-training framework with the ensemble teacher and pretraining student designed to improve the accuracy of the pseudo-label and remedy the impact of noise is first proposed. On the other hand, uncertainty-guided learning is proposed to encourage the model to focus on the highly confident regions of pseudo-labels and mitigate the effects of wrong pseudo-labeling in self-training, improving the performance of the reconstruction model. Experiments include the pressure velocity field reconstruction of airfoil and the temperature field reconstruction of aircraft system indicate that our UGE-ST can save up to 90% of the data with the same accuracy as supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 从有限的传感器中恢复全局精确的复杂物理场对于航空航天工程的测量和控制至关重要。一般恢复场的重建方法，尤其是参数较多、表示能力较好的深度学习，通常需要大量的标记数据，这是难以承受的。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了不确定性引导集成自训练（UGE-ST），利用大量未标记数据来提高重建性能。首次提出了一种由集成教师和预训练学生组成的新颖的自我训练框架，旨在提高伪标签的准确性并弥补噪声的影响。另一方面，提出了不确定性引导学习，以鼓励模型关注伪标签的高置信区域，并减轻自训练中错误伪标签的影响，提高重建模型的性能。机翼压力速度场重建和飞机系统温度场重建等实验表明，我们的UGE-ST可以节省高达90%的数据，并且具有与监督学习相同的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习方法UGE-ST，用于在有限传感器数据下重建全局物理场，如航空航天工程中的压力场和温度场。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法需大量标注数据才能准确重建物理场，但实际工程中获取标注数据成本高昂且不现实。
AI.method: 设计集成教师-预训练学生自训练框架提升伪标签质量，并引入不确定性引导机制，使模型聚焦高置信区域以减少噪声干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明，在保持与监督学习相同精度的前提下，UGE-ST可节省高达90%的标注数据，适用于翼型压力场和飞机温度场重建。
AI.conclusion: UGE-ST通过有效利用未标注数据和不确定性控制，显著提升了物理场重建的效率，为数据稀缺场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Tian Zhou,PeiSong Niu,Xue Wang,Liang Sun,Rong Jin
title: One Fits All:Power General Time Series Analysis by Pretrained LM
title_zh: 一应俱全：通过预训练 LM 进行功率通用时间序列分析
comment: Neurips 2023 Spotlight
comments: Neurips 2023 Spotlight
abstract: Although we have witnessed great success of pre-trained models in natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV), limited progress has been made for general time series analysis. Unlike NLP and CV where a unified model can be used to perform different tasks, specially designed approach still dominates in each time series analysis task such as classification, anomaly detection, forecasting, and few-shot learning. The main challenge that blocks the development of pre-trained model for time series analysis is the lack of a large amount of data for training. In this work, we address this challenge by leveraging language or CV models, pre-trained from billions of tokens, for time series analysis. Specifically, we refrain from altering the self-attention and feedforward layers of the residual blocks in the pre-trained language or image model. This model, known as the Frozen Pretrained Transformer (FPT), is evaluated through fine-tuning on all major types of tasks involving time series. Our results demonstrate that pre-trained models on natural language or images can lead to a comparable or state-of-the-art performance in all main time series analysis tasks, as illustrated in Figure 1. We also found both theoretically and empirically that the self-attention module behaviors similarly to principle component analysis (PCA), an observation that helps explains how transformer bridges the domain gap and a crucial step towards understanding the universality of a pre-trained transformer.The code is publicly available at https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/One_Fits_All.
summary: Although we have witnessed great success of pre-trained models in natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV), limited progress has been made for general time series analysis. Unlike NLP and CV where a unified model can be used to perform different tasks, specially designed approach still dominates in each time series analysis task such as classification, anomaly detection, forecasting, and few-shot learning. The main challenge that blocks the development of pre-trained model for time series analysis is the lack of a large amount of data for training. In this work, we address this challenge by leveraging language or CV models, pre-trained from billions of tokens, for time series analysis. Specifically, we refrain from altering the self-attention and feedforward layers of the residual blocks in the pre-trained language or image model. This model, known as the Frozen Pretrained Transformer (FPT), is evaluated through fine-tuning on all major types of tasks involving time series. Our results demonstrate that pre-trained models on natural language or images can lead to a comparable or state-of-the-art performance in all main time series analysis tasks, as illustrated in Figure 1. We also found both theoretically and empirically that the self-attention module behaviors similarly to principle component analysis (PCA), an observation that helps explains how transformer bridges the domain gap and a crucial step towards understanding the universality of a pre-trained transformer.The code is publicly available at https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/One_Fits_All.
abstract_zh: 尽管我们见证了预训练模型在自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域取得的巨大成功，但在一般时间序列分析方面取得的进展有限。与 NLP 和 CV 中统一的模型可以用于执行不同的任务不同，专门设计的方法在分类、异常检测、预测和小样本学习等每个时间序列分析任务中仍然占主导地位。阻碍时间序列分析预训练模型开发的主要挑战是缺乏大量训练数据。在这项工作中，我们通过利用从数十亿个代币中预先训练的语言或 CV 模型进行时间序列分析来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们避免改变预训练语言或图像模型中残差块的自注意力和前馈层。该模型称为 Frozen Pretrained Transformer (FPT)，通过对涉及时间序列的所有主要类型任务进行微调来进行评估。我们的结果表明，针对自然语言或图像的预训练模型可以在所有主要时间序列分析任务中带来可比或最先进的性能，如图 1 所示。我们还从理论上和经验上发现，自注意力模块的行为与主成分分析 (PCA) 类似，这一观察有助于解释 Transformer 如何弥合域差距，也是理解预训练 Transformer 通用性的关键一步。该代码可在以下位置公开获取： https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/One_Fits_All。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练语言模型进行通用时间序列分析，通过冻结模型结构并微调以适应不同任务。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列分析任务需单独设计模型，且缺乏足够训练数据，而预训练模型在NLP/CV领域已证明有效性。
AI.method: 采用冻结预训练Transformer（FPT）结构，保留自注意力和前馈层，通过微调适配时间序列分类、异常检测等任务。
AI.result: FPT在主流时间序列任务中达到与专用模型相当或更优的性能，并理论验证自注意力机制类似PCA，可解释跨领域适应性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型可通过冻结结构实现通用时间序列分析，其自注意力机制的PCA特性是跨领域泛化的关键。

authors_text: Maryam Rezayati,Grammatiki Zanni,Ying Zaoshi,Davide Scaramuzza,Hans Wernher van de Venn
title: Improving safety in physical human-robot collaboration via deep metric learning
title_zh: 通过深度度量学习提高物理人机协作的安全性
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 27th International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Factory Automation (ETFA)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 27th International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Factory Automation (ETFA)
abstract: Direct physical interaction with robots is becoming increasingly important in flexible production scenarios, but robots without protective fences also pose a greater risk to the operator. In order to keep the risk potential low, relatively simple measures are prescribed for operation, such as stopping the robot if there is physical contact or if a safety distance is violated. Although human injuries can be largely avoided in this way, all such solutions have in common that real cooperation between humans and robots is hardly possible and therefore the advantages of working with such systems cannot develop its full potential. In human-robot collaboration scenarios, more sophisticated solutions are required that make it possible to adapt the robot's behavior to the operator and/or the current situation. Most importantly, during free robot movement, physical contact must be allowed for meaningful interaction and not recognized as a collision. However, here lies a key challenge for future systems: detecting human contact by using robot proprioception and machine learning algorithms. This work uses the Deep Metric Learning (DML) approach to distinguish between non-contact robot movement, intentional contact aimed at physical human-robot interaction, and collision situations. The achieved results are promising and show show that DML achieves 98.6\% accuracy, which is 4\% higher than the existing standards (i.e. a deep learning network trained without DML). It also indicates a promising generalization capability for easy portability to other robots (target robots) by detecting contact (distinguishing between contactless and intentional or accidental contact) without having to retrain the model with target robot data.
summary: Direct physical interaction with robots is becoming increasingly important in flexible production scenarios, but robots without protective fences also pose a greater risk to the operator. In order to keep the risk potential low, relatively simple measures are prescribed for operation, such as stopping the robot if there is physical contact or if a safety distance is violated. Although human injuries can be largely avoided in this way, all such solutions have in common that real cooperation between humans and robots is hardly possible and therefore the advantages of working with such systems cannot develop its full potential. In human-robot collaboration scenarios, more sophisticated solutions are required that make it possible to adapt the robot's behavior to the operator and/or the current situation. Most importantly, during free robot movement, physical contact must be allowed for meaningful interaction and not recognized as a collision. However, here lies a key challenge for future systems: detecting human contact by using robot proprioception and machine learning algorithms. This work uses the Deep Metric Learning (DML) approach to distinguish between non-contact robot movement, intentional contact aimed at physical human-robot interaction, and collision situations. The achieved results are promising and show show that DML achieves 98.6\% accuracy, which is 4\% higher than the existing standards (i.e. a deep learning network trained without DML). It also indicates a promising generalization capability for easy portability to other robots (target robots) by detecting contact (distinguishing between contactless and intentional or accidental contact) without having to retrain the model with target robot data.
abstract_zh: 在柔性生产场景中，与机器人的直接物理交互变得越来越重要，但没有防护围栏的机器人也给操作员带来了更大的风险。为了降低潜在风险，对操作规定了相对简单的措施，例如在发生身体接触或违反安全距离时停止机器人。虽然通过这种方式可以很大程度上避免人体伤害，但所有此类解决方案的共同点是，人类与机器人之间几乎不可能进行真正的合作，因此使用此类系统的优势无法充分发挥其潜力。在人机协作场景中，需要更复杂的解决方案，使机器人的行为适应操作员和/或当前情况。最重要的是，在机器人自由运动期间，必须允许物理接触进行有意义的交互，并且不能将其识别为碰撞。然而，未来系统面临的一个关键挑战是：通过使用机器人本体感觉和机器学习算法来检测人类接触。这项工作使用深度度量学习（DML）方法来区分非接触式机器人运动、针对物理人机交互的有意接触以及碰撞情况。所取得的结果令人鼓舞，表明 DML 的准确率达到 98.6%，比现有标准（即没有 DML 训练的深度学习网络）高 4%。它还表明了一种有前景的泛化能力，可以通过检测接触（区分非接触式接触和有意或无意的接触）来轻松移植到其他机器人（目标机器人），而无需使用目标机器人数据重新训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文通过深度度量学习（DML）方法，提升物理人机协作中的安全性，区分非接触运动、有意接触和碰撞情况。
AI.motivation: 现有安全措施（如接触停止或安全距离限制）虽能避免伤害，但阻碍了人机协作的灵活性与效率，需更智能的解决方案以实现安全且自然的交互。
AI.method: 采用深度度量学习框架，训练模型区分机器人运动中的非接触、有意接触及碰撞场景，通过机器人自身感知数据与机器学习算法实现精准识别。
AI.result: 实验表明，DML方法达到98.6%的分类准确率，较传统深度学习方法提升4%，且模型可泛化至其他机器人，无需目标机器人数据重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 深度度量学习有效解决了人机协作中接触意图识别的难题，为安全、灵活的物理交互提供了可移植的解决方案。

search_text: Improving safety in physical human-robot collaboration via deep metric learning 通过深度度量学习提高物理人机协作的安全性 Direct physical interaction with robots is becoming increasingly important in flexible production scenarios, but robots without protective fences also pose a greater risk to the operator. In order to keep the risk potential low, relatively simple measures are prescribed for operation, such as stopping the robot if there is physical contact or if a safety distance is violated. Although human injuries can be largely avoided in this way, all such solutions have in common that real cooperation between humans and robots is hardly possible and therefore the advantages of working with such systems cannot develop its full potential. Most importantly, during free robot movement, physical contact must be allowed for meaningful interaction and not recognized as a collision. However, here lies a key challenge for future systems: detecting human contact by using robot proprioception and machine learning algorithms. This work uses the Deep Metric Learning (DML) approach to distinguish between non-contact robot movement, intentional contact aimed at physical human-robot interaction, and collision situations. The achieved results are promising and show show that DML achieves 98.6\% accuracy, which is 4\% higher than the existing standards (i.e. a deep learning network trained without DML). It also indicates a promising generalization capability for easy portability to other robots (target robots) by detecting contact (distinguishing between contactless and intentional or accidental contact) without having to retrain the model with target robot data. 在柔性生产场景中，与机器人的直接物理交互变得越来越重要，但没有防护围栏的机器人也给操作员带来了更大的风险。为了降低潜在风险，对操作规定了相对简单的措施，例如在发生身体接触或违反安全距离时停止机器人。虽然通过这种方式可以很大程度上避免人体伤害，但所有此类解决方案的共同点是，人类与机器人之间几乎不可能进行真正的合作，因此使用此类系统的优势无法充分发挥其潜力。在人机协作场景中，需要更复杂的解决方案，使机器人的行为适应操作员和/或当前情况。最重要的是，在机器人自由运动期间，必须允许物理接触进行有意义的交互，并且不能将其识别为碰撞。然而，未来系统面临的一个关键挑战是：通过使用机器人本体感觉和机器学习算法来检测人类接触。这项工作使用深度度量学习（DML）方法来区分非接触式机器人运动、针对物理人机交互的有意接触以及碰撞情况。所取得的结果令人鼓舞，表明 DML 的准确率达到 98.6%，比现有标准（即没有 DML 训练的深度学习网络）高 4%。它还表明了一种有前景的泛化能力，可以通过检测接触（区分非接触式接触和有意或无意的接触）来轻松移植到其他机器人（目标机器人），而无需使用目标机器人数据重新训练模型。 本文通过深度度量学习（DML）方法，提升物理人机协作中的安全性，区分非接触运动、有意接触和碰撞情况。 Maryam Rezayati,Grammatiki Zanni,Ying Zaoshi,Davide Scaramuzza,Hans Wernher van de Venn cs.RO,cs.AI

title: A metric to compare the anatomy variation between image time series
title_zh: 比较图像时间序列之间的解剖变化的指标
comment: 12 PAGES
comments: 12 PAGES
abstract: Biological processes like growth, aging, and disease progression are generally studied with follow-up scans taken at different time points, i.e., with image time series (TS) based analysis. Comparison between TS representing a biological process of two individuals/populations is of interest. A metric to quantify the difference between TS is desirable for such a comparison. The two TS represent the evolution of two different subject/population average anatomies through two paths. A method to untangle and quantify the path and inter-subject anatomy(shape) difference between the TS is presented in this paper. The proposed metric is a generalized version of Fréchet distance designed to compare curves. The proposed method is evaluated with simulated and adult and fetal neuro templates. Results show that the metric is able to separate and quantify the path and shape differences between TS.
summary: Biological processes like growth, aging, and disease progression are generally studied with follow-up scans taken at different time points, i.e., with image time series (TS) based analysis. Comparison between TS representing a biological process of two individuals/populations is of interest. A metric to quantify the difference between TS is desirable for such a comparison. The two TS represent the evolution of two different subject/population average anatomies through two paths. A method to untangle and quantify the path and inter-subject anatomy(shape) difference between the TS is presented in this paper. The proposed metric is a generalized version of Fréchet distance designed to compare curves. The proposed method is evaluated with simulated and adult and fetal neuro templates. Results show that the metric is able to separate and quantify the path and shape differences between TS.
abstract_zh: 生长、衰老和疾病进展等生物过程通常通过在不同时间点进行的后续扫描来研究，即基于图像时间序列 (TS) 的分析。代表两个个体/群体的生物过程的 TS 之间的比较很有趣。对于这样的比较，需要一个量化 TS 之间差异的度量。两个 TS 代表两个不同主体/群体平均解剖结构通过两条路径的演变。本文提出了一种解开和量化 TS 之间的路径和主体间解剖结构（形状）差异的方法。所提出的度量是 Fréchet 距离的通用版本，旨在比较曲线。使用模拟的成人和胎儿神经模板评估所提出的方法。结果表明，该度量能够分离并量化 TS 之间的路径和形状差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于比较图像时间序列之间解剖变异的度量方法。
AI.motivation: 生长、衰老和疾病进展等生物过程通常通过不同时间点的随访扫描进行研究，比较两个个体或群体的图像时间序列具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于弗雷歇特距离的通用方法，用于比较曲线，以分离和量化时间序列之间的路径和解剖形状差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该度量方法能够有效区分和量化时间序列之间的路径和形状差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为比较图像时间序列提供了有效的工具，适用于模拟和成人及胎儿神经模板的评估。

title: Crossing Points Detection in Plain Weave for Old Paintings with Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习检测古画平纹组织中的交叉点
comment: 21 pages, 20 figures, 1 table, manuscript submitted to journal
comments: 21 pages, 20 figures, 1 table, manuscript submitted to journal
abstract: In the forensic studies of painting masterpieces, the analysis of the support is of major importance. For plain weave fabrics, the densities of vertical and horizontal threads are used as main features, while angle deviations from the vertical and horizontal axis are also of help. These features can be studied locally through the canvas. In this work, deep learning is proposed as a tool to perform these local densities and angle studies. We trained the model with samples from 36 paintings by Velázquez, Rubens or Ribera, among others. The data preparation and augmentation are dealt with at a first stage of the pipeline. We then focus on the supervised segmentation of crossing points between threads. The U-Net with inception and Dice loss are presented as good choices for this task. Densities and angles are then estimated based on the segmented crossing points. We report test results of the analysis of a few canvases and a comparison with methods in the frequency domain, widely used in this problem. We concluded that this new approach succeeds in some cases where the frequency analysis tools fail, while improving the results in others. Besides, our proposal does not need the labeling of part of the to-be-processed image. As case studies, we apply this novel algorithm to the analysis of two pairs of canvases by Velázquez and Murillo, to conclude that the fabrics used came from the same roll.
summary: In the forensic studies of painting masterpieces, the analysis of the support is of major importance. For plain weave fabrics, the densities of vertical and horizontal threads are used as main features, while angle deviations from the vertical and horizontal axis are also of help. These features can be studied locally through the canvas. In this work, deep learning is proposed as a tool to perform these local densities and angle studies. We trained the model with samples from 36 paintings by Velázquez, Rubens or Ribera, among others. The data preparation and augmentation are dealt with at a first stage of the pipeline. We then focus on the supervised segmentation of crossing points between threads. The U-Net with inception and Dice loss are presented as good choices for this task. Densities and angles are then estimated based on the segmented crossing points. We report test results of the analysis of a few canvases and a comparison with methods in the frequency domain, widely used in this problem. We concluded that this new approach succeeds in some cases where the frequency analysis tools fail, while improving the results in others. Besides, our proposal does not need the labeling of part of the to-be-processed image. As case studies, we apply this novel algorithm to the analysis of two pairs of canvases by Velázquez and Murillo, to conclude that the fabrics used came from the same roll.
abstract_zh: 在绘画名作的法医研究中，支撑物的分析至关重要。对于平纹织物，垂直和水平纱线的密度是主要特征，而与垂直和水平轴线的角度偏差也有帮助。这些功能可以通过画布在本地进行研究。在这项工作中，提出深度学习作为执行这些局部密度和角度研究的工具。我们使用 Velázquez、Rubens 或 Ribera 等人的 36 幅画作样本来训练模型。数据准备和扩充在管道的第一阶段处理。然后我们重点关注线程之间交叉点的监督分割。具有 inception 和 Dice loss 的 U-Net 被认为是此任务的良好选择。然后根据分段的交叉点估计密度和角度。我们报告了一些画布的分析测试结果以及与该问题中广泛使用的频域方法的比较。我们的结论是，这种新方法在频率分析工具失败的某些情况下取得了成功，同时改善了其他情况下的结果。此外，我们的建议不需要对部分待处理图像进行标记。作为案例研究，我们应用这种新颖的算法来分析委拉斯开兹和穆里略的两对画布，得出结论，所使用的织物来自同一卷。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度学习检测平纹织物中线的交叉点，以分析旧画作的支撑材料。
AI.motivation: 传统频率域方法在分析旧画作织物时存在局限性，需开发无需手动标注且更精确的检测方法。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构结合Inception模块和Dice损失函数，通过36幅绘画样本训练模型，结合数据增强技术进行交叉点分割与密度、角度估算。
AI.result: 在部分频率分析失效的案例中取得成功，其他案例表现更优，且无需标注待处理图像；应用于委拉斯开兹和穆里罗画布分析，证实其来自同一织物卷。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在旧画作织物分析中优于传统技术，具有无需标注和更高准确性的优势，适用于艺术鉴定领域。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出使用深度学习检测平纹织物中线的交叉点，以分析旧画作的支撑材料。
ai_content.motivation: 传统频率域方法在分析旧画作织物时存在局限性，需开发无需手动标注且更精确的检测方法。
ai_content.method: 基于U-Net架构结合Inception模块和Dice损失函数，通过36幅绘画样本训练模型，结合数据增强技术进行交叉点分割与密度、角度估算。
ai_content.result: 在部分频率分析失效的案例中取得成功，其他案例表现更优，且无需标注待处理图像；应用于委拉斯开兹和穆里罗画布分析，证实其来自同一织物卷。
ai_content.conclusion: 深度学习方法在旧画作织物分析中优于传统技术，具有无需标注和更高准确性的优势，适用于艺术鉴定领域。

search_text: Crossing Points Detection in Plain Weave for Old Paintings with Deep Learning 利用深度学习检测古画平纹组织中的交叉点 In the forensic studies of painting masterpieces, the analysis of the support is of major importance. For plain weave fabrics, the densities of vertical and horizontal threads are used as main features, while angle deviations from the vertical and horizontal axis are also of help. These features can be studied locally through the canvas. In this work, deep learning is proposed as a tool to perform these local densities and angle studies. We trained the model with samples from 36 paintings by Velázquez, Rubens or Ribera, among others. The data preparation and augmentation are dealt with at a first stage of the pipeline. We then focus on the supervised segmentation of crossing points between threads. The U-Net with inception and Dice loss are presented as good choices for this task. Densities and angles are then estimated based on the segmented crossing points. We report test results of the analysis of a few canvases and a comparison with methods in the frequency domain, widely used in this problem. We concluded that this new approach succeeds in some cases where the frequency analysis tools fail, while improving the results in others. Besides, our proposal does not need the labeling of part of the to-be-processed image. As case studies, we apply this novel algorithm to the analysis of two pairs of canvases by Velázquez and Murillo, to conclude that the fabrics used came from the same roll. 在绘画名作的法医研究中，支撑物的分析至关重要。对于平纹织物，垂直和水平纱线的密度是主要特征，而与垂直和水平轴线的角度偏差也有帮助。这些功能可以通过画布在本地进行研究。在这项工作中，提出深度学习作为执行这些局部密度和角度研究的工具。我们使用 Velázquez、Rubens 或 Ribera 等人的 36 幅画作样本来训练模型。数据准备和扩充在管道的第一阶段处理。然后我们重点关注线程之间交叉点的监督分割。具有 inception 和 Dice loss 的 U-Net 被认为是此任务的良好选择。然后根据分段的交叉点估计密度和角度。我们报告了一些画布的分析测试结果以及与该问题中广泛使用的频域方法的比较。我们的结论是，这种新方法在频率分析工具失败的某些情况下取得了成功，同时改善了其他情况下的结果。此外，我们的建议不需要对部分待处理图像进行标记。作为案例研究，我们应用这种新颖的算法来分析委拉斯开兹和穆里略的两对画布，得出结论，所使用的织物来自同一卷。 本文提出使用深度学习检测平纹织物中线的交叉点，以分析旧画作的支撑材料。 A. Delgado,L. Alba-Carcelén,J. J. Murillo-Fuentes cs.CV,cs.NE

title: PEM: Perception Error Model for Virtual Testing of Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: PEM：自动驾驶车辆虚拟测试的感知误差模型
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures. This is a preprint, and version 2 only updates the title and the reference to the final published article, which can be found at DOI: 10.1109/TITS.2023.3311633
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures. This is a preprint, and version 2 only updates the title and the reference to the final published article, which can be found at DOI: 10.1109/TITS.2023.3311633
abstract: Even though virtual testing of Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) has been well recognized as essential for safety assessment, AV simulators are still undergoing active development. One particularly challenging question is to effectively include the Sensing and Perception (S&P) subsystem into the simulation loop. In this article, we define Perception Error Models (PEM), a virtual simulation component that can enable the analysis of the impact of perception errors on AV safety, without the need to model the sensors themselves. We propose a generalized data-driven procedure towards parametric modeling and evaluate it using Apollo, an open-source driving software, and nuScenes, a public AV dataset. Additionally, we implement PEMs in SVL, an open-source vehicle simulator. Furthermore, we demonstrate the usefulness of PEM-based virtual tests, by evaluating camera, LiDAR, and camera-LiDAR setups. Our virtual tests highlight limitations in the current evaluation metrics, and the proposed approach can help study the impact of perception errors on AV safety.
summary: Even though virtual testing of Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) has been well recognized as essential for safety assessment, AV simulators are still undergoing active development. One particularly challenging question is to effectively include the Sensing and Perception (S&P) subsystem into the simulation loop. In this article, we define Perception Error Models (PEM), a virtual simulation component that can enable the analysis of the impact of perception errors on AV safety, without the need to model the sensors themselves. We propose a generalized data-driven procedure towards parametric modeling and evaluate it using Apollo, an open-source driving software, and nuScenes, a public AV dataset. Additionally, we implement PEMs in SVL, an open-source vehicle simulator. Furthermore, we demonstrate the usefulness of PEM-based virtual tests, by evaluating camera, LiDAR, and camera-LiDAR setups. Our virtual tests highlight limitations in the current evaluation metrics, and the proposed approach can help study the impact of perception errors on AV safety.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的虚拟测试已被公认为对安全评估至关重要，但 AV 模拟器仍在积极开发中。一个特别具有挑战性的问题是将传感和感知 (S&P) 子系统有效地纳入仿真循环中。在本文中，我们定义了感知误差模型 (PEM)，这是一个虚拟仿真组件，可以分析感知误差对 AV 安全的影响，而无需对传感器本身进行建模。我们提出了一种针对参数化建模的通用数据驱动程序，并使用开源驱动软件 Apollo 和公共 AV 数据集 nuScenes 对其进行评估。此外，我们还在开源车辆模拟器 SVL 中实施 PEM。此外，我们通过评估相机、激光雷达和相机激光雷达设置，展示了基于 PEM 的虚拟测试的实用性。我们的虚拟测试凸显了当前评估指标的局限性，所提出的方法可以帮助研究感知错误对自动驾驶汽车安全的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出感知误差模型（PEM），用于在无需建模传感器的情况下，分析感知误差对自动驾驶车辆安全的影响。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的虚拟测试需要有效纳入感知子系统，但现有模拟器难以直接建模传感器误差，需开发新的方法评估感知错误的影响。
AI.method: 基于数据驱动的参数化建模方法，结合Apollo开源软件和nuScenes数据集进行验证，并在SVL模拟器中实现PEM。
AI.result: 通过摄像头、激光雷达及融合传感器的虚拟测试，验证了PEM的有效性，并揭示了当前评估指标的局限性。
AI.conclusion: PEM为研究感知误差对自动驾驶安全的影响提供了新方法，同时指出现有评估体系需进一步完善。

title: Diverse Policy Optimization for Structured Action Space
title_zh: 结构化行动空间的多样化政策优化
comment: 18 pages, 16 figures, AAMAS 2023 camera ready
comments: 18 pages, 16 figures, AAMAS 2023 camera ready
abstract: Enhancing the diversity of policies is beneficial for robustness, exploration, and transfer in reinforcement learning (RL). In this paper, we aim to seek diverse policies in an under-explored setting, namely RL tasks with structured action spaces with the two properties of composability and local dependencies. The complex action structure, non-uniform reward landscape, and subtle hyperparameter tuning due to the properties of structured actions prevent existing approaches from scaling well. We propose a simple and effective RL method, Diverse Policy Optimization (DPO), to model the policies in structured action space as the energy-based models (EBM) by following the probabilistic RL framework. A recently proposed novel and powerful generative model, GFlowNet, is introduced as the efficient, diverse EBM-based policy sampler. DPO follows a joint optimization framework: the outer layer uses the diverse policies sampled by the GFlowNet to update the EBM-based policies, which supports the GFlowNet training in the inner layer. Experiments on ATSC and Battle benchmarks demonstrate that DPO can efficiently discover surprisingly diverse policies in challenging scenarios and substantially outperform existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Enhancing the diversity of policies is beneficial for robustness, exploration, and transfer in reinforcement learning (RL). In this paper, we aim to seek diverse policies in an under-explored setting, namely RL tasks with structured action spaces with the two properties of composability and local dependencies. The complex action structure, non-uniform reward landscape, and subtle hyperparameter tuning due to the properties of structured actions prevent existing approaches from scaling well. We propose a simple and effective RL method, Diverse Policy Optimization (DPO), to model the policies in structured action space as the energy-based models (EBM) by following the probabilistic RL framework. A recently proposed novel and powerful generative model, GFlowNet, is introduced as the efficient, diverse EBM-based policy sampler. DPO follows a joint optimization framework: the outer layer uses the diverse policies sampled by the GFlowNet to update the EBM-based policies, which supports the GFlowNet training in the inner layer. Experiments on ATSC and Battle benchmarks demonstrate that DPO can efficiently discover surprisingly diverse policies in challenging scenarios and substantially outperform existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 增强策略的多样性有利于强化学习（RL）的鲁棒性、探索和迁移。在本文中，我们的目标是在未充分探索的环境中寻求多样化的策略，即具有结构化动作空间的强化学习任务，该任务具有可组合性和局部依赖性两个属性。由于结构化动作的特性，复杂的动作结构、不均匀的奖励景观以及微妙的超参数调整阻碍了现有方法的良好扩展。我们提出了一种简单有效的强化学习方法，即多样化策略优化（DPO），通过遵循概率强化学习框架，将结构化行动空间中的策略建模为基于能量的模型（EBM）。最近提出了一种新颖且强大的生成模型 GFlowNet，作为高效、多样化的基于 EBM 的策略采样器。 DPO遵循联合优化框架：外层使用GFlowNet采样的多样化策略来更新基于EBM的策略，支持内层的GFlowNet训练。 ATSC 和 Battle 基准测试表明，DPO 可以在具有挑战性的场景中有效地发现令人惊讶的多样化策略，并且大大优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在针对具有组合性和局部依赖性的结构化动作空间，提出一种名为DPO的强化学习方法，以提升策略多样性并解决现有方法扩展性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 结构化动作空间的复杂性、非均匀奖励景观及超参数调优的细微性导致现有方法难以有效扩展，需探索更高效的多样化策略优化方案。
AI.method: 提出DPO方法，将策略建模为能量基模型（EBM），结合GFlowNet作为高效采样器，通过内外层联合优化框架实现策略更新与GFlowNet训练的协同。
AI.result: 在ATSC和Battle基准测试中，DPO能高效发现多样化策略，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DPO方法在结构化动作空间中有效提升策略多样性，为复杂场景下的强化学习提供了可行解决方案。

A recently proposed novel and powerful generative model, GFlowNet, is introduced as the efficient, diverse EBM-based policy sampler. DPO follows a joint optimization framework: the outer layer uses the diverse policies sampled by the GFlowNet to update the EBM-based policies, which supports the GFlowNet training in the inner layer. Experiments on ATSC and Battle benchmarks demonstrate that DPO can efficiently discover surprisingly diverse policies in challenging scenarios and substantially outperform existing state-of-the-art methods. 增强策略的多样性有利于强化学习（RL）的鲁棒性、探索和迁移。在本文中，我们的目标是在未充分探索的环境中寻求多样化的策略，即具有结构化动作空间的强化学习任务，该任务具有可组合性和局部依赖性两个属性。由于结构化动作的特性，复杂的动作结构、不均匀的奖励景观以及微妙的超参数调整阻碍了现有方法的良好扩展。我们提出了一种简单有效的强化学习方法，即多样化策略优化（DPO），通过遵循概率强化学习框架，将结构化行动空间中的策略建模为基于能量的模型（EBM）。最近提出了一种新颖且强大的生成模型 GFlowNet，作为高效、多样化的基于 EBM 的策略采样器。 DPO遵循联合优化框架：外层使用GFlowNet采样的多样化策略来更新基于EBM的策略，支持内层的GFlowNet训练。 ATSC 和 Battle 基准测试表明，DPO 可以在具有挑战性的场景中有效地发现令人惊讶的多样化策略，并且大大优于现有的最先进方法。 本文旨在针对具有组合性和局部依赖性的结构化动作空间，提出一种名为DPO的强化学习方法，以提升策略多样性并解决现有方法扩展性不足的问题。 Wenhao Li,Baoxiang Wang,Shanchao Yang,Hongyuan Zha cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dmitry Maximov,Vladimir I. Goncharenko,Yury S. Legovich
title: Multi-Valued Neural Networks I A Multi-Valued Associative Memory
title_zh: 多值神经网络 I 多值联想记忆
comment: This is a version with correct Theorem 3 (Theorem 2 in published variant)
comments: This is a version with correct Theorem 3 (Theorem 2 in published variant)
abstract: A new concept of a multi-valued associative memory is introduced, generalizing a similar one in fuzzy neural networks. We expand the results on fuzzy associative memory with thresholds, to the case of a multi-valued one: we introduce the novel concept of such a network without numbers, investigate its properties, and give a learning algorithm in the multi-valued case. We discovered conditions under which it is possible to store given pairs of network variable patterns in such a multi-valued associative memory. In the multi-valued neural network, all variables are not numbers, but elements or subsets of a lattice, i.e., they are all only partially-ordered. Lattice operations are used to build the network output by inputs. In this paper, the lattice is assumed to be Brouwer and determines the implication used, together with other lattice operations, to determine the neural network output. We gave the example of the network use to classify aircraft/spacecraft trajectories.
summary: A new concept of a multi-valued associative memory is introduced, generalizing a similar one in fuzzy neural networks. We expand the results on fuzzy associative memory with thresholds, to the case of a multi-valued one: we introduce the novel concept of such a network without numbers, investigate its properties, and give a learning algorithm in the multi-valued case. We discovered conditions under which it is possible to store given pairs of network variable patterns in such a multi-valued associative memory. In the multi-valued neural network, all variables are not numbers, but elements or subsets of a lattice, i.e., they are all only partially-ordered. Lattice operations are used to build the network output by inputs. In this paper, the lattice is assumed to be Brouwer and determines the implication used, together with other lattice operations, to determine the neural network output. We gave the example of the network use to classify aircraft/spacecraft trajectories.
abstract_zh: 引入了多值联想记忆的新概念，概括了模糊神经网络中的类似概念。我们将带有阈值的模糊联想记忆的结果扩展到多值情况：我们引入了这种无数字网络的新概念，研究了其属性，并给出了多值情况下的学习算法。我们发现了可以在这种多值关联存储器中存储给定的网络变量模式对的条件。在多值神经网络中，所有变量都不是数字，而是格的元素或子集，即它们都只是部分有序的。格子运算用于通过输入构建网络输出。在本文中，假设格子为 Brouwer，并确定所使用的蕴涵以及其他格子运算，以确定神经网络的输出。我们给出了使用网络对飞机/航天器轨迹进行分类的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多值关联记忆模型，扩展了模糊神经网络中的关联记忆理论，研究其属性并设计学习算法。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络难以处理非数值型、部分有序数据，需扩展模糊关联记忆至多值场景以应对更复杂的数据结构。
AI.method: 基于Brouwer格构建多值网络框架，利用格运算实现输入到输出的映射，并设计无需数值的存储与学习算法。
AI.result: 确定了多值关联记忆存储特定模式的条件，并通过飞行器轨迹分类实例验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为处理非数值型数据提供了新方法，扩展了关联记忆在复杂数据场景下的应用潜力。
