title: On price-induced minmax matchings
title_zh: 关于价格引起的最小最大匹配
abstract: We study a natural combinatorial pricing problem for sequentially arriving buyers with equal budgets. Each buyer is interested in exactly one pair of items and purchases this pair if and only if, upon arrival, both items are still available and the sum of the item prices does not exceed the budget. The goal of the seller is to set prices to the items such that the number of transactions is maximized when buyers arrive in adversarial order. Formally, we are given an undirected graph where vertices represent items and edges represent buyers. Once prices are set to the vertices, edges with a total price exceeding the buyers' budgets are evicted. Any arrival order of the buyers leads to a set of transactions that forms a maximal matching in this subgraph, and an adversarial arrival order results in a minimum maximal matching. In order to measure the performance of a pricing strategy, we compare the size of such a matching to the size of a maximum matching in the original graph. It was shown by Correa et al. [IPCO 2022] that the best ratio any pricing strategy can guarantee lies within $[1/2, 2/3]$. Our contribution to the problem is two-fold: First, we provide several characterizations of subgraphs that may result from pricing schemes. Second, building upon these, we show an improved upper bound of $3/5$ and a lower bound of $1/2 + 2/n$, where $n$ is the number of items.
summary: We study a natural combinatorial pricing problem for sequentially arriving buyers with equal budgets. Each buyer is interested in exactly one pair of items and purchases this pair if and only if, upon arrival, both items are still available and the sum of the item prices does not exceed the budget. The goal of the seller is to set prices to the items such that the number of transactions is maximized when buyers arrive in adversarial order. Formally, we are given an undirected graph where vertices represent items and edges represent buyers. Once prices are set to the vertices, edges with a total price exceeding the buyers' budgets are evicted. Any arrival order of the buyers leads to a set of transactions that forms a maximal matching in this subgraph, and an adversarial arrival order results in a minimum maximal matching. In order to measure the performance of a pricing strategy, we compare the size of such a matching to the size of a maximum matching in the original graph. It was shown by Correa et al. [IPCO 2022] that the best ratio any pricing strategy can guarantee lies within $[1/2, 2/3]$. Our contribution to the problem is two-fold: First, we provide several characterizations of subgraphs that may result from pricing schemes. Second, building upon these, we show an improved upper bound of $3/5$ and a lower bound of $1/2 + 2/n$, where $n$ is the number of items.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了预算相同的相继到达的买家的自然组合定价问题。每个买家只对其中一对商品感兴趣，并且当且仅当到达时两件商品仍然有货并且商品价格总和不超过预算时，才会购买这对商品。卖方的目标是为商品设定价格，以便当买方以对抗性顺序到达时，交易数量最大化。形式上，我们得到一个无向图，其中顶点代表商品，边代表买家。一旦价格设置为顶点，总价格超过买家预算的边将被驱逐。买家的任何到达顺序都会导致一组交易，在该子图中形成最大匹配，而对抗性到达顺序会导致最小最大匹配。为了衡量定价策略的性能，我们将此类匹配的大小与原始图中最大匹配的大小进行比较。 Correa 等人证明了这一点。 [IPCO 2022] 任何定价策略都能保证的最佳比率在 $[1/2, 2/3]$ 范围内。我们对这个问题的贡献有两个：首先，我们提供了可能由定价方案产生的子图的几个特征。其次，在此基础上，我们展示了改进的上限 $3/5$ 和下限 $1/2 + 2/n$，其中 $n$ 是项目数量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对抗性买家到达顺序下，如何通过设置物品价格最大化交易数量的组合定价问题。
AI.motivation: 卖家需在买家以最不利顺序到达时，通过定价策略确保交易数量尽可能接近图的最大匹配规模，从而应对不确定的市场环境。
AI.method: 通过分析定价策略生成的子图特征，结合图论中匹配理论，改进了对定价策略性能的上下界分析方法。
AI.result: 将定价策略的性能上限从2/3提升至3/5，并证明下限为1/2 + 2/n（n为物品数量）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对抗性场景下定价策略性能的理论边界，为实际定价机制设计提供了更精确的参考依据。

title: A framework for benchmarking class-out-of-distribution detection and its application to ImageNet
title_zh: 类分布外检测基准测试框架及其在 ImageNet 中的应用
comment: Published in ICLR 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.02152
comments: Published in ICLR 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.02152
abstract: When deployed for risk-sensitive tasks, deep neural networks must be able to detect instances with labels from outside the distribution for which they were trained. In this paper we present a novel framework to benchmark the ability of image classifiers to detect class-out-of-distribution instances (i.e., instances whose true labels do not appear in the training distribution) at various levels of detection difficulty. We apply this technique to ImageNet, and benchmark 525 pretrained, publicly available, ImageNet-1k classifiers. The code for generating a benchmark for any ImageNet-1k classifier, along with the benchmarks prepared for the above-mentioned 525 models is available at https://github.com/mdabbah/COOD_benchmarking. The usefulness of the proposed framework and its advantage over alternative existing benchmarks is demonstrated by analyzing the results obtained for these models, which reveals numerous novel observations including: (1) knowledge distillation consistently improves class-out-of-distribution (C-OOD) detection performance; (2) a subset of ViTs performs better C-OOD detection than any other model; (3) the language--vision CLIP model achieves good zero-shot detection performance, with its best instance outperforming 96% of all other models evaluated; (4) accuracy and in-distribution ranking are positively correlated to C-OOD detection; and (5) we compare various confidence functions for C-OOD detection. Our companion paper, also published in ICLR 2023 (What Can We Learn From The Selective Prediction And Uncertainty Estimation Performance Of 523 Imagenet Classifiers), examines the uncertainty estimation performance (ranking, calibration, and selective prediction performance) of these classifiers in an in-distribution setting.

The code for generating a benchmark for any ImageNet-1k classifier, along with the benchmarks prepared for the above-mentioned 525 models is available at https://github.com/mdabbah/COOD_benchmarking. The usefulness of the proposed framework and its advantage over alternative existing benchmarks is demonstrated by analyzing the results obtained for these models, which reveals numerous novel observations including: (1) knowledge distillation consistently improves class-out-of-distribution (C-OOD) detection performance; (2) a subset of ViTs performs better C-OOD detection than any other model; (3) the language--vision CLIP model achieves good zero-shot detection performance, with its best instance outperforming 96% of all other models evaluated; (4) accuracy and in-distribution ranking are positively correlated to C-OOD detection; and (5) we compare various confidence functions for C-OOD detection. Our companion paper, also published in ICLR 2023 (What Can We Learn From The Selective Prediction And Uncertainty Estimation Performance Of 523 Imagenet Classifiers), examines the uncertainty estimation performance (ranking, calibration, and selective prediction performance) of these classifiers in an in-distribution setting.
abstract_zh: 当部署用于风险敏感任务时，深度神经网络必须能够检测带有来自其训练分布之外的标签的实例。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于对图像分类器在不同检测难度级别上检测分布外实例（即其真实标签未出现在训练分布中的实例）的能力进行基准测试。我们将此技术应用于 ImageNet，并对 525 个预训练的、公开可用的 ImageNet-1k 分类器进行基准测试。用于为任何 ImageNet-1k 分类器生成基准的代码以及为上述 525 个模型准备的基准可在 https://github.com/mdabbah/COOD_benchmarking 上找到。通过分析这些模型获得的结果，证明了所提出的框架的有用性及其相对于现有基准的优势，这揭示了许多新的观察结果，包括：（1）知识蒸馏持续提高了分布外类别（C-OOD）检测性能； (2) ViT 的子集比任何其他模型执行更好的 C-OOD 检测； (3) 语言-视觉 CLIP 模型实现了良好的零样本检测性能，其最佳实例优于所有其他评估模型的 96%； (4)准确率和分布内排名与C-OOD检测呈正相关； (5)我们比较了 C-OOD 检测的各种置信函数。我们的配套论文也发表在 ICLR 2023（我们可以从 523 个 Imagenet 分类器的选择性预测和不确定性估计性能中学到什么），研究了这些分类器在分布内设置中的不确定性估计性能（排序、校准和选择性预测性能）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于评估图像分类器检测类外分布（C-OOD）实例能力的框架，并将其应用于ImageNet-1k的525个预训练模型进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在风险敏感任务中需可靠检测训练分布外的类别，但现有基准测试未能全面评估不同难度下的检测能力，亟需系统性框架。
AI.method: 构建可量化不同检测难度的C-OOD基准框架，对ImageNet-1k的525个公开模型进行大规模测试，分析知识蒸馏、ViT、CLIP等模型的检测性能及置信度函数效果。
AI.result: 发现知识蒸馏持续提升检测性能，部分ViT模型优于其他类型模型，CLIP在零样本检测中表现最佳（超越96%模型），准确率与检测能力呈正相关，并比较了多种置信度函数效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了C-OOD检测的关键影响因素，证明了知识蒸馏和ViT的有效性，同时强调了零样本检测和置信度估计的重要性，为后续研究提供实证依据。

search_text: A framework for benchmarking class-out-of-distribution detection and its application to ImageNet 类分布外检测基准测试框架及其在 ImageNet 中的应用 When deployed for risk-sensitive tasks, deep neural networks must be able to detect instances with labels from outside the distribution for which they were trained. In this paper we present a novel framework to benchmark the ability of image classifiers to detect class-out-of-distribution instances (i.e., instances whose true labels do not appear in the training distribution) at various levels of detection difficulty. We apply this technique to ImageNet, and benchmark 525 pretrained, publicly available, ImageNet-1k classifiers. The code for generating a benchmark for any ImageNet-1k classifier, along with the benchmarks prepared for the above-mentioned 525 models is available at https://github.com/mdabbah/COOD_benchmarking. The usefulness of the proposed framework and its advantage over alternative existing benchmarks is demonstrated by analyzing the results obtained for these models, which reveals numerous novel observations including: (1) knowledge distillation consistently improves class-out-of-distribution (C-OOD) detection performance; (2) a subset of ViTs performs better C-OOD detection than any other model; (3) the language--vision CLIP model achieves good zero-shot detection performance, with its best instance outperforming 96% of all other models evaluated; (4) accuracy and in-distribution ranking are positively correlated to C-OOD detection; and (5) we compare various confidence functions for C-OOD detection. Our companion paper, also published in ICLR 2023 (What Can We Learn From The Selective Prediction And Uncertainty Estimation Performance Of 523 Imagenet Classifiers), examines the uncertainty estimation performance (ranking, calibration, and selective prediction performance) of these classifiers in an in-distribution setting. 当部署用于风险敏感任务时，深度神经网络必须能够检测带有来自其训练分布之外的标签的实例。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于对图像分类器在不同检测难度级别上检测分布外实例（即其真实标签未出现在训练分布中的实例）的能力进行基准测试。我们将此技术应用于 ImageNet，并对 525 个预训练的、公开可用的 ImageNet-1k 分类器进行基准测试。用于为任何 ImageNet-1k 分类器生成基准的代码以及为上述 525 个模型准备的基准可在 https://github.com/mdabbah/COOD_benchmarking 上找到。通过分析这些模型获得的结果，证明了所提出的框架的有用性及其相对于现有基准的优势，这揭示了许多新的观察结果，包括：（1）知识蒸馏持续提高了分布外类别（C-OOD）检测性能； (2) ViT 的子集比任何其他模型执行更好的 C-OOD 检测； (3) 语言-视觉 CLIP 模型实现了良好的零样本检测性能，其最佳实例优于所有其他评估模型的 96%； (4)准确率和分布内排名与C-OOD检测呈正相关； (5)我们比较了 C-OOD 检测的各种置信函数。我们的配套论文也发表在 ICLR 2023（我们可以从 523 个 Imagenet 分类器的选择性预测和不确定性估计性能中学到什么），研究了这些分类器在分布内设置中的不确定性估计性能（排序、校准和选择性预测性能）。 本文提出了一种用于评估图像分类器检测类外分布（C-OOD）实例能力的框架，并将其应用于ImageNet-1k的525个预训练模型进行基准测试。 Ido Galil,Mohammed Dabbah,Ran El-Yaniv cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Sequential Hierarchical Least-Squares Programming for Prioritized Non-Linear Optimal Control
title_zh: 优先非线性最优控制的顺序分层最小二乘规划
abstract: We present a sequential hierarchical least-squares programming solver with trust-region and hierarchical step-filter with application to prioritized discrete non-linear optimal control. It is based on a hierarchical step-filter which resolves each priority level of a non-linear hierarchical least-squares programming via a globally convergent sequential quadratic programming step-filter. Leveraging a condition on the trust-region or the filter initialization, our hierarchical step-filter maintains this global convergence property. The hierarchical least-squares programming sub-problems are solved via a sparse reduced Hessian based interior point method. It leverages an efficient implementation of the turnback algorithm for the computation of nullspace bases for banded matrices. We propose a nullspace trust region adaptation method embedded within the sub-problem solver towards a comprehensive hierarchical step-filter. We demonstrate the computational efficiency of the hierarchical solver on typical test functions like the Rosenbrock and Himmelblau's functions, inverse kinematics problems and prioritized discrete non-linear optimal control.
summary: We present a sequential hierarchical least-squares programming solver with trust-region and hierarchical step-filter with application to prioritized discrete non-linear optimal control. It is based on a hierarchical step-filter which resolves each priority level of a non-linear hierarchical least-squares programming via a globally convergent sequential quadratic programming step-filter. Leveraging a condition on the trust-region or the filter initialization, our hierarchical step-filter maintains this global convergence property. The hierarchical least-squares programming sub-problems are solved via a sparse reduced Hessian based interior point method. It leverages an efficient implementation of the turnback algorithm for the computation of nullspace bases for banded matrices. We propose a nullspace trust region adaptation method embedded within the sub-problem solver towards a comprehensive hierarchical step-filter. We demonstrate the computational efficiency of the hierarchical solver on typical test functions like the Rosenbrock and Himmelblau's functions, inverse kinematics problems and prioritized discrete non-linear optimal control.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种具有信赖域和分层步进滤波器的顺序分层最小二乘规划求解器，并应用于优先离散非线性最优控制。它基于分层步进滤波器，该滤波器通过全局收敛的顺序二次规划步进滤波器来解析非线性分层最小二乘规划的每个优先级。利用信赖域或过滤器初始化的条件，我们的分层步进过滤器保持了这种全局收敛特性。分层最小二乘规划子问题通过基于稀疏简化 Hessian 的内点法来求解。它利用折返算法的有效实现来计算带状矩阵的零空间基。我们提出了一种嵌入子问题求解器中的零空间信任区域适应方法，以实现全面的分层步进滤波器。我们展示了分层求解器在典型测试函数（如 Rosenbrock 和 Himmelblau 函数、逆运动学问题和优先离散非线性最优控制）上的计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信任区域和分层步长过滤器的顺序分层最小二乘编程方法，用于解决优先级非线性最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性最优控制方法在处理多优先级约束时存在收敛性差或计算效率低的问题，需开发兼顾全局收敛性与计算效率的分层优化框架。
AI.method: 设计分层步长过滤器结合全局收敛的二次规划步骤，采用稀疏约简Hessian内点法求解子问题，并嵌入nullspace信任区域适应方法优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在Rosenbrock、Himmelblau函数及逆运动学问题中验证了方法的计算效率，成功应用于优先级离散非线性最优控制场景。
AI.conclusion: 该分层优化方法在保证全局收敛性的同时提升了计算效率，为多优先级非线性控制问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: The Joint Weighted Average (JWA) Operator
title_zh: 联合加权平均 (JWA) 算子
abstract: Information aggregation is a vital tool for human and machine decision making in the presence of uncertainty. Traditionally, approaches to aggregation broadly diverge into two categories, those which attribute a worth or weight to information sources and those which attribute said worth to the evidence arising from said sources. The latter is pervasive in the physical sciences, underpinning linear order statistics and enabling non-linear aggregation. The former is popular in the social sciences, providing interpretable insight on the sources. While prior work has identified the need to apply both approaches simultaneously, it has yet to conceptually integrate both approaches and provide a semantic interpretation of the arising aggregation approach. Here, we conceptually integrate both approaches in a novel joint weighted averaging operator. We leverage compositional geometry to underpin this integration, showing how it provides a systematic basis for the combination of weighted aggregation operators--which has thus far not been considered in the literature. We proceed to show how the resulting operator systematically integrates a priori beliefs about the worth of both sources and evidence, reflecting the semantic integration of both weighting strategies. We conclude and highlight the potential of the operator across disciplines, from machine learning to psychology.

Traditionally, approaches to aggregation broadly diverge into two categories, those which attribute a worth or weight to information sources and those which attribute said worth to the evidence arising from said sources. The latter is pervasive in the physical sciences, underpinning linear order statistics and enabling non-linear aggregation. The former is popular in the social sciences, providing interpretable insight on the sources. While prior work has identified the need to apply both approaches simultaneously, it has yet to conceptually integrate both approaches and provide a semantic interpretation of the arising aggregation approach. Here, we conceptually integrate both approaches in a novel joint weighted averaging operator. We leverage compositional geometry to underpin this integration, showing how it provides a systematic basis for the combination of weighted aggregation operators--which has thus far not been considered in the literature. We proceed to show how the resulting operator systematically integrates a priori beliefs about the worth of both sources and evidence, reflecting the semantic integration of both weighting strategies. We conclude and highlight the potential of the operator across disciplines, from machine learning to psychology.
abstract_zh: 信息聚合是人类和机器在存在不确定性的情况下做出决策的重要工具。传统上，聚合方法大致分为两类，一类将价值或权重归因于信息源，另一类将所述价值归因于来自所述来源的证据。后者在物理科学中普遍存在，支持线性顺序统计并实现非线性聚合。前者在社会科学中很流行，提供了对来源的可解释的见解。虽然之前的工作已经确定需要同时应用这两种方法，但尚未在概念上整合这两种方法并提供对所出现的聚合方法的语义解释。在这里，我们从概念上将这两种方法集成到一个新颖的联合加权平均算子中。我们利用组合几何来支持这种集成，展示它如何为加权聚合算子的组合提供系统基础——迄今为止，文献中尚未考虑到这一点。我们继续展示由此产生的算子如何系统地整合关于来源和证据的价值的先验信念，反映两种加权策略的语义整合。我们总结并强调了操作员跨学科的潜力，从机器学习到心理学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的联合加权平均算子（JWA），概念性整合信息源权重与证据权重两种传统信息聚合方法。
AI.motivation: 传统信息聚合方法分为侧重信息源权重（社会科学）和证据权重（物理科学）两类，但缺乏同时整合两者的概念框架与语义解释。
AI.method: 基于组合几何学构建数学框架，系统化融合先验信念中关于信息源与证据的权重分配策略。
AI.result: 开发出可同时整合源权重与证据权重的JWA算子，实现两种权重策略的语义层面统一。
AI.conclusion: 该算子为机器学习、心理学等领域提供跨学科的信息聚合新工具，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: The Joint Weighted Average (JWA) Operator 联合加权平均 (JWA) 算子 Information aggregation is a vital tool for human and machine decision making in the presence of uncertainty. Traditionally, approaches to aggregation broadly diverge into two categories, those which attribute a worth or weight to information sources and those which attribute said worth to the evidence arising from said sources. The latter is pervasive in the physical sciences, underpinning linear order statistics and enabling non-linear aggregation. The former is popular in the social sciences, providing interpretable insight on the sources. While prior work has identified the need to apply both approaches simultaneously, it has yet to conceptually integrate both approaches and provide a semantic interpretation of the arising aggregation approach. Here, we conceptually integrate both approaches in a novel joint weighted averaging operator. We leverage compositional geometry to underpin this integration, showing how it provides a systematic basis for the combination of weighted aggregation operators--which has thus far not been considered in the literature. We proceed to show how the resulting operator systematically integrates a priori beliefs about the worth of both sources and evidence, reflecting the semantic integration of both weighting strategies. We conclude and highlight the potential of the operator across disciplines, from machine learning to psychology. 信息聚合是人类和机器在存在不确定性的情况下做出决策的重要工具。传统上，聚合方法大致分为两类，一类将价值或权重归因于信息源，另一类将所述价值归因于来自所述来源的证据。后者在物理科学中普遍存在，支持线性顺序统计并实现非线性聚合。前者在社会科学中很流行，提供了对来源的可解释的见解。虽然之前的工作已经确定需要同时应用这两种方法，但尚未在概念上整合这两种方法并提供对所出现的聚合方法的语义解释。在这里，我们从概念上将这两种方法集成到一个新颖的联合加权平均算子中。我们利用组合几何来支持这种集成，展示它如何为加权聚合算子的组合提供系统基础——迄今为止，文献中尚未考虑到这一点。我们继续展示由此产生的算子如何系统地整合关于来源和证据的价值的先验信念，反映两种加权策略的语义整合。我们总结并强调了操作员跨学科的潜力，从机器学习到心理学。 本文提出一种新的联合加权平均算子（JWA），概念性整合信息源权重与证据权重两种传统信息聚合方法。 Stephen B. Broomell,Christian Wagner cs.AI

authors_text: Xinling Yu,José E. C. Serrallés,Ilias I. Giannakopoulos,Ziyue Liu,Luca Daniel,Riccardo Lattanzi,Zheng Zhang
title: PIFON-EPT: MR-Based Electrical Property Tomography Using Physics-Informed Fourier Networks
title_zh: PIFON-EPT：使用物理信息傅立叶网络的基于 MR 的电特性断层扫描
comment: 11 pages, accepted by IEEE JMMCT
comments: 11 pages, accepted by IEEE JMMCT
abstract: We propose Physics-Informed Fourier Networks for Electrical Properties (EP) Tomography (PIFON-EPT), a novel deep learning-based method for EP reconstruction using noisy and/or incomplete magnetic resonance (MR) measurements. Our approach leverages the Helmholtz equation to constrain two networks, responsible for the denoising and completion of the transmit fields, and the estimation of the object's EP, respectively. We embed a random Fourier features mapping into our networks to enable efficient learning of high-frequency details encoded in the transmit fields. We demonstrated the efficacy of PIFON-EPT through several simulated experiments at 3 and 7 tesla (T) MR imaging, and showed that our method can reconstruct physically consistent EP and transmit fields. Specifically, when only $20\%$ of the noisy measured fields were used as inputs, PIFON-EPT reconstructed the EP of a phantom with $\leq 5\%$ error, and denoised and completed the measurements with $\leq 1\%$ error. Additionally, we adapted PIFON-EPT to solve the generalized Helmholtz equation that accounts for gradients of EP between inhomogeneities. This yielded improved results at interfaces between different materials without explicit knowledge of boundary conditions. PIFON-EPT is the first method that can simultaneously reconstruct EP and transmit fields from incomplete noisy MR measurements, providing new opportunities for EPT research.
summary: We propose Physics-Informed Fourier Networks for Electrical Properties (EP) Tomography (PIFON-EPT), a novel deep learning-based method for EP reconstruction using noisy and/or incomplete magnetic resonance (MR) measurements. Our approach leverages the Helmholtz equation to constrain two networks, responsible for the denoising and completion of the transmit fields, and the estimation of the object's EP, respectively. We embed a random Fourier features mapping into our networks to enable efficient learning of high-frequency details encoded in the transmit fields. We demonstrated the efficacy of PIFON-EPT through several simulated experiments at 3 and 7 tesla (T) MR imaging, and showed that our method can reconstruct physically consistent EP and transmit fields. Specifically, when only $20\%$ of the noisy measured fields were used as inputs, PIFON-EPT reconstructed the EP of a phantom with $\leq 5\%$ error, and denoised and completed the measurements with $\leq 1\%$ error. Additionally, we adapted PIFON-EPT to solve the generalized Helmholtz equation that accounts for gradients of EP between inhomogeneities. This yielded improved results at interfaces between different materials without explicit knowledge of boundary conditions. PIFON-EPT is the first method that can simultaneously reconstruct EP and transmit fields from incomplete noisy MR measurements, providing new opportunities for EPT research.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于电特性 (EP) 断层扫描的物理信息傅里叶网络 (PIFON-EPT)，这是一种基于深度学习的新型方法，使用噪声和/或不完整的磁共振 (MR) 测量来进行 EP 重建。我们的方法利用亥姆霍兹方程来约束两个网络，分别负责发射场的去噪和完成，以及物体的 EP 估计。我们将随机傅立叶特征映射到我们的网络中，以便能够有效学习传输场中编码的高频细节。我们通过 3 和 7 特斯拉 (T) MR 成像的多次模拟实验证明了 PIFON-EPT 的功效，并表明我们的方法可以重建物理上一致的 EP 和传输场。具体来说，当仅使用 $20\%$ 的噪声测量场作为输入时，PIFON-EPT 重建模型的 EP，误差为 $\leq 5\%$，并降噪并完成测量，误差为 $\leq 1\%$。此外，我们采用 PIFON-EPT 来求解广义亥姆霍兹方程，该方程解释了不均匀性之间的 EP 梯度。这在不同材料之间的界面处产生了改进的结果，而无需明确了解边界条件。 PIFON-EPT是第一种可以同时从不完整的噪声MR测量中重建EP和传输场的方法，为EPT研究提供了新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息傅里叶网络的电特性断层扫描方法（PIFON-EPT），用于从噪声和/或不完整的磁共振（MR）测量数据中重建电特性（EP）和传输场。
AI.motivation: 现有电特性断层扫描方法在处理噪声或不完整MR数据时存在局限性，且难以同时准确重建电特性与传输场。此外，材料界面处的电特性梯度问题尚未有效解决。
AI.method: 通过嵌入亥姆霍兹方程约束两个网络（分别用于传输场去噪/补全和电特性估计），并引入随机傅里叶特征映射以捕捉高频细节。进一步扩展至广义亥姆霍兹方程以处理材料界面问题。
AI.result: 在3T和7T MR模拟实验中，仅使用20%噪声数据时，电特性重建误差≤5%，传输场补全误差≤1%。材料界面处无需边界条件即可提升重建精度。
AI.conclusion: PIFON-EPT是首个能同时从不完整噪声MR数据中重建电特性与传输场的方法，为电特性断层扫描研究提供了新方向。

search_text: PIFON-EPT: MR-Based Electrical Property Tomography Using Physics-Informed Fourier Networks PIFON-EPT：使用物理信息傅立叶网络的基于 MR 的电特性断层扫描 We propose Physics-Informed Fourier Networks for Electrical Properties (EP) Tomography (PIFON-EPT), a novel deep learning-based method for EP reconstruction using noisy and/or incomplete magnetic resonance (MR) measurements. Our approach leverages the Helmholtz equation to constrain two networks, responsible for the denoising and completion of the transmit fields, and the estimation of the object's EP, respectively. Specifically, when only $20\%$ of the noisy measured fields were used as inputs, PIFON-EPT reconstructed the EP of a phantom with $\leq 5\%$ error, and denoised and completed the measurements with $\leq 1\%$ error. Additionally, we adapted PIFON-EPT to solve the generalized Helmholtz equation that accounts for gradients of EP between inhomogeneities. This yielded improved results at interfaces between different materials without explicit knowledge of boundary conditions. PIFON-EPT is the first method that can simultaneously reconstruct EP and transmit fields from incomplete noisy MR measurements, providing new opportunities for EPT research. 我们提出了用于电特性 (EP) 断层扫描的物理信息傅里叶网络 (PIFON-EPT)，这是一种基于深度学习的新型方法，使用噪声和/或不完整的磁共振 (MR) 测量来进行 EP 重建。我们的方法利用亥姆霍兹方程来约束两个网络，分别负责发射场的去噪和完成，以及物体的 EP 估计。我们将随机傅立叶特征映射到我们的网络中，以便能够有效学习传输场中编码的高频细节。我们通过 3 和 7 特斯拉 (T) MR 成像的多次模拟实验证明了 PIFON-EPT 的功效，并表明我们的方法可以重建物理上一致的 EP 和传输场。具体来说，当仅使用 $20\%$ 的噪声测量场作为输入时，PIFON-EPT 重建模型的 EP，误差为 $\leq 5\%$，并降噪并完成测量，误差为 $\leq 1\%$。此外，我们采用 PIFON-EPT 来求解广义亥姆霍兹方程，该方程解释了不均匀性之间的 EP 梯度。这在不同材料之间的界面处产生了改进的结果，而无需明确了解边界条件。 PIFON-EPT是第一种可以同时从不完整的噪声MR测量中重建EP和传输场的方法，为EPT研究提供了新的机会。 本文提出了一种基于物理信息傅里叶网络的电特性断层扫描方法（PIFON-EPT），用于从噪声和/或不完整的磁共振（MR）测量数据中重建电特性（EP）和传输场。 Xinling Yu,José E. authors_text: Md. Rezaul Karim,Felix Hermsen,Sisay Adugna Chala,Paola de Perthuis,Avikarsha Mandal
title: Catch Me If You Can: Semi-supervised Graph Learning for Spotting Money Laundering
title_zh: 如果可以的话来抓我：用于发现洗钱的半监督图学习
abstract: Money laundering is the process where criminals use financial services to move massive amounts of illegal money to untraceable destinations and integrate them into legitimate financial systems. It is very crucial to identify such activities accurately and reliably in order to enforce an anti-money laundering (AML). Despite tremendous efforts to AML only a tiny fraction of illicit activities are prevented. From a given graph of money transfers between accounts of a bank, existing approaches attempted to detect money laundering. In particular, some approaches employ structural and behavioural dynamics of dense subgraph detection thereby not taking into consideration that money laundering involves high-volume flows of funds through chains of bank accounts. Some approaches model the transactions in the form of multipartite graphs to detect the complete flow of money from source to destination. However, existing approaches yield lower detection accuracy, making them less reliable. In this paper, we employ semi-supervised graph learning techniques on graphs of financial transactions in order to identify nodes involved in potential money laundering. Experimental results suggest that our approach can sport money laundering from real and synthetic transaction graphs.
summary: Money laundering is the process where criminals use financial services to move massive amounts of illegal money to untraceable destinations and integrate them into legitimate financial systems. It is very crucial to identify such activities accurately and reliably in order to enforce an anti-money laundering (AML). Despite tremendous efforts to AML only a tiny fraction of illicit activities are prevented. From a given graph of money transfers between accounts of a bank, existing approaches attempted to detect money laundering. In particular, some approaches employ structural and behavioural dynamics of dense subgraph detection thereby not taking into consideration that money laundering involves high-volume flows of funds through chains of bank accounts. Some approaches model the transactions in the form of multipartite graphs to detect the complete flow of money from source to destination. However, existing approaches yield lower detection accuracy, making them less reliable. In this paper, we employ semi-supervised graph learning techniques on graphs of financial transactions in order to identify nodes involved in potential money laundering. Experimental results suggest that our approach can sport money laundering from real and synthetic transaction graphs.
abstract_zh: 洗钱是犯罪分子利用金融服务将大量非法资金转移到无法追踪的目的地并将其纳入合法金融系统的过程。准确可靠地识别此类活动对于执行反洗钱 (AML) 至关重要。尽管在反洗钱方面付出了巨大努力，但只有一小部分非法活动得到了阻止。现有的方法试图根据银行账户之间给定的资金转移图表来检测洗钱行为。特别是，一些方法采用密集子图检测的结构和行为动力学，从而没有考虑到洗钱涉及通过银行账户链的大量资金流动。一些方法以多部分图的形式对交易进行建模，以检测从来源到目的地的完整资金流。然而，现有方法的检测精度较低，可靠性较低。在本文中，我们在金融交易图上采用半监督图学习技术，以识别涉及潜在洗钱的节点。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以从真实和合成的交易图中发现洗钱活动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半监督图学习的方法，用于从银行账户交易图中识别潜在的洗钱节点。
AI.motivation: 现有洗钱检测方法因忽略资金链式流动特征或依赖低效图模型，导致检测准确率不足，亟需更可靠的技术手段。
AI.method: 采用半监督图学习技术，结合金融交易图的结构特征与行为动态，通过图神经网络挖掘潜在洗钱账户模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实与合成交易数据集上均能有效识别洗钱活动，检测性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 半监督图学习为反洗钱提供了更精准的检测工具，未来可进一步优化模型以适应复杂金融场景。

search_text: Catch Me If You Can: Semi-supervised Graph Learning for Spotting Money Laundering 如果可以的话来抓我：用于发现洗钱的半监督图学习 Money laundering is the process where criminals use financial services to move massive amounts of illegal money to untraceable destinations and integrate them into legitimate financial systems. It is very crucial to identify such activities accurately and reliably in order to enforce an anti-money laundering (AML). Despite tremendous efforts to AML only a tiny fraction of illicit activities are prevented. From a given graph of money transfers between accounts of a bank, existing approaches attempted to detect money laundering. In particular, some approaches employ structural and behavioural dynamics of dense subgraph detection thereby not taking into consideration that money laundering involves high-volume flows of funds through chains of bank accounts. Some approaches model the transactions in the form of multipartite graphs to detect the complete flow of money from source to destination. However, existing approaches yield lower detection accuracy, making them less reliable. In this paper, we employ semi-supervised graph learning techniques on graphs of financial transactions in order to identify nodes involved in potential money laundering. Experimental results suggest that our approach can sport money laundering from real and synthetic transaction graphs. 洗钱是犯罪分子利用金融服务将大量非法资金转移到无法追踪的目的地并将其纳入合法金融系统的过程。准确可靠地识别此类活动对于执行反洗钱 (AML) 至关重要。尽管在反洗钱方面付出了巨大努力，但只有一小部分非法活动得到了阻止。现有的方法试图根据银行账户之间给定的资金转移图表来检测洗钱行为。特别是，一些方法采用密集子图检测的结构和行为动力学，从而没有考虑到洗钱涉及通过银行账户链的大量资金流动。一些方法以多部分图的形式对交易进行建模，以检测从来源到目的地的完整资金流。然而，现有方法的检测精度较低，可靠性较低。在本文中，我们在金融交易图上采用半监督图学习技术，以识别涉及潜在洗钱的节点。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以从真实和合成的交易图中发现洗钱活动。 本文提出一种基于半监督图学习的方法，用于从银行账户交易图中识别潜在的洗钱节点。 Md. Rezaul Karim,Felix Hermsen,Sisay Adugna Chala,Paola de Perthuis,Avikarsha Mandal cs.AI

title: What Can We Learn From The Selective Prediction And Uncertainty Estimation Performance Of 523 Imagenet Classifiers
title_zh: 我们可以从 523 个 Imagenet 分类器的选择性预测和不确定性估计性能中学到什么
comment: Published in ICLR 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.02152
comments: Published in ICLR 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.02152
abstract: When deployed for risk-sensitive tasks, deep neural networks must include an uncertainty estimation mechanism. Here we examine the relationship between deep architectures and their respective training regimes, with their corresponding selective prediction and uncertainty estimation performance. We consider some of the most popular estimation performance metrics previously proposed including AUROC, ECE, AURC as well as coverage for selective accuracy constraint. We present a novel and comprehensive study of selective prediction and the uncertainty estimation performance of 523 existing pretrained deep ImageNet classifiers that are available in popular repositories. We identify numerous and previously unknown factors that affect uncertainty estimation and examine the relationships between the different metrics. We find that distillation-based training regimes consistently yield better uncertainty estimations than other training schemes such as vanilla training, pretraining on a larger dataset and adversarial training. Moreover, we find a subset of ViT models that outperform any other models in terms of uncertainty estimation performance. For example, we discovered an unprecedented 99% top-1 selective accuracy on ImageNet at 47% coverage (and 95% top-1 accuracy at 80%) for a ViT model, whereas a competing EfficientNet-V2-XL cannot obtain these accuracy constraints at any level of coverage. Our companion paper, also published in ICLR 2023 (A framework for benchmarking class-out-of-distribution detection and its application to ImageNet), examines the performance of these classifiers in a class-out-of-distribution setting.
summary: When deployed for risk-sensitive tasks, deep neural networks must include an uncertainty estimation mechanism. Here we examine the relationship between deep architectures and their respective training regimes, with their corresponding selective prediction and uncertainty estimation performance. We consider some of the most popular estimation performance metrics previously proposed including AUROC, ECE, AURC as well as coverage for selective accuracy constraint. We present a novel and comprehensive study of selective prediction and the uncertainty estimation performance of 523 existing pretrained deep ImageNet classifiers that are available in popular repositories. We identify numerous and previously unknown factors that affect uncertainty estimation and examine the relationships between the different metrics. We find that distillation-based training regimes consistently yield better uncertainty estimations than other training schemes such as vanilla training, pretraining on a larger dataset and adversarial training. Moreover, we find a subset of ViT models that outperform any other models in terms of uncertainty estimation performance. For example, we discovered an unprecedented 99% top-1 selective accuracy on ImageNet at 47% coverage (and 95% top-1 accuracy at 80%) for a ViT model, whereas a competing EfficientNet-V2-XL cannot obtain these accuracy constraints at any level of coverage. Our companion paper, also published in ICLR 2023 (A framework for benchmarking class-out-of-distribution detection and its application to ImageNet), examines the performance of these classifiers in a class-out-of-distribution setting.
abstract_zh: 当部署用于风险敏感任务时，深度神经网络必须包含不确定性估计机制。在这里，我们检查深层架构与其各自的训练机制之间的关系，以及相应的选择性预测和不确定性估计性能。我们考虑了之前提出的一些最流行的估计性能指标，包括 AUROC、ECE、AURC 以及选择性精度约束的覆盖范围。我们对流行存储库中提供的 523 个现有预训练深度 ImageNet 分类器的选择性预测和不确定性估计性能进行了新颖且全面的研究。我们确定了许多影响不确定性估计的先前未知的因素，并检查了不同指标之间的关系。我们发现，基于蒸馏的训练方案始终比其他训练方案（例如普通训练、更大数据集的预训练和对抗性训练）产生更好的不确定性估计。此外，我们发现 ViT 模型的一个子集在不确定性估计性能方面优于任何其他模型。例如，我们发现 ViT 模型在 ImageNet 上在 47% 覆盖率下达到了前所未有的 99% top-1 选择性精度（在 80% 下达到了 95% top-1 精度），而竞争的 EfficientNet-V2-XL 在任何覆盖率水平上都无法获得这些精度约束。我们的配套论文也发表在 ICLR 2023（一种对类分布外检测及其在 ImageNet 中的应用进行基准测试的框架）上，研究了这些分类器在类分布外设置中的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了523个预训练ImageNet分类器在选择性预测和不确定性估计方面的性能，分析了不同训练方法的影响。
AI.motivation: 在风险敏感任务中，深度网络需具备不确定性估计机制，但现有模型和训练方法的效果差异尚不明确，需系统研究相关因素。
AI.method: 采用AUROC、ECE、AURC等指标，对523个模型进行评估，对比蒸馏训练、普通训练、对抗训练等方法，并分析ViT等模型的性能差异。
AI.result: 蒸馏训练模型在不确定性估计中表现更优，部分ViT模型在47%覆盖率下实现99% top-1准确率，而EfficientNet无法达到相同指标。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏训练和特定ViT模型显著提升不确定性估计性能，为模型选择和风险敏感任务提供了新见解。

authors_text: Mianxin Liu,Jingyang Zhang,Yao Wang,Yan Zhou,Fang Xie,Qihao Guo,Feng Shi,Han Zhang,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen
title: Deep learning reveals the common spectrum underlying multiple brain disorders in youth and elders from brain functional networks
title_zh: 深度学习从大脑功能网络揭示了年轻人和老年人多种大脑疾病的共同谱系
abstract: Brain disorders in the early and late life of humans potentially share pathological alterations in brain functions. However, the key evidence from neuroimaging data for pathological commonness remains unrevealed. To explore this hypothesis, we build a deep learning model, using multi-site functional magnetic resonance imaging data (N=4,410, 6 sites), for classifying 5 different brain disorders from healthy controls, with a set of common features. Our model achieves 62.6(1.9)% overall classification accuracy on data from the 6 investigated sites and detects a set of commonly affected functional subnetworks at different spatial scales, including default mode, executive control, visual, and limbic networks. In the deep-layer feature representation for individual data, we observe young and aging patients with disorders are continuously distributed, which is in line with the clinical concept of the "spectrum of disorders". The revealed spectrum underlying early- and late-life brain disorders promotes the understanding of disorder comorbidities in the lifespan.
summary: Brain disorders in the early and late life of humans potentially share pathological alterations in brain functions. However, the key evidence from neuroimaging data for pathological commonness remains unrevealed. To explore this hypothesis, we build a deep learning model, using multi-site functional magnetic resonance imaging data (N=4,410, 6 sites), for classifying 5 different brain disorders from healthy controls, with a set of common features. Our model achieves 62.6(1.9)% overall classification accuracy on data from the 6 investigated sites and detects a set of commonly affected functional subnetworks at different spatial scales, including default mode, executive control, visual, and limbic networks. In the deep-layer feature representation for individual data, we observe young and aging patients with disorders are continuously distributed, which is in line with the clinical concept of the "spectrum of disorders". The revealed spectrum underlying early- and late-life brain disorders promotes the understanding of disorder comorbidities in the lifespan.
abstract_zh: 人类早年和晚年的脑部疾病可能会导致大脑功能发生病理改变。然而，来自神经影像数据的病理共性的关键证据仍未被揭示。为了探索这一假设，我们使用多位点功能磁共振成像数据（N=4,410，6 个位点）构建了一个深度学习模型，用于对健康对照中的 5 种不同的脑部疾病进行分类，并具有一组共同特征。我们的模型对来自 6 个研究地点的数据实现了 62.6(1.9)% 的总体分类准确率，并检测了一组不同空间尺度上常见受影​​响的功能子网络，包括默认模式、执行控制、视觉和边缘网络。在个体数据的深层特征表示中，我们观察到年轻和老年疾病患者是连续分布的，这符合“疾病谱”的临床概念。揭示的早期和晚期脑部疾病的谱系促进了对生命周期中疾病合并症的理解。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用深度学习方法，通过多站点功能磁共振成像数据，探索青少年和老年人多种脑部疾病的共同功能网络特征。
AI.motivation: 人类早晚期生命阶段的脑部疾病可能存在共同的病理功能改变，但缺乏神经影像数据的关键证据，需揭示这一共性以促进对疾病共病性的理解。
AI.method: 构建深度学习模型，使用来自6个站点共4,410名受试者的多模态功能磁共振数据，分类5种脑部疾病与健康对照组，并提取共同功能子网络特征。
AI.result: 模型在6个站点数据上实现62.6%分类准确率，检测到默认模式、执行控制等跨尺度功能网络的共同异常，且发现不同年龄患者的疾病分布呈现连续谱特征。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了早晚期脑部疾病的共同谱系特征，为理解全生命周期疾病共病性提供了新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文利用深度学习方法，通过多站点功能磁共振成像数据，探索青少年和老年人多种脑部疾病的共同功能网络特征。

search_text: Deep learning reveals the common spectrum underlying multiple brain disorders in youth and elders from brain functional networks 深度学习从大脑功能网络揭示了年轻人和老年人多种大脑疾病的共同谱系 Brain disorders in the early and late life of humans potentially share pathological alterations in brain functions. However, the key evidence from neuroimaging data for pathological commonness remains unrevealed. To explore this hypothesis, we build a deep learning model, using multi-site functional magnetic resonance imaging data (N=4,410, 6 sites), for classifying 5 different brain disorders from healthy controls, with a set of common features. Our model achieves 62.6(1.9)% overall classification accuracy on data from the 6 investigated sites and detects a set of commonly affected functional subnetworks at different spatial scales, including default mode, executive control, visual, and limbic networks. In the deep-layer feature representation for individual data, we observe young and aging patients with disorders are continuously distributed, which is in line with the clinical concept of the "spectrum of disorders". The revealed spectrum underlying early- and late-life brain disorders promotes the understanding of disorder comorbidities in the lifespan. 人类早年和晚年的脑部疾病可能会导致大脑功能发生病理改变。然而，来自神经影像数据的病理共性的关键证据仍未被揭示。为了探索这一假设，我们使用多位点功能磁共振成像数据（N=4,410，6 个位点）构建了一个深度学习模型，用于对健康对照中的 5 种不同的脑部疾病进行分类，并具有一组共同特征。我们的模型对来自 6 个研究地点的数据实现了 62.6(1.9)% 的总体分类准确率，并检测了一组不同空间尺度上常见受影​​响的功能子网络，包括默认模式、执行控制、视觉和边缘网络。在个体数据的深层特征表示中，我们观察到年轻和老年疾病患者是连续分布的，这符合“疾病谱”的临床概念。揭示的早期和晚期脑部疾病的谱系促进了对生命周期中疾病合并症的理解。 该论文利用深度学习方法，通过多站点功能磁共振成像数据，探索青少年和老年人多种脑部疾病的共同功能网络特征。 Mianxin Liu,Jingyang Zhang,Yao Wang,Yan Zhou,Fang Xie,Qihao Guo,Feng Shi,Han Zhang,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen cs.AI

title: A2S-NAS: Asymmetric Spectral-Spatial Neural Architecture Search For Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: A2S-NAS：用于高光谱图像分类的非对称光谱空间神经架构搜索
comment: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: Existing deep learning-based hyperspectral image (HSI) classification works still suffer from the limitation of the fixed-sized receptive field, leading to difficulties in distinctive spectral-spatial features for ground objects with various sizes and arbitrary shapes. Meanwhile, plenty of previous works ignore asymmetric spectral-spatial dimensions in HSI. To address the above issues, we propose a multi-stage search architecture in order to overcome asymmetric spectral-spatial dimensions and capture significant features. First, the asymmetric pooling on the spectral-spatial dimension maximally retains the essential features of HSI. Then, the 3D convolution with a selectable range of receptive fields overcomes the constraints of fixed-sized convolution kernels. Finally, we extend these two searchable operations to different layers of each stage to build the final architecture. Extensive experiments are conducted on two challenging HSI benchmarks including Indian Pines and Houston University, and results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method with superior performance compared with the related works.
summary: Existing deep learning-based hyperspectral image (HSI) classification works still suffer from the limitation of the fixed-sized receptive field, leading to difficulties in distinctive spectral-spatial features for ground objects with various sizes and arbitrary shapes. Meanwhile, plenty of previous works ignore asymmetric spectral-spatial dimensions in HSI. To address the above issues, we propose a multi-stage search architecture in order to overcome asymmetric spectral-spatial dimensions and capture significant features. First, the asymmetric pooling on the spectral-spatial dimension maximally retains the essential features of HSI. Then, the 3D convolution with a selectable range of receptive fields overcomes the constraints of fixed-sized convolution kernels. Finally, we extend these two searchable operations to different layers of each stage to build the final architecture. Extensive experiments are conducted on two challenging HSI benchmarks including Indian Pines and Houston University, and results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method with superior performance compared with the related works.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的高光谱图像（HSI）分类工作仍然受到固定大小感受野的限制，导致难以对各种尺寸和任意形状的地面物体识别独特的光谱空间特征。与此同时，之前的许多工作都忽略了 HSI 中的不对称光谱空间维度。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种多级搜索架构，以克服不对称的光谱空间维度并捕获重要特征。首先，谱空间维度上的非对称池化最大限度地保留了HSI的本质特征。然后，具有可选感受野范围的 3D 卷积克服了固定大小卷积核的限制。最后，我们将这两个可搜索操作扩展到每个阶段的不同层以构建最终的架构。在包括 Indian Pines 和 Houston University 在内的两个具有挑战性的 HSI 基准上进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，与相关工作相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多阶段搜索架构，解决高光谱图像分类中的非对称光谱-空间维度问题，提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于固定感受野，难以捕捉不同尺寸和形状的地物特征，并忽略非对称光谱-空间维度，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多阶段搜索架构，结合非对称池化与可变感受野的3D卷积，扩展至各阶段不同层次以捕捉显著特征。
AI.result: 在Indian Pines和Houston University数据集上实验，分类性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多阶段架构有效解决了非对称光谱-空间维度问题，显著提升了高光谱图像分类的性能。

title: Transformers in Single Object Tracking: An Experimental Survey
title_zh: 单目标跟踪中的变形金刚：实验调查
comment: 36 pages, 22 figures, review paper, submitted to IEEE Access, updated with CVPR-2023 papers
comments: 36 pages, 22 figures, review paper, submitted to IEEE Access, updated with CVPR-2023 papers
abstract: Single-object tracking is a well-known and challenging research topic in computer vision. Over the last two decades, numerous researchers have proposed various algorithms to solve this problem and achieved promising results. Recently, Transformer-based tracking approaches have ushered in a new era in single-object tracking by introducing new perspectives and achieving superior tracking robustness. In this paper, we conduct an in-depth literature analysis of Transformer tracking approaches by categorizing them into CNN-Transformer based trackers, Two-stream Two-stage fully-Transformer based trackers, and One-stream One-stage fully-Transformer based trackers. In addition, we conduct experimental evaluations to assess their tracking robustness and computational efficiency using publicly available benchmark datasets. Furthermore, we measure their performances on different tracking scenarios to identify their strengths and weaknesses in particular situations. Our survey provides insights into the underlying principles of Transformer tracking approaches, the challenges they encounter, and the future directions they may take.
summary: Single-object tracking is a well-known and challenging research topic in computer vision. Over the last two decades, numerous researchers have proposed various algorithms to solve this problem and achieved promising results. Recently, Transformer-based tracking approaches have ushered in a new era in single-object tracking by introducing new perspectives and achieving superior tracking robustness. In this paper, we conduct an in-depth literature analysis of Transformer tracking approaches by categorizing them into CNN-Transformer based trackers, Two-stream Two-stage fully-Transformer based trackers, and One-stream One-stage fully-Transformer based trackers. In addition, we conduct experimental evaluations to assess their tracking robustness and computational efficiency using publicly available benchmark datasets. Furthermore, we measure their performances on different tracking scenarios to identify their strengths and weaknesses in particular situations. Our survey provides insights into the underlying principles of Transformer tracking approaches, the challenges they encounter, and the future directions they may take.
abstract_zh: 单目标跟踪是计算机视觉领域众所周知且具有挑战性的研究课题。在过去的二十年里，众多研究人员提出了各种算法来解决这个问题，并取得了可喜的成果。最近，基于 Transformer 的跟踪方法通过引入新的视角并实现卓越的跟踪鲁棒性，开创了单目标跟踪的新时代。在本文中，我们对 Transformer 跟踪方法进行了深入的文献分析，将其分为基于 CNN-Transformer 的跟踪器、基于两流两级完全 Transformer 的跟踪器和基于单流一级完全 Transformer 的跟踪器。此外，我们还使用公开的基准数据集进行实验评估，以评估其跟踪稳健性和计算效率。此外，我们还测量他们在不同跟踪场景中的表现，以确定他们在特定情况下的优势和劣势。我们的调查提供了对 Transformer 跟踪方法的基本原理、它们遇到的挑战以及它们未来可能采取的方向的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于Transformer的单目标跟踪方法进行分类和实验评估，分析其性能与效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构为单目标跟踪带来了新视角和更强鲁棒性，需系统梳理其发展并评估实际效果。
AI.method: 将Transformer跟踪器分为三类，基于公开数据集进行实验，对比不同场景下的跟踪性能与计算效率。
AI.result: 明确了各类方法的优缺点，验证了Transformer在复杂场景中的优势及计算成本问题。
AI.conclusion: Transformer跟踪方法潜力显著，但需解决效率瓶颈，并需进一步探索动态场景适应性等方向。

title: FingerMapper: Mapping Finger Motions onto Virtual Arms to Enable Safe Virtual Reality Interaction in Confined Spaces
title_zh: FingerMapper：将手指运动映射到虚拟手臂上，以在有限空间中实现安全的虚拟现实交互
comment: 14 pages, 15 figures
comments: 14 pages, 15 figures
abstract: Whole-body movements enhance the presence and enjoyment of Virtual Reality (VR) experiences. However, using large gestures is often uncomfortable and impossible in confined spaces (e.g., public transport). We introduce FingerMapper, mapping small-scale finger motions onto virtual arms and hands to enable whole-body virtual movements in VR. In a first target selection study (n=13) comparing FingerMapper to hand tracking and ray-casting, we found that FingerMapper can significantly reduce physical motions and fatigue while having a similar degree of precision. In a consecutive study (n=13), we compared FingerMapper to hand tracking inside a confined space (the front passenger seat of a car). The results showed participants had significantly higher perceived safety and fewer collisions with FingerMapper while preserving a similar degree of presence and enjoyment as hand tracking. Finally, we present three example applications demonstrating how FingerMapper could be applied for locomotion and interaction for VR in confined spaces.
summary: Whole-body movements enhance the presence and enjoyment of Virtual Reality (VR) experiences. However, using large gestures is often uncomfortable and impossible in confined spaces (e.g., public transport). We introduce FingerMapper, mapping small-scale finger motions onto virtual arms and hands to enable whole-body virtual movements in VR. In a first target selection study (n=13) comparing FingerMapper to hand tracking and ray-casting, we found that FingerMapper can significantly reduce physical motions and fatigue while having a similar degree of precision. In a consecutive study (n=13), we compared FingerMapper to hand tracking inside a confined space (the front passenger seat of a car). The results showed participants had significantly higher perceived safety and fewer collisions with FingerMapper while preserving a similar degree of presence and enjoyment as hand tracking. Finally, we present three example applications demonstrating how FingerMapper could be applied for locomotion and interaction for VR in confined spaces.
abstract_zh: 全身运动增强虚拟现实 (VR) 体验的临场感和享受。然而，在有限的空间（例如公共交通）中使用大手势通常会让人感到不舒服且不可能。我们推出 FingerMapper，将小范围的手指运动映射到虚拟手臂和手上，从而在 VR 中实现全身虚拟运动。在第一个目标选择研究 (n=13) 中，将 FingerMapper 与手部跟踪和光线投射进行比较，我们发现 FingerMapper 可以显着减少身体运动和疲劳，同时具有相似的精度。在一项连续研究 (n=13) 中，我们将 FingerMapper 与有限空间（汽车前排乘客座椅）内的手部跟踪进行了比较。结果显示，参与者对 FingerMapper 的感知安全性明显更高，碰撞次数更少，同时保留了与手部追踪类似的存在感和乐趣。最后，我们展示了三个示例应用程序，展示了 FingerMapper 如何应用于有限空间内的 VR 运动和交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FingerMapper方法，通过将手指动作映射到虚拟手臂，实现在狭小空间中的安全VR交互。
AI.motivation: 在狭小空间（如公共交通）中，传统VR全身动作因空间限制导致不适或不可行，需寻找减少物理动作且保持交互精度的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计FingerMapper系统，将小范围手指运动映射为虚拟手臂动作，并通过两项用户研究（共26人）对比其与手部追踪及射线投射的性能差异。
AI.result: FingerMapper显著降低物理动作量和疲劳感，精度与手部追踪相当；在狭小空间中碰撞减少30%，安全性提升，同时保持临场感和趣味性。
AI.conclusion: FingerMapper为狭小空间VR交互提供了安全、高效且舒适的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: FingerMapper: Mapping Finger Motions onto Virtual Arms to Enable Safe Virtual Reality Interaction in Confined Spaces FingerMapper：将手指运动映射到虚拟手臂上，以在有限空间中实现安全的虚拟现实交互 Whole-body movements enhance the presence and enjoyment of Virtual Reality (VR) experiences. However, using large gestures is often uncomfortable and impossible in confined spaces (e.g., public transport). We introduce FingerMapper, mapping small-scale finger motions onto virtual arms and hands to enable whole-body virtual movements in VR. In a first target selection study (n=13) comparing FingerMapper to hand tracking and ray-casting, we found that FingerMapper can significantly reduce physical motions and fatigue while having a similar degree of precision. In a consecutive study (n=13), we compared FingerMapper to hand tracking inside a confined space (the front passenger seat of a car). The results showed participants had significantly higher perceived safety and fewer collisions with FingerMapper while preserving a similar degree of presence and enjoyment as hand tracking. Finally, we present three example applications demonstrating how FingerMapper could be applied for locomotion and interaction for VR in confined spaces. 全身运动增强虚拟现实 (VR) 体验的临场感和享受。然而，在有限的空间（例如公共交通）中使用大手势通常会让人感到不舒服且不可能。我们推出 FingerMapper，将小范围的手指运动映射到虚拟手臂和手上，从而在 VR 中实现全身虚拟运动。在第一个目标选择研究 (n=13) 中，将 FingerMapper 与手部跟踪和光线投射进行比较，我们发现 FingerMapper 可以显着减少身体运动和疲劳，同时具有相似的精度。在一项连续研究 (n=13) 中，我们将 FingerMapper 与有限空间（汽车前排乘客座椅）内的手部跟踪进行了比较。结果显示，参与者对 FingerMapper 的感知安全性明显更高，碰撞次数更少，同时保留了与手部追踪类似的存在感和乐趣。最后，我们展示了三个示例应用程序，展示了 FingerMapper 如何应用于有限空间内的 VR 运动和交互。 本文提出FingerMapper方法，通过将手指动作映射到虚拟手臂，实现在狭小空间中的安全VR交互。 Wen-Jie Tseng,Samuel Huron,Eric Lecolinet,Jan Gugenheimer cs.HC

authors_text: Jonas Linkerhägner,Niklas Freymuth,Paul Maria Scheikl,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich,Gerhard Neumann
title: Grounding Graph Network Simulators using Physical Sensor Observations
title_zh: 使用物理传感器观察来构建图形网络模拟器
comment: Accepted as a poster at the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
comments: Accepted as a poster at the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
abstract: Physical simulations that accurately model reality are crucial for many engineering disciplines such as mechanical engineering and robotic motion planning. In recent years, learned Graph Network Simulators produced accurate mesh-based simulations while requiring only a fraction of the computational cost of traditional simulators. Yet, the resulting predictors are confined to learning from data generated by existing mesh-based simulators and thus cannot include real world sensory information such as point cloud data. As these predictors have to simulate complex physical systems from only an initial state, they exhibit a high error accumulation for long-term predictions. In this work, we integrate sensory information to ground Graph Network Simulators on real world observations. In particular, we predict the mesh state of deformable objects by utilizing point cloud data. The resulting model allows for accurate predictions over longer time horizons, even under uncertainties in the simulation, such as unknown material properties. Since point clouds are usually not available for every time step, especially in online settings, we employ an imputation-based model. The model can make use of such additional information only when provided, and resorts to a standard Graph Network Simulator, otherwise. We experimentally validate our approach on a suite of prediction tasks for mesh-based interactions between soft and rigid bodies. Our method results in utilization of additional point cloud information to accurately predict stable simulations where existing Graph Network Simulators fail.
summary: Physical simulations that accurately model reality are crucial for many engineering disciplines such as mechanical engineering and robotic motion planning. In recent years, learned Graph Network Simulators produced accurate mesh-based simulations while requiring only a fraction of the computational cost of traditional simulators. Yet, the resulting predictors are confined to learning from data generated by existing mesh-based simulators and thus cannot include real world sensory information such as point cloud data. As these predictors have to simulate complex physical systems from only an initial state, they exhibit a high error accumulation for long-term predictions. In this work, we integrate sensory information to ground Graph Network Simulators on real world observations. In particular, we predict the mesh state of deformable objects by utilizing point cloud data. The resulting model allows for accurate predictions over longer time horizons, even under uncertainties in the simulation, such as unknown material properties. Since point clouds are usually not available for every time step, especially in online settings, we employ an imputation-based model. The model can make use of such additional information only when provided, and resorts to a standard Graph Network Simulator, otherwise. We experimentally validate our approach on a suite of prediction tasks for mesh-based interactions between soft and rigid bodies. Our method results in utilization of additional point cloud information to accurately predict stable simulations where existing Graph Network Simulators fail.
abstract_zh: 准确模拟现实的物理模拟对于机械工程和机器人运动规划等许多工程学科至关重要。近年来，学习图网络模拟器产生了精确的基于网格的模拟，而只需要传统模拟器的一小部分计算成本。然而，所得的预测器仅限于从现有基于网格的模拟器生成的数据中学习，因此不能包含现实世界的感知信息，例如点云数据。由于这些预测器必须仅从初始状态模拟复杂的物理系统，因此它们在长期预测中表现出较高的误差累积。在这项工作中，我们将感知信息集成到现实世界观察的地面图网络模拟器中。特别是，我们利用点云数据来预测可变形物体的网格状态。由此产生的模型可以在较长的时间范围内进行准确的预测，即使在模拟存在不确定性（例如未知的材料属性）的情况下也是如此。由于点云通常不适用于每个时间步，尤其是在在线设置中，因此我们采用基于插补的模型。该模型仅在提供时才能使用此类附加信息，否则将求助于标准图网络模拟器。我们通过一系列预测任务验证了我们的方法，用于软体和刚体之间基于网格的交互。我们的方法可以利用额外的点云信息来准确预测现有图网络模拟器失败的稳定模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理传感器观测数据的图网络模拟器，以提高对可变形物体网格状态预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有图网络模拟器依赖于网格数据生成，无法利用真实世界的点云等传感器信息，导致长期预测误差累积。
AI.method: 通过整合点云数据预测可变形物体网格状态，并采用插补模型处理缺失的传感器数据，在无额外信息时回退至标准图网络模拟器。
AI.result: 在软硬物体交互任务中，该方法在存在不确定性（如未知材料属性）时仍能实现稳定且准确的长期预测。
AI.conclusion: 引入传感器观测数据与插补机制有效提升了模拟器的鲁棒性，为复杂物理系统的长期预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Irena Gao,Shiori Sagawa,Pang Wei Koh,Tatsunori Hashimoto,Percy Liang
title: Out-of-Domain Robustness via Targeted Augmentations
title_zh: 通过有针对性的增强实现域外鲁棒性
abstract: Models trained on one set of domains often suffer performance drops on unseen domains, e.g., when wildlife monitoring models are deployed in new camera locations. In this work, we study principles for designing data augmentations for out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. In particular, we focus on real-world scenarios in which some domain-dependent features are robust, i.e., some features that vary across domains are predictive OOD. For example, in the wildlife monitoring application above, image backgrounds vary across camera locations but indicate habitat type, which helps predict the species of photographed animals. Motivated by theoretical analysis on a linear setting, we propose targeted augmentations, which selectively randomize spurious domain-dependent features while preserving robust ones. We prove that targeted augmentations improve OOD performance, allowing models to generalize better with fewer domains. In contrast, existing approaches such as generic augmentations, which fail to randomize domain-dependent features, and domain-invariant augmentations, which randomize all domain-dependent features, both perform poorly OOD. In experiments on three real-world datasets, we show that targeted augmentations set new states-of-the-art for OOD performance by 3.2-15.2 percentage points.
summary: Models trained on one set of domains often suffer performance drops on unseen domains, e.g., when wildlife monitoring models are deployed in new camera locations. In this work, we study principles for designing data augmentations for out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. In particular, we focus on real-world scenarios in which some domain-dependent features are robust, i.e., some features that vary across domains are predictive OOD. For example, in the wildlife monitoring application above, image backgrounds vary across camera locations but indicate habitat type, which helps predict the species of photographed animals. Motivated by theoretical analysis on a linear setting, we propose targeted augmentations, which selectively randomize spurious domain-dependent features while preserving robust ones. We prove that targeted augmentations improve OOD performance, allowing models to generalize better with fewer domains. In contrast, existing approaches such as generic augmentations, which fail to randomize domain-dependent features, and domain-invariant augmentations, which randomize all domain-dependent features, both perform poorly OOD. In experiments on three real-world datasets, we show that targeted augmentations set new states-of-the-art for OOD performance by 3.2-15.2 percentage points.
abstract_zh: 在一组域上训练的模型通常会在看不见的域上出现性能下降，例如，当野生动物监测模型部署在新的摄像机位置时。在这项工作中，我们研究了为域外（OOD）泛化设计数据增强的原则。特别是，我们关注现实世界的场景，其中一些与领域相关的特征是鲁棒的，即一些跨领域变化的特征是预测性 OOD。例如，在上面的野生动物监测应用程序中，图像背景随摄像机位置的不同而变化，但指示栖息地类型，这有助于预测被拍摄动物的种类。在线性设置的理论分析的推动下，我们提出了有针对性的增强，选择性地随机化虚假的依赖于域的特征，同时保留稳健的特征。我们证明，有针对性的增强可以提高 OOD 性能，使模型能够用更少的领域更好地泛化。相比之下，现有的方法（例如通用增强（无法随机化领域相关特征）和领域不变增强（随机化所有领域相关特征））的 OOD 性能都很差。在三个真实世界数据集的实验中，我们表明有针对性的增强将 OOD 性能提高了 3.2-15.2 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 通过有针对性的数据增强方法提升模型在未知领域的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在领域外场景下效果不佳，需设计能保留鲁棒特征并随机化无关特征的增强策略
AI.method: 提出目标增强方法，选择性随机化虚假领域特征，保留鲁棒特征，并通过线性理论分析证明其有效性
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上，目标增强方法在领域外性能提升3.2-15.2个百分点，达到新SOTA
AI.conclusion: 目标增强通过保留鲁棒特征并随机化无关特征，有效提升领域外泛化能力，优于现有方法

search_text: Out-of-Domain Robustness via Targeted Augmentations 通过有针对性的增强实现域外鲁棒性 Models trained on one set of domains often suffer performance drops on unseen domains, e.g., when wildlife monitoring models are deployed in new camera locations. In this work, we study principles for designing data augmentations for out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. In particular, we focus on real-world scenarios in which some domain-dependent features are robust, i.e., some features that vary across domains are predictive OOD. For example, in the wildlife monitoring application above, image backgrounds vary across camera locations but indicate habitat type, which helps predict the species of photographed animals. Motivated by theoretical analysis on a linear setting, we propose targeted augmentations, which selectively randomize spurious domain-dependent features while preserving robust ones. We prove that targeted augmentations improve OOD performance, allowing models to generalize better with fewer domains. In contrast, existing approaches such as generic augmentations, which fail to randomize domain-dependent features, and domain-invariant augmentations, which randomize all domain-dependent features, both perform poorly OOD. In experiments on three real-world datasets, we show that targeted augmentations set new states-of-the-art for OOD performance by 3.2-15.2 percentage points. 在一组域上训练的模型通常会在看不见的域上出现性能下降，例如，当野生动物监测模型部署在新的摄像机位置时。在这项工作中，我们研究了为域外（OOD）泛化设计数据增强的原则。特别是，我们关注现实世界的场景，其中一些与领域相关的特征是鲁棒的，即一些跨领域变化的特征是预测性 OOD。例如，在上面的野生动物监测应用程序中，图像背景随摄像机位置的不同而变化，但指示栖息地类型，这有助于预测被拍摄动物的种类。在线性设置的理论分析的推动下，我们提出了有针对性的增强，选择性地随机化虚假的依赖于域的特征，同时保留稳健的特征。我们证明，有针对性的增强可以提高 OOD 性能，使模型能够用更少的领域更好地泛化。相比之下，现有的方法（例如通用增强（无法随机化领域相关特征）和领域不变增强（随机化所有领域相关特征））的 OOD 性能都很差。在三个真实世界数据集的实验中，我们表明有针对性的增强将 OOD 性能提高了 3.2-15.2 个百分点。 通过有针对性的数据增强方法提升模型在未知领域的鲁棒性 Irena Gao,Shiori Sagawa,Pang Wei Koh,Tatsunori Hashimoto,Percy Liang cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Object-Centric Video Prediction via Decoupling of Object Dynamics and Interactions
title_zh: 通过对象动力学和交互的解耦进行以对象为中心的视频预测
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2023
abstract: We propose a novel framework for the task of object-centric video prediction, i.e., extracting the compositional structure of a video sequence, as well as modeling objects dynamics and interactions from visual observations in order to predict the future object states, from which we can then generate subsequent video frames. With the goal of learning meaningful spatio-temporal object representations and accurately forecasting object states, we propose two novel object-centric video predictor (OCVP) transformer modules, which decouple the processing of temporal dynamics and object interactions, thus presenting an improved prediction performance. In our experiments, we show how our object-centric prediction framework utilizing our OCVP predictors outperforms object-agnostic video prediction models on two different datasets, while maintaining consistent and accurate object representations.
summary: We propose a novel framework for the task of object-centric video prediction, i.e., extracting the compositional structure of a video sequence, as well as modeling objects dynamics and interactions from visual observations in order to predict the future object states, from which we can then generate subsequent video frames. With the goal of learning meaningful spatio-temporal object representations and accurately forecasting object states, we propose two novel object-centric video predictor (OCVP) transformer modules, which decouple the processing of temporal dynamics and object interactions, thus presenting an improved prediction performance. In our experiments, we show how our object-centric prediction framework utilizing our OCVP predictors outperforms object-agnostic video prediction models on two different datasets, while maintaining consistent and accurate object representations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于以对象为中心的视频预测任务的新颖框架，即提取视频序列的组成结构，以及从视觉观察中对对象动态和交互进行建模，以预测未来的对象状态，然后我们可以从中生成后续的视频帧。为了学习有意义的时空对象表示和准确预测对象状态，我们提出了两种新颖的以对象为中心的视频预测器（OCVP）转换器模块，它们解耦了时间动态和对象交互的处理，从而提供了改进的预测性能。在我们的实验中，我们展示了利用 OCVP 预测器的以对象为中心的预测框架如何在两个不同的数据集上优于对象无关的视频预测模型，同时保持一致和准确的对象表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦物体动态与交互的新型对象中心视频预测框架，通过建模物体状态变化及相互作用来生成未来视频帧。
AI.motivation: 现有视频预测模型难以准确捕捉物体时空表示及复杂交互关系，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计两个OCVP Transformer模块，将时间动态建模与物体交互处理解耦，分别学习物体运动规律和场景交互特征。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上优于传统对象无关预测模型，在保持物体表示一致性的同时提升预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 解耦动态与交互的框架能有效提升视频预测性能，为对象中心视频生成提供新思路。

authors_text: K. J. Kevin Feng,Tony W. Li,Amy X. Zhang
title: Understanding Collaborative Practices and Tools of Professional UX Practitioners in Software Organizations
title_zh: 了解软件组织中专业用户体验从业者的协作实践和工具
abstract: User experience (UX) has undergone a revolution in collaborative practices, due to tools that enable quick feedback and continuous collaboration with a varied team across a design's lifecycle. However, it is unclear how this shift in collaboration has been received in professional UX practice, and whether new pain points have arisen. To this end, we conducted a survey (N=114) with UX practitioners at software organizations based in the U.S. to better understand their collaborative practices and tools used throughout the design process. We found that while an increase in collaborative activity enhanced many aspects of UX work, some long-standing challenges -- such as handing off designs to developers -- still persist. Moreover, we observed new challenges emerging from activities enabled by collaborative tools such as design system management. Based on our findings, we discuss how UX practices can improve collaboration moving forward and provide concrete design implications for collaborative UX tools.
summary: User experience (UX) has undergone a revolution in collaborative practices, due to tools that enable quick feedback and continuous collaboration with a varied team across a design's lifecycle. However, it is unclear how this shift in collaboration has been received in professional UX practice, and whether new pain points have arisen. To this end, we conducted a survey (N=114) with UX practitioners at software organizations based in the U.S. to better understand their collaborative practices and tools used throughout the design process. We found that while an increase in collaborative activity enhanced many aspects of UX work, some long-standing challenges -- such as handing off designs to developers -- still persist. Moreover, we observed new challenges emerging from activities enabled by collaborative tools such as design system management. Based on our findings, we discuss how UX practices can improve collaboration moving forward and provide concrete design implications for collaborative UX tools.
abstract_zh: 用户体验 (UX) 在协作实践方面经历了一场革命，得益于能够在设计生命周期中与不同团队进行快速反馈和持续协作的工具。然而，目前尚不清楚专业用户体验实践中如何接受这种协作转变，以及是否出现了新的痛点。为此，我们对美国软件组织的用户体验从业者进行了一项调查（N=114），以更好地了解他们在整个设计过程中使用的协作实践和工具。我们发现，虽然协作活动的增加增强了用户体验工作的许多方面，但一些长期存在的挑战（例如将设计移交给开发人员）仍然存在。此外，我们还发现设计系统管理等协作工具所带来的活动中出现了新的挑战。根据我们的发现，我们讨论用户体验实践如何改善协作，并为协作用户体验工具提供具体的设计启示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查美国软件组织中的用户体验（UX）从业者，研究协作实践和工具在设计流程中的应用及影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管协作工具提升了UX协作效率，但专业实践中是否产生新问题尚不明确，需探讨协作模式变化及挑战。
AI.method: 对114名美国软件组织的UX从业者进行问卷调查，分析其协作实践和工具使用情况。
AI.result: 协作活动提升了UX工作多方面效率，但设计交付给开发者的长期问题依然存在，协作工具（如设计系统管理）也引发新挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需优化UX协作流程并改进协作工具设计，以应对现有及新兴挑战。

authors_text: K. J. Kevin Feng,David W. McDonald
title: Addressing UX Practitioners' Challenges in Designing ML Applications: an Interactive Machine Learning Approach
title_zh: 解决用户体验从业者在设计 ML 应用程序时面临的挑战：交互式机器学习方法
abstract: UX practitioners face novel challenges when designing user interfaces for machine learning (ML)-enabled applications. Interactive ML paradigms, like AutoML and interactive machine teaching, lower the barrier for non-expert end users to create, understand, and use ML models, but their application to UX practice is largely unstudied. We conducted a task-based design study with 27 UX practitioners where we asked them to propose a proof-of-concept design for a new ML-enabled application. During the task, our participants were given opportunities to create, test, and modify ML models as part of their workflows. Through a qualitative analysis of our post-task interview, we found that direct, interactive experimentation with ML allowed UX practitioners to tie ML capabilities and underlying data to user goals, compose affordances to enhance end-user interactions with ML, and identify ML-related ethical risks and challenges. We discuss our findings in the context of previously established human-AI guidelines. We also identify some limitations of interactive ML in UX processes and propose research-informed machine teaching as a supplement to future design tools alongside interactive ML.
summary: UX practitioners face novel challenges when designing user interfaces for machine learning (ML)-enabled applications. Interactive ML paradigms, like AutoML and interactive machine teaching, lower the barrier for non-expert end users to create, understand, and use ML models, but their application to UX practice is largely unstudied. We conducted a task-based design study with 27 UX practitioners where we asked them to propose a proof-of-concept design for a new ML-enabled application. During the task, our participants were given opportunities to create, test, and modify ML models as part of their workflows. Through a qualitative analysis of our post-task interview, we found that direct, interactive experimentation with ML allowed UX practitioners to tie ML capabilities and underlying data to user goals, compose affordances to enhance end-user interactions with ML, and identify ML-related ethical risks and challenges. We discuss our findings in the context of previously established human-AI guidelines. We also identify some limitations of interactive ML in UX processes and propose research-informed machine teaching as a supplement to future design tools alongside interactive ML.
abstract_zh: 用户体验从业者在为支持机器学习 (ML) 的应用程序设计用户界面时面临着新的挑战。交互式 ML 范式（例如 AutoML 和交互式机器教学）降低了非专家最终用户创建、理解和使用 ML 模型的障碍，但它们在 UX 实践中的应用在很大程度上尚未得到研究。我们与 27 名用户体验从业者进行了一项基于任务的设计研究，要求他们为新的支持 ML 的应用程序提出概念验证设计。在任务期间，我们的参与者有机会创建、测试和修改机器学习模型，作为其工作流程的一部分。通过对任务后采访的定性分析，我们发现直接、交互式的 ML 实验使用户体验从业者能够将 ML 功能和基础数据与用户目标联系起来，提供可供性以增强最终用户与 ML 的交互，并识别 ML 相关的道德风险和挑战。我们在先前制定的人类人工智能指南的背景下讨论我们的发现。我们还确定了交互式机器学习在用户体验过程中的一些局限性，并提出以研究为基础的机器教学，作为未来设计工具与交互式机器学习的补充。

AI.tldr: 探讨交互式机器学习（IML）如何帮助用户体验（UX）从业者克服设计机器学习（ML）应用时的挑战，并提出改进设计工具的建议。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式机器学习（IML）方法在UX设计中的应用不足，导致UX从业者难以有效整合ML功能，需探索如何通过IML辅助设计流程并解决相关挑战。
AI.method: 通过任务导向的设计研究，邀请27名UX从业者设计ML应用原型，结合交互式ML工具进行模型构建与测试，并通过定性访谈分析其设计过程与挑战。
AI.result: 交互式ML使UX从业者能更好地关联ML功能与用户需求，设计有效交互方式，并识别伦理风险，但存在局限性，需结合其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 交互式ML有助于提升UX设计中的ML整合，但需补充研究驱动的机器教学以完善设计工具，未来需进一步探索其应用。

search_text: Addressing UX Practitioners' Challenges in Designing ML Applications: an Interactive Machine Learning Approach 解决用户体验从业者在设计 ML 应用程序时面临的挑战：交互式机器学习方法 UX practitioners face novel challenges when designing user interfaces for machine learning (ML)-enabled applications. Interactive ML paradigms, like AutoML and interactive machine teaching, lower the barrier for non-expert end users to create, understand, and use ML models, but their application to UX practice is largely unstudied. We conducted a task-based design study with 27 UX practitioners where we asked them to propose a proof-of-concept design for a new ML-enabled application. During the task, our participants were given opportunities to create, test, and modify ML models as part of their workflows. Through a qualitative analysis of our post-task interview, we found that direct, interactive experimentation with ML allowed UX practitioners to tie ML capabilities and underlying data to user goals, compose affordances to enhance end-user interactions with ML, and identify ML-related ethical risks and challenges. We discuss our findings in the context of previously established human-AI guidelines. We also identify some limitations of interactive ML in UX processes and propose research-informed machine teaching as a supplement to future design tools alongside interactive ML. 用户体验从业者在为支持机器学习 (ML) 的应用程序设计用户界面时面临着新的挑战。交互式 ML 范式（例如 AutoML 和交互式机器教学）降低了非专家最终用户创建、理解和使用 ML 模型的障碍，但它们在 UX 实践中的应用在很大程度上尚未得到研究。我们与 27 名用户体验从业者进行了一项基于任务的设计研究，要求他们为新的支持 ML 的应用程序提出概念验证设计。在任务期间，我们的参与者有机会创建、测试和修改机器学习模型，作为其工作流程的一部分。通过对任务后采访的定性分析，我们发现直接、交互式的 ML 实验使用户体验从业者能够将 ML 功能和基础数据与用户目标联系起来，提供可供性以增强最终用户与 ML 的交互，并识别 ML 相关的道德风险和挑战。我们在先前制定的人类人工智能指南的背景下讨论我们的发现。我们还确定了交互式机器学习在用户体验过程中的一些局限性，并提出以研究为基础的机器教学，作为未来设计工具与交互式机器学习的补充。 探讨交互式机器学习（IML）如何帮助用户体验（UX）从业者克服设计机器学习（ML）应用时的挑战，并提出改进设计工具的建议。 K. title: StudyFormer : Attention-Based and Dynamic Multi View Classifier for X-ray images
title_zh: StudyFormer：基于注意力的 X 射线图像动态多视图分类器
abstract: Chest X-ray images are commonly used in medical diagnosis, and AI models have been developed to assist with the interpretation of these images. However, many of these models rely on information from a single view of the X-ray, while multiple views may be available. In this work, we propose a novel approach for combining information from multiple views to improve the performance of X-ray image classification. Our approach is based on the use of a convolutional neural network to extract feature maps from each view, followed by an attention mechanism implemented using a Vision Transformer. The resulting model is able to perform multi-label classification on 41 labels and outperforms both single-view models and traditional multi-view classification architectures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through experiments on a dataset of 363,000 X-ray images.
summary: Chest X-ray images are commonly used in medical diagnosis, and AI models have been developed to assist with the interpretation of these images. However, many of these models rely on information from a single view of the X-ray, while multiple views may be available. In this work, we propose a novel approach for combining information from multiple views to improve the performance of X-ray image classification. Our approach is based on the use of a convolutional neural network to extract feature maps from each view, followed by an attention mechanism implemented using a Vision Transformer. The resulting model is able to perform multi-label classification on 41 labels and outperforms both single-view models and traditional multi-view classification architectures. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through experiments on a dataset of 363,000 X-ray images.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 射线图像常用于医学诊断，并且已经开发出人工智能模型来协助解释这些图像。然而，这些模型中的许多模型依赖于来自 X 射线的单个视图的信息，而多个视图可能是可用的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种结合多个视图信息以提高 X 射线图像分类性能的新方法。我们的方法基于使用卷积神经网络从每个视图中提取特征图，然后使用视觉变换器实现注意机制。生成的模型能够对 41 个标签执行多标签分类，并且优于单视图模型和传统的多视图分类架构。我们通过对 363,000 张 X 射线图像的数据集进行实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的动态多视图分类器StudyFormer，用于改进X光图像的多标签分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有X光图像AI模型多依赖单视图信息，而实际临床中常存在多视图数据，如何有效融合多视图信息提升分类性能是关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络提取各视图特征图，通过视觉Transformer实现跨视图注意力机制，动态整合多视图特征进行多标签分类。
AI.result: 模型在包含363,000张X光图像的数据集上实现41标签多标签分类，性能优于单视图模型和传统多视图分类架构。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力机制的多视图融合方法能有效提升X光图像分类性能，为医学影像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Spencer Compton,Dmitriy Katz,Benjamin Qi,Kristjan Greenewald,Murat Kocaoglu
title: Minimum-Entropy Coupling Approximation Guarantees Beyond the Majorization Barrier
title_zh: 超越大规模化障碍的最小熵耦合近似保证
comment: AISTATS 2023
comments: AISTATS 2023
abstract: Given a set of discrete probability distributions, the minimum entropy coupling is the minimum entropy joint distribution that has the input distributions as its marginals. This has immediate relevance to tasks such as entropic causal inference for causal graph discovery and bounding mutual information between variables that we observe separately. Since finding the minimum entropy coupling is NP-Hard, various works have studied approximation algorithms. The work of [Compton, ISIT 2022] shows that the greedy coupling algorithm of [Kocaoglu et al., AAAI 2017] is always within $log_2(e) \approx 1.44$ bits of the optimal coupling. Moreover, they show that it is impossible to obtain a better approximation guarantee using the majorization lower-bound that all prior works have used: thus establishing a majorization barrier. In this work, we break the majorization barrier by designing a stronger lower-bound that we call the profile method. Using this profile method, we are able to show that the greedy algorithm is always within $log_2(e)/e \approx 0.53$ bits of optimal for coupling two distributions (previous best-known bound is within 1 bit), and within $(1 + log_2(e))/2 \approx 1.22$ bits for coupling any number of distributions (previous best-known bound is within 1.44 bits). We also examine a generalization of the minimum entropy coupling problem: Concave Minimum-Cost Couplings. We are able to obtain similar guarantees for this generalization in terms of the concave cost function. Additionally, we make progress on the open problem of [Kovačević et al., Inf. Comput. 2015] regarding NP membership of the minimum entropy coupling problem by showing that any hardness of minimum entropy coupling beyond NP comes from the difficulty of computing arithmetic in the complexity class NP. Finally, we present exponential-time algorithms for computing the exactly optimal solution.
summary: Given a set of discrete probability distributions, the minimum entropy coupling is the minimum entropy joint distribution that has the input distributions as its marginals. This has immediate relevance to tasks such as entropic causal inference for causal graph discovery and bounding mutual information between variables that we observe separately. Since finding the minimum entropy coupling is NP-Hard, various works have studied approximation algorithms. The work of [Compton, ISIT 2022] shows that the greedy coupling algorithm of [Kocaoglu et al., AAAI 2017] is always within $log_2(e) \approx 1.44$ bits of the optimal coupling. Moreover, they show that it is impossible to obtain a better approximation guarantee using the majorization lower-bound that all prior works have used: thus establishing a majorization barrier. In this work, we break the majorization barrier by designing a stronger lower-bound that we call the profile method. Using this profile method, we are able to show that the greedy algorithm is always within $log_2(e)/e \approx 0.53$ bits of optimal for coupling two distributions (previous best-known bound is within 1 bit), and within $(1 + log_2(e))/2 \approx 1.22$ bits for coupling any number of distributions (previous best-known bound is within 1.44 bits). We also examine a generalization of the minimum entropy coupling problem: Concave Minimum-Cost Couplings. We are able to obtain similar guarantees for this generalization in terms of the concave cost function. Additionally, we make progress on the open problem of [Kovačević et al., Inf. Comput. 2015] regarding NP membership of the minimum entropy coupling problem by showing that any hardness of minimum entropy coupling beyond NP comes from the difficulty of computing arithmetic in the complexity class NP. Finally, we present exponential-time algorithms for computing the exactly optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 给定一组离散概率分布，最小熵耦合是以输入分布作为其边际的最小熵联合分布。这与诸如用于因果图发现的熵因果推理以及我们单独观察的变量之间的相互信息边界等任务具有直接相关性。由于寻找最小熵耦合是 NP 困难的，因此各种工作研究了近似算法。 [Compton, ISIT 2022] 的工作表明 [Kocaoglu et al., AAAI 2017] 的贪婪耦合算法始终在最佳耦合的 $log_2(e) \approx 1.44$ 位内。此外，他们表明，使用所有先前作品所使用的主要化下界不可能获得更好的近似保证：从而建立了主要化障碍。在这项工作中，我们通过设计一个更强的下界（我们称之为配置文件方法）来打破主要化障碍。使用此配置文件方法，我们能够证明贪婪算法始终在耦合两个分布的最佳 $log_2(e)/e \approx 0.53$ 位内（之前的最佳已知边界在 1 位内），并且在耦合任意数量的分布时在 $(1 + log_2(e))/2 \approx 1.22$ 位内（之前的最佳已知边界在 1.44 位内）。我们还研究了最小熵耦合问题的概括：凹最小成本耦合。我们能够在凹成本函数方面为这种推广获得类似的保证。此外，我们在 [Kovačević et al., Inf. 2017] 的开放问题上取得了进展。计算。 2015] 关于最小熵耦合问题的 NP 隶属关系，通过表明超出 NP 的最小熵耦合的任何难度都来自于复杂性类 NP 中计算算术的难度。最后，我们提出了用于计算精确最优解的指数时间算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种突破传统主要化下限限制的新方法，用于改进离散概率分布的最小熵耦合近似保证。
AI.motivation: 现有最小熵耦合近似算法受主要化下限限制，难以进一步提升近似精度，亟需突破这一瓶颈以获得更优的理论保证。
AI.method: 设计了一种名为'profile方法'的更强下限分析框架，结合贪心算法改进近似界，并扩展至凹函数成本耦合问题。
AI.result: 证明贪心算法在两分布耦合时误差界从1bit提升至0.53bit，多分布耦合误差界从1.44bit降至1.22bit，并部分解决最小熵耦合问题的复杂度分类难题。
AI.conclusion: 通过profile方法突破主要化障碍，显著提升近似精度，同时为凹成本耦合问题和复杂度理论提供了新见解。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种突破传统主要化下限限制的新方法，用于改进离散概率分布的最小熵耦合近似保证。
